programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: "Who Slept at Your House?"
programme.desc: Da Kristin har grillet Brody om 'overnattingen' hos Audrina, går ryktene under en tur til Lake Tahoe, og Kaitlynn føler seg utenfor. Caroline konfronterer Kaitlynn om det kalde vennskapet. Jason hører Spencer tvile på edrueligheten sin.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Get Dessert and Bail
programme.desc: Brody og Audrinas flørting blir hetere. Krigen mellom Pratt- og Wahler-familiene koker over, mens Brandon blir fryst ut av Danis kalde skulder etter at de flyttet sammen. Audrina og Heidis vennskap er ved et veiskille.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Time Heals Not Some Things
programme.desc: Heidi og Spencer søker hjelp for sin finansielle situasjon. Mens Kaitlynns nye forhold fortsetter å blomstre, truer en av Brandons gamle flørter å ødelegge ting mellom ham og Dani. Justin og faren blir kjent igjen etter en vanskelig tid.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: That's Math Right There
programme.desc: Kaitlynns avgjørelse om å flytte inn med kjæresten får alle til å lure på hva som skjer. Heidi & Spencer bekymrer seg for selskapet. Brandon revurderer forholdet sitt, mens Audrina får en vekker angående Brody.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: What About Me?
programme.desc: På Speidis velværeanstalt går det rykter om at Kaitlynn er gravid. Brandon avslører sjokkerenede nyheter om forholdet. Familien Wahlers kamp for å slutte fred med familien Pratt, blir distrahert av mulige skjellsettende forandringer for egen del.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Timing Is Everything
programme.desc: Kaitlynn knekker nyheten om sin graviditet til Brody, men er urolig når han og Kris skal møtes på fristedet. Pratt- og Wahler-gjengen håndterer endelig feiden som har delt gruppen. Justin får lære viktigheten av å vedlikeholde kontakter.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: I Want It That Way
programme.desc: Aubery prøver å både beholde kaken og spise den, når det gjelder hennes forhold til Mark og Coffey. Cameron kan ikke gi slipp på Ariana. Sirkuet er i byen og en crush-date blir belønnet.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Roses Are Red, Exes Make You Blue
programme.desc: Mechies nye romanse settes på prøve når en ny eks ankommer huset. Singlene får erfare at deres handlinger får konsekvenser i en overraskende kutt-seremoni. Et hemmelig forhold avsløres.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Thruple Trouble
programme.desc: Aubrey og Marks forhold når et lavpunkt. Devins nye romanse gjør Marie fortumlet. Den endelige Crush Date blir belønnet og en uventet gjest avbryter tingene for et par.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Two for One Deal
programme.desc: Coffey befinner seg midt mellom Mark og Aubrey når de slår opp. Mechie slites mellom eksen og hans neste, noe som setter Ariana i helspenn. To ekser blir sendt hjem under Cut Ceremony.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Show Me the Receipts
programme.desc: Kjente og ukjente ansikt kommer tilbake for å skape røre i huset. En løgndetektortest tvinger visse singler til å ta hånd om rotet sitt.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: The Final Crush
programme.desc: Deltakerne må håndtere resultatene av løgndetektortestene sine. De må nå ta den ultimate avgjørelsen: Skal de dra hjem med ekskjæresten, den neste kjæresten eller alene?

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1967 Ford Mustang
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper West Coast Customs Marys Ford Mustang. Bilen hennes utstyres med det aller nyeste innen flatskjerm-tv.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1985 Ford Ranger
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Jareds Ford Ranger. Jared ruller i vei tre tommer lavere, nylakkert i metallic oransje.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Pontiac Trans Am
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper West Coast Customs Danelles Pontiac Trans Am. Hun triller i vei i en bil utstyrt med kaffetrakter og krystallkrone.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1974 Chevy Luv
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen fra West Coast Customs Neils Chevrolet LUV Truck. Han triller av gårde i et campingtelt på hjul.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1989 Ford Mustang
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen fra West Coast Customs Shondas Ford Mustang Convertible. Hun ruller i vei i et pimpet og helt trafikksikkert kjøretøy.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Maxima Station Wagon
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Ezras Nissan Maxima Station Wagon. Han kjører av gårde i en mobil DJ-bås.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Volkswagen Baja
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Krissys Volkswagen Baja Bug. Boblen fra 1969 ble konstruert med holdbarhet som mål. Men med sitt bøyde eksosrør og sine ødelagte dører, kan den virkelig beskrives som alt annet enn akkurat det.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1987 Honda CRX
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper teamet fra West Coast Customs Brians Honda CRX. Det er den første bilen som får en splitter ny motor, ettersom den gamle dør innen Xzibit får den inn på verkstedet.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: '72 Landcruiser
programme.desc: Gaby var en nylig dumpet yogainstruktør som ikke hadde noe i verden utenom yogamatten sin og sin Land Cruiser fra 1972. Ekskjæresten solgte bilen til henne for 200 dollar. Gutta begynner å jobbe med utsiden...

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1989 Ford Escort
programme.desc: I dette avsnittet pimper gjengen fra West Coast Customs Kerrys Ford Escort. Bilen var blitt sveiset og "limt sammen" av to separate biler. Gjengen mente den var trafikkfarlig...

programme.title: Pimp My Ride
programme.desc: Xzibit takes a beat-up 1984 Cadillac Eldorado and restores it to it's former glory.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Down The Rabbit Hole
programme.desc: Når single slipper seg løs på en fest, truer sjalusi med å hindre et par fra fluktdaten. Frustrasjonen stiger da huset forstår at kun et av de sterkeste parene kan bli en perfekt match.

programme.title: Are You The One?: It Takes One To Know One
programme.desc: Overraskende besøk gir singlene råd og innsikt i hva som trengs for å finne en perfekt match. En sannhetsbås avslører endinger i gruppedynamikken.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Stricking Out
programme.desc: I et enestående øyeblikk avslører Kamie en perfekt match under Parseremonien. Et favorittpar får endelig vite sin skjebne. Et annet par blir sammen igjen.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Kiss And Tell
programme.desc: Will fatter konsekvensen av å prøve å fortsette med Courtney samtidig som han leter etter en perfekt match. Huset slipper seg løs og deler skjule talenter.

programme.title: Are You The One?: You Were The One
programme.desc: Etter uker med diskusjon om hvordan finne sine utvalgte, går singlene sammen og gjør et djervt forsøk på å finne ekte kjærlighet.

programme.title: MTV Teen Mom
programme.desc: Opplev de dramatiske øyeblikkene når de unge mødrene takler hverdagslige utfordringer eller opplever uforglemmelige øyeblikk. Det er uavbrutt drama hele dagen, hver dag.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The remaining chefs compete in their first individual challenge by attempting to create a dish that looks as good as it tastes.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The four remaining chefs must prepare vegetarian entrées for 80 guests; the challenge winner receives a makeover and lunch with Gordon; two contestants fall apart during the dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: International culinary experts serve as guest judges when the three finalists create dishes from various parts of the world.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The final two chefs do battle in the final challenge and dinner service; chef Ramsay chooses the winner.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: In this opening instalment of the US cookery competition, Chef Ramsay splits the contestants into teams before asking each person to prepare their signature dish.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The remaining 14 chefs battle in the competition.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Se i nåde
programme.desc: Walker får nok å gjøre når fanger på rømmen tar to nonner som gisler samt Alex og en gruppe voldsutsatte kvinner, og truer med å drepe dem om de ikke får kravene sine oppfylt.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Pengenes makt
programme.desc: For å avverge en mulig gisselsituasjon, leder CD vaktholdet og Walker og Alex går undercover som mann og kone på et eksklusivt feriested, hvis gjester er noen av verdens rikeste menn.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Korsfarer
programme.desc: Når ekskona til en syk profesjonell bryter går i dekning etter å ha vært vitne til et brutalt drap, må bryteren ta seg av sin sønn.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: I Guds hender
programme.desc: Trivette tror han er ansvarlig for å ha skutt en seks år gammel gutt ved et uhell, og blir suspendert mens etterforskningen pågår.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Undercover
programme.desc: Walker og Trent Malloy frykter for livet til deres gode venn, etterforsker Carlos Sandoval, når han går undercover som narkolanger og lederne for narkooperasjonen avslører hvem han er.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: The Hills: Love is Not a Maybe Thing
programme.desc: Heidi bestemmer endelig at hun har opplevd nok dramatikk med Jordan. Lauren og Jason tenker på å gå et hakk videre.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant
programme.desc: Før hun oppdaget at hun var gravid, var Maci en toppelev fra Chattanooga i Tennessee. Forloveden Ryan viser ingen interesse for å hjelpe henne, og Maci må finne ut om forholdet vil overleve eller om hun må takle utfordringene alene.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant
programme.desc: Farrah er en populær cheerleader fra Iowa, men da vennene begynner å sladre om at hun skal bli alenemor, gir hun opp skolen og begynner å bruke altfor mye tid med sin dominerende mor.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant
programme.desc: Partyjenta Amber hadde aldri forestilt seg at hun skulle flytte sammen med sin velmenende, umodne kjæreste Gary så tidlig. Men nå venter de barn, og må takle et voksent ansvar på et tenåringsbudsjett.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: A New Family
programme.desc: Sommeren på Jersey Shore starter når åtte personer flytter inn i sommerhuset. Romantikken blomstrer mellom Sammy og Mike, men kan bli spolert når gutta inviterer tre tilfeldige jenter i boblebadet med dem.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Tanned Triangle
programme.desc: Snooki føler seg fortsatt utstøtt og vurderer å reise sin vei. Første kveld på klubben blir flørtete, så kjærestene hjemme har kanskje grunn til bekymring. Et trekantdrama truer med å splitte huset.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Stone Pillow
programme.desc: Guest star Bradford Dillman plays Edison, a former private detective turned extortionist who is blackmailing a powerful crime chief with a roll of film linking him to murder.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Image
programme.desc: Barney assumes the identity of a powerful psychic from a Caribbean island kingdom in order to hypnotize a defecting crime syndicate leader into revealing his super secret list of government officials on the take.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Committed
programme.desc: Nora Dawson, a witness to a murder, is committed to an asylum and is being systematically driven out of her mind with drugs when the IMF team is given twenty-four hours to save her life.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Bag Woman
programme.desc: Posing as a bag woman for a crooked politician, Casey unknowingly carries an attached case locked to her wrist filled with both money and a bomb set to explode upon opening.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Double Dead
programme.desc: Gangsters running a loan-shark racket in Hawaii short-circuit the IMF team's investigation when they capture Willy and feed him gigantic doses of truth serum.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 306
programme.desc: Jonas og Louise får sjokk når de ser hvilke hus de har råd til. Mads Mikkelsen og Tobias Edlev Nielsen jobber overtid for å prøve å oppfylle parets ønsker.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 307
programme.desc: Mads og Mia ønsker å flytte litt utenfor byen - men ikke helt på landet. Med Tobias og Mads sin hjelp kjøper de en bolig som har nøyaktig alt de ikke liker.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 401
programme.desc: I første episode møter vi Tine og Lars, som har svimlende åtte millioner å kjøpe hus og pusse opp for. Men det store budsjettet har ikke hjulpet dem så langt - kan ekspertene være til hjelp?

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 402
programme.desc: Ekspertene drar til Hørning, der presten og hennes familie trenger et nytt sted å bo. De leier et lite rekkehus og nå vil de gjerne flytte.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 404
programme.desc: Ida og Rasmus drømmer om å bytte ut sine lille leiebolig på Nørrebro med en murervilla i Hillerød. Men de angrer bittert på at de har spurt ekspertene om hjelp når de får se huset pengene gikk til.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Lund
programme.desc: In this episode, Tareq visits Lund, a thousand-year old city in southern Sweden. Lund is surrounded by the richest farmland in the country, and we explore nearby islands and meet entrepreneurs making highly-regarded local products.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Bornholm
programme.desc: Tareq sails out to Bornholm, a Danish island close to southern tip of Sweden. The islanders are fiercely self-sufficient and this attitude reflects in the huge number of food producers making products that are sold both locally and internationally.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Jokkmokk
programme.desc: Far above the Arctic Circle, Tareq explores the wild country around Jokkmokk. Here, the Sami people lived from what the land provides for thousands of years. This wild cuisine is as extreme as the weather here.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Åland
programme.desc: For hundreds of years, Åland’s shipping fleet was the envy of navies around the world, and their sea trade was encouraged by the seafood, grains and fruits that thrive on these islands. Tareq prepares recipes to reflect Åland’s unique cuisine.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Malmö
programme.desc: Tareq is in his hometown of Malmö – Sweden’s third largest city. The food scene here is inspired by the traditional seafood dishes and the large immigrant population whose recipes have given Malmö a new energy.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Finland's South Coast
programme.desc: Tareq takes a late autumn trip along Finland’s southern coast. He stops in the capital Helsinki to see how the city's food culture is about to be discovered by the rest of the world, and dives into the freezing waters around Ekenäs.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Kiruna
programme.desc: Tareq arrives in Kiruna, over 200km north of the Arctic Circle. With the weather getting down to -30C, Tareq takes part in snow picnics, firing up the smoker, and using snow and ice as part of the recipes he prepares.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Bergen
programme.desc: Surrounded by some of the most beautiful landscapes in northern Europe, Bergen has become a centre for the finest seafood in northern Europe. Tareq heads into this winter wonderland to see the curious cuisine that has developed in western Norway.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Fun at the Fair!
programme.desc: Gjengen er tilbake fra Portugal, men Sam har forlatt huset, noe som får Chloe til å tro at det er slutt for alltid. Familien tar helt av i Newcastles største fornøyelsespark og Beau spør endelig Bethan om hun vil bli kjæresten hans offisielt.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Geordies Do the Great Outdoors!
programme.desc: Chloe besøker Sam og de gjør fremskritt i forholdet, mens de andre vil gå ut kledd som motsatt kjønn. Gjengen drar på camping og blir angrepet av mygg. James bestemmer seg for å fortelle Sam om Chloes kyss på Ibiza.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Breaking Point
programme.desc: James forteller Sam om Chloes kyss på Ibiza, og helvete er løs når Sam konfronterer henne. Chloe tror ikke at Abbie avslørte hemmeligheten, for det var bare et kyss. Men Sam ser det ikke slik og forlater huset for godt.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Beau's Birthday!
programme.desc: Chloe og Sam er ute av huset og gjengen konsentrerer seg om å more seg. Beau får en husfest med jungeltema - den er vill! James og Beau overrasker Nathan ved å invitere nettdaten hans, Tommy fra Amsterdam, over til Newcastle.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Serious Send Off!
programme.desc: Det er den siste hele dagen i huset, og gjengen forbereder en 'Big One'! Nathan lar Bethan gi ham voksning av baken. Nat lager et farvelmåltif til familien og Chloe blir med alle for siste kveld på Toon - det blir stilig!

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Get This Party Started!
programme.desc: Geordierne er spente på å komme tilbake til huset og de føeste er single. De ønsker to nykommere, Amelia og Ant velkomne, og viser dem hvordan de fester. Alt er kos og moro helt til Nathan og Beau kommer nære hverandre. Alt for nære for Bethan.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Free Vinny
programme.desc: Mike kommer tilbake, bare for å finne ut at Danny har truet med å finne nye medboere! Jentene leier strippere til Pauly og Mikes ville bursdagsfest, og deltakerne reiser til Staten Island for å kidnappe Vinny. Men vil han bli med dem?

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Nothing But Nice
programme.desc: Vinny kommer tilbake, og alle feirer. Mike prøver å være hyggelig, men ender opp med å irritere guttene. Snooki sliter med en ubehagelig situasjon.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Follow Game
programme.desc: The Situation samler opplysninger for å ødelegge for en av de andre, og for en gangs skyld er det ikke Snooki. JWoww får panikk fordi Roger har forsvunnet og ikke ringer henne tilbake.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Love at the Jersey Shore
programme.desc: Alle deltakerne er konsentrert om sine nåværende kjærester, men det er aldri fred og ro i huset. En av deltakerne skaper drama for The Meatballs, mens Jennis utfordrende klær skaper problemer for Roger.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Sharp Objects
programme.desc: Deltakerne prøver å unngå et haiangrep på fisketur. Jenni konfronterer Paulys stalker. Snooki ser seg ut Vinny da hun blir avvist av kjæresten.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Truth Will Set You Free
programme.desc: Mike klarer ikke å vente lenger med å avsløre 'sannheten' for Snookis kjæreste. Pauly, Vinny og Deena synes det er vanskelig å være de single i huset.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Once Upon a Time in the City of New York
programme.desc: Attacked, mutilated and left for dead, Catherine Chandler is rescued by the mysterious man-beast called Vincent.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Terrible Savior
programme.desc: Witness descriptions of a vigilante lead Catherine to fear Vincent may be a killer.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Siege
programme.desc: Vincent helps the residents of an apartment building defend their homes against thugs who want them out so the land can be re-developed.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: No Way Down
programme.desc: Injured in an explosion, Vincent is captured by a vicious street gang.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Masques
programme.desc: Free to walk the streets openly on Halloween, Vincent becomes the guardian of an Irish peace activist who's been targeted for assassination.

programme.title: JAG: Pilot Error
programme.desc: Two Naval aviators die in a crash of an F-14 while using a new fly-by-wire navigation system.

programme.title: JAG: War Cries
programme.desc: In Lima, Peru, while a boy sneaks into the US embassy at night, a Marine guard stops him.

programme.title: JAG: Sightings
programme.desc: In south Texas, residents have reported strange phenomena, stories of supernatural events have abounded, and a 10-year-old girl has disappeared.

programme.title: JAG: Scimitar
programme.desc: Two Marines in a Humvee mistakenly drive into Iraq; an Iraqi detail intercepts them, kills one, and captures the other.

programme.title: JAG: Defensive Action
programme.desc: A patrolling F-14 malfunctions in a no-fly zone; the crew ejects, and the bird explodes.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Isaac's Teacher / Seal Of Approval / The Successor
programme.desc: The First Lady of the Silent Screen, Lillian Gish, guest stars as Isaac's former English teacher, whom he tries to avoid.

programme.title: The Love Boat: From Here To Maternity / Jealousy / The Trigamist
programme.desc: A judge (Nancy Walker) finds herself attracted to a man (George Gobel) she has placed on probation for being married to three women at once.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Gopher's Bride / Workaholic / On Second Thought
programme.desc: Gopher and Doc battle for the affections of Gopher's gorgeous pen pal (Marie Laurin) who has come to live with him.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Lose One, Win One / For The Record / Mind My Wife
programme.desc: Doc has his arms full when he agrees to show his best friend's amorous wife (Jill St. John) a good time.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Bugged / Eye Of The Beholder / Lady From Sunshine Gardens
programme.desc: A nudist (Barbi Benton) gets help from an attorney (Peter Haskell) when she wants to bare it all on board.

programme.title: Happy Days: Richie's Flip Side
programme.desc: Richie lets fame go to his head when he takes a turn as a disc jockey at the local radio station.

programme.title: Happy Days: Goin' to Chicago
programme.desc: While in Chicago with their high school choir, Richie, Ralph, and Potsie sneak by their chaperons, wind up on the wrong side of an unsympathetic downtown nightclub owner, and win the sympathy of a kind-hearted cocktail waitress.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Cunningham Caper
programme.desc: Richie is sick in bed with the flu and is bored with eating soup and doing crossword puzzles. But when his family leaves him alone in the house, pandemonium breaks loose when Fonzie, Potsie, Ralph, and a burglar join him.

programme.title: Happy Days: Get A Job
programme.desc: It's a new experience for Richie when he becomes romantically attracted to an "older woman."

programme.title: Happy Days: Cruisin'
programme.desc: Richie, Potsie, and Ralph Malph visit another part of town to meet some girls and find themselves in trouble when the girls' boyfriends show up. Fonzie steps in to save the day.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fearless Fonzarelli Part I
programme.desc: For a television show, the Fonz sets a record by jumping his motorcycle over fourteen garbage cans. He ends up crashing into Arnold's chicken stand, and while recuperating from a broken leg, upsets the regimen of the Cunningham household.

programme.title: Happy Days: Football Frolics
programme.desc: To raise money for the big football game, the boys decide to start their own babysitting service. In Football Frolics, Richie, Potsie and Ralph have their hopes set on seeing the big football game of the year, but tickets can't be found anywhere.

programme.title: Happy Days: Two Angry Men
programme.desc: When Fonzie sets a pigeon coop atop the Cunningham garage and the roof caves, Mr. Cunningham sues to collect damages. In Two Angry Men, Laverne and Shirley prevail upon Fonzie to care for a coop of pigeons.

programme.title: Happy Days: Sight for Sore Eyes
programme.desc: After reading too many foreign car manuals, Fonzie is plagued with headaches and is forced to wear glasses for a few weeks, but fears glasses aren't cool.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Human Factor
programme.desc: MacGyver is called in to test the unique security system of a top-secret research and development lab. The system, which is designed to entrap and exterminate intruders, malfunctions, trapping its creator, Jill Ludlum, and MacGyver inside.

programme.title: MacGyver: Eagles
programme.desc: In the wilderness, MacGyver and 10-year-old Darin Cooper intervene to save the lives of a pair of golden eagles injured by poachers. The poachers go after MacGyver -- witness to their crime -- and taking Darin and his mother hostage.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Wish Child
programme.desc: MacGyver fights to save a young boy from the ominous fate of a centuries-old legend.

programme.title: MacGyver: Twice Stung
programme.desc: MacGyver, Pete Thornton, and Joanne Remmings (The Phoenix Foundation's resident bunco expert) pull a sting operation against a con man who cheated their friend out of his life savings.

programme.title: MacGyver: Final Approach
programme.desc: When their plane crashes in the wilderness, MacGyver and four teenage gang leaders struggle for survival.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Ta frem bestikket! Fire fremmede konkurrerer om penger og tittelen som den ultimate vert for middagsselskapet, følg med for en spicy konkurranse.

programme.title: Matlock: The Foursome
programme.desc: A brash multimillionaire, Ellis Blake is held in the slaying of Jeffrey Holden, a handsome, young man who intended to marry Ellis’ daughter – without his blessing or consent.

programme.title: Matlock: The Picture (Part 2)
programme.desc: Matlock’s search for evidence to prove his client innocent of killing her husband uncovers a ring of counterfeiters who will pay any price, including murder, to keep their secret. Ben’s investigation uncovers ties to the mob.

programme.title: Matlock: The Outcast (Part 1)
programme.desc: Matlock’s faith in his ability as a top-notch attorney is completely eroded when he’s dismissed by a client and replaced by a younger lawyer.

programme.title: Matlock: The Outcast (Part 2)
programme.desc: During his fishing trip, Matlock encounters the small, unfriendly town of Lone Pine as he attempts to solve the mysterious death of a young farmhand and uncover a town-wide coverup.

programme.title: Matlock: The Abduction
programme.desc: While attending a UCLA Law seminar, Matlock and Michelle end up in a dangerous dilemma. After giving Matlock inside information regarding an upcoming hit his former law school classmate is involved in a fatal hit and run.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan's daughter (Stacy Van Dyke) escapes from her abusive husband---a trucker who turns up murdered.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: The head pediatric nurse is an ex-prostitute whose former madam is murdered after revealing that she's going to publish a tell-all book.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan searches for clues to solve the decades-old murder of his mentor at the hospital.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan recruits his friend Ben Matlock (Andy Griffith) to defend Jesse, who's accused of the murder of a resident.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Conclusion. With Jesse falsely accused, Ben Matlock (Andy Griffith) pieces together the evidence to find the real killer of Eric Spindler.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mike Connors reprises his former role as tough-guy PI Joe Mannix, who gets assistance from Dr. Sloan to tackle an unsolved 1973 murder case.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Følg med huseiere når de tar valget om å endre livsstilen sin og bytte ut bylivet med det rolige livet på landet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Best Birthday Ever
programme.desc: En krangel mellom samboerne overskygges kun av et uforglemmelig talentshow ledet av Vinny Guadagnino. Snookis opptreden er av en annen verden og Angelinas tale gir uttrykket 'bombing' en ny betydning.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Turen er over og Snooki må rydde opp rotet etter Dren. Samtidig planlegger Mike nok en genusavsløring, selv om alle vet at det blir en gutt.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Meatball Day Wrap-Up Special
programme.desc: Etter en virvelvindsesong i Pocono-fjellene, samles Jersey Shore-damene til en kjøttbolledag. Der hyller de hele fjerde sesong med en drink eller to...eller ti.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Hurricane Situation
programme.desc: Medboerne kommer hjem fra Italia, og gleder seg over å være tilbake. Men et drama er i emning idet Mike truer med å ødelegge Snookis forhold til Jionni.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Snooki vs. The Rock
programme.desc: Deena er ikke gravid lenger og har en kjøttkakedag med Snooki. Samtidig. Vinny bor ikke på to kyster lenger, Angelina er lei og Mike venter på å kunne ta med lille Romeo hjem..

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Hollywood Shore
programme.desc: Vinny innser at hjemme alltid er best. Mike bytter Prosciutto med placenta. Og et rykte skaper brudulje under jentenes store tur til Vestkysten.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: It's down to the grand finale tournament between Iron Chef Chen and Iron Chef Sakai. With dishes such as lobster bisque, egg mousse and more, it will be a tough battle!

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Chen takes on Iron Chef Sakai in this battle of lobster. Each does their best to be named the King of Iron Chefs!

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Having just been crowned as the King of Iron Chefs, Sakai has one more battle to go. Returning to Kitchen Stadium is the renowned French chef Alain Passard.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Learn the history of the 'Iron Chef' competition with a look at the background of one of its all-time greatest chefs, Rokusaburo Michiba, the first Iron Chef Japanese.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Learn the history and background of the Iron Chef Chinese, Chen Kenichi, and the Iron Chef French, Hiroyuki Sakai, while witnessing some of their greatest battles.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Chen squares off against Munetaka Takahashi, a rising star from Kyoto, in an all-out battle of bamboo shoots.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran sjansen på å ta seg en lur i 'Blottlagte blunder', finner nye bruksområder i tillegg til hockey i 'Nyttekøller' og får seg en trøkk fra oven med 'Takattakk'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino seg en kakk i hodet når de er 'Uten høydebevissthet', får multitaskingeksamen ved 'Simultankapasitets-universitetet og betrakter barn som dras i 'Hunder med barneslep'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' blir Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino litt konkurransesugne i 'Utilsiktede hjulskader', opplever T-banekaos på 'Ville tog' og morer seg stort med 'Skjelettkompiser'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' forårsaker Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran alvorlige skader når de spiller 'Hjemmegolf', møter bygningsarbeidere som morer seg med 'Jobbskøyere' og blir vitner til vindens kraft i 'Tatt av vinden'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' deltar Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran i timen med 'Forelesningssabotører', stopper hjorter som foretar 'Bukkattakk' og flipper helt når de får seg en 'Turntrøkk'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' sklir Rob, Steelo og gjest Karrueche Tran rundt i gatene fordi de er 'Dårlig til å drifte', tar seg litt snacks med folk som liker å 'Småspise i alle situasjoner' og holder festen i gang med 'Bursdagsbomber'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' triller Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran ut på skumruller i 'Fatal foam', tar begrepet "hot date" til neste nivå med 'Ildfulle utekvelder' og kommer litt for nær de verste flysetenaboene i 'Ekle passasjerer'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' leker Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran utryddere i 'Kryppatruljen', blir spesielt følsomme og feller 'Kjærlighetstårer' og skater ute i det ville i 'Bli i parken'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXXI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran nye farer ved å drikke i 'Ølskutt', møter folk som blir oppglødd når de går i bakken i 'Krasjglad' og fortsetter å kjøre i 'Kan ikke og vil ikke stoppe'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXXII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' holder Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Karrueche Tran trygg avstand til 'Kanonballknusere', bommer på svingslagforsøk med 'Luftslag' og forbløffes av folk som beveger seg så smidig at 'Det kan være magi'.

programme.title: Andromeda: Summen av delene
programme.desc: Andromeda styres av en drone fra Consensus of Parts, et mytisk mekanisk samfunn. Mens den først var vennlig, prøver dronen å tvinge skipet til å bli med i konsensus.

programme.title: Andromeda: Frykt og avsky i Melkeveien
programme.desc: Gerentex er tilbake, og han krever at Trance og Harper hjelper ham med sitt nye opplegg: å finne Tarn-Vedra.

programme.title: Andromeda: Djevelen tar den bakerste
programme.desc: Dylan og Rev Bem hjelper et fredelig samfunn med å stå opp mot sine kommende slaver, men de må være forsiktige: hvis Dylan lærer dem å drepe, vil barna deres bli født og vite det.

programme.title: Andromeda: Honningstilbudet
programme.desc: Dylan prøver å bringe fred til to forskjellige Nietzschean-stolthetspunkter ved å eskortere prinsesse til den ene til hennes arrangerte ekteskap med prinsen til den andre

programme.title: Andromeda: Stjernekryss
programme.desc: Rommies avatar blir forelsket i det som viser seg å være avataren til et krigsskip ved navn Gabriel. Gabriel prøver å smitte Rommie med et virus som sender planene sine til krigsskipet

programme.title: Andromeda: Hjertet av reisen (del 1)
programme.desc: Beka tar Andromeda til Tarn-Vedra, men lengre tid i slipstream forårsaker bivirkninger. For å bekjempe dem, begynner Beka å ta Flash og blir snart avhengig.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Talking Skull
programme.desc: In 1987, a human skull and some bones were discovered at a Boy Scout Camp near Farmington, Missouri. Facial reconstruction aids the investigators in this case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Beaten by a Hair
programme.desc: In 1992, Laura Houghteling disappeared from her Bethesda home and was never seen again. Forensic scientists use evidence from her bedroom to direct police to a prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Trace
programme.desc: After being admitted to the hospital with unexplained bleeding, 11-month-old Chad Shelton dies. Investigators and scientists frantically search for a cause when others from the same house fall ill.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Knot for Everyone
programme.desc: The bodies of several women are found on a remote hill in California. The police get a break when a prostitute escapes and is able to identify her attacker and his automobile.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Evidence
programme.desc: While skeet shooting on a beautiful spring day, Martin Dillon is shot dead. His friend maintains it was a freak accident, but it takes more than 20 years for the truth to surface.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Formula
programme.desc: When four-month-old Ryan Stallings dies under suspicious circumstances, his mother is ultimately convicted of his murder. But months later, new evidence emerges from a startling source — his newborn brother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Bond
programme.desc: Doctors are puzzled when a two-year-old boy is rushed to the hospital with brain seizures and breathing difficulties. Finally, the boy's sister provides an important clue, raising the possibility of a rare syndrome.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Invisible Intruder
programme.desc: In 1996, police received a call from Darlie Routier telling them of her two sons' murders. The police found the killer by analyzing blood spatter, doing behavioral profiling and analyzing Darlie's 911 call.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ultimate Betrayal
programme.desc: On a windy Kansas night in 1995, a mysterious fire swept through the home of a prominent doctor. In the debris, investigators found evidence which told them how the fire started.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cement the Case
programme.desc: In 1990, Shirley Andronowich's body was found mutilated. Eyewitnesses told police she had a fight with her husband the night before, but forensic evidence proved that he had nothing to do with her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Sometime during a neighborhood Christmas party, five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared. Investigators turned to forensic science to help them see what the witnesses missed.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 9
programme.desc: This episode includes: Halloween Party Death, Father/Son & UD, Priest Killer and Rock of Fortune.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 10
programme.desc: This episode includes: Witch Hunt & UD, Update: Friends to the End, Missing Time Pts. 1 & 2 and Stroke Amnesia & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 11
programme.desc: This episode includes: Coma Comeback, Update: Two Strikes, Palm Beach Embezzler, Twice Burned and Fumbles & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 12
programme.desc: This episode includes: Thank You Philip & UD, Ready Teller Robbery & UD, Geri and Who Am I?

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 13
programme.desc: This episode includes: DJ Death & UD, Update: Medford Millions, Missing Valentine Pts. 1 & 2 & UD, Update: Stroke Amnesia and Florida Flim Flam & UD.

programme.title: The FBI Files: First and Kennedy Street Crew
programme.desc: In the early 1990's, Washington, D.C., became the murder capital of the nation. Few were left untouched by gang violence, which was ignited by the drug trade. By 1994, that violence would strike at the very heart of law enforcement.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Coffee Shop Murders
programme.desc: At a coffee shop in Washington, DC, three employees were shot to death. Evidence at the crime scene pointed in many different directions. Was this a hate crime, a robbery gone wrong or an act of cold-blooded vengeance?

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dishonored
programme.desc: Shirley Russell was determined enough to reach the rank of Captain in the United States Marine Corps. When this officer turned up missing, her colleagues refused to believe she had gone AWOL. It was unclear whether Captain Shirley Russell was alive.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Evil Intent
programme.desc: Drops of blood and a torn screen were all that's left to tell authorities what happened to a woman in Indiana. The 21 yr. old victim was taken from her home on a spring morning. She appeared to have no real enemies, there was no clear motive.

programme.title: The FBI Files: A Stranger in Town
programme.desc: She appeared on the highway in the spring, a young woman, her life cut short, her past and her identity a mystery. Only by finding out who she was could we ever hope to find her killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Elements Of Murder
programme.desc: There are several things that can suggest murder; jealousy, anger, poison. When everyday substances reveal hidden clues that break a homicide case, those substances become the elements of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly intentions
programme.desc: When abduction turns to murder, forensic science is the only key to finding justice for the victims of a kidnapper's deadly intentions.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Written In Bone
programme.desc: At the scene of a murder, sometimes the victim provides the only clues to their killer. Forensic anthropologists use skeletal remains to decipher the clues written in the bones.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Dead Men Do Talk
programme.desc: Profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts and the procedures they use to solve murders and other mysteries in minutes or centuries after they happen.

programme.title: The New Detectives: In The Line of Fire
programme.desc: Bombers, snipers, spree killers: some people don't care who they kill, they just want to hurt innocent people.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Final Session at Galleries of Justice
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team travel back in time to The Galleries of Justice in Nottingham. This was a one stop shop for justice where criminals were held awaiting trial.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Secret Nuclear Bunker
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate Hack Green Secret Nuclear Bunker in Nantwich. Something sinister and paranormal seems to be causing havoc inside of the building and tonight it unleashes powerful activity

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: The Evil Cook at The Shakespeare Pub
programme.desc: Sean explores The Shakespeare pub in Manchester and meets Flecky Bennett to investigate claims dating back hundreds of years, about an evil chef that is haunting the pub.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Thackray Medical Museum
programme.desc: Derek Acorah's The Past Hunters investigate Thackray Medical Museum, believed to one of Leeds most haunted buildings. Workers claim to have witnessed constant paranormal activity in the museum and one claim is that two Victorian ghosts are trapped...

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Witches and Vampires Haunting St James Cemetery
programme.desc: St James Cemetery is set behind Liverpool Cathedral and is claimed to be the worlds most haunted, with the remains of over 58,000 people buried at the location and multiple claims of paranormal sightings.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Liverpool's Secret Haunted Mansion
programme.desc: Bex and Sean delve deep into Woolton Hall, a derelict mansion in Liverpool. They appear to be forced out of the building by an unknown force and it takes its toll on one of the team members.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Is My Husband the Abuser?
programme.desc: Joyia is desperate to keep her friend Stephanie from going back to her problematic ex Scott. But she still loves him! Will she have the strength to leave him?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Outraged!
programme.desc: Jack is worried about his grandchildren because his daughter-in-law Carol has been negligent and hot-tempered. Then, Kendra explains why she suddenly put Corey’s baby up for adoption.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Murder My Daughter?
programme.desc: Teenager Megan lives with her older controlling boyfriend Rick. Megan cannot attend school, find a job, or even eat without his OK! Can her aunt and Steve get through to her?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Fake Your Pregnancies?
programme.desc: Dennis claims his ex-girlfriend Kendal keeps tied down with pregnancy lies! He wants to know if their daughter is even his! Will Steve’s DNA test results finally let them move on?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Results Revealed: Did She Cheat?
programme.desc: Justin is convinced that girlfriend Lainie has been cheating on him, and more importantly that he’s not the father of their child. But his own insecurities have led him to turn violent. Also, Steven doubts whether Ashley’s child is his.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Tragic Accident
programme.desc: Rebecca left her baby with fiancé James and his mother Adeline, only to discover that her baby was hospitalized. Rebecca suspects that James is responsible. Adeline blames her for the baby’s death!

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Officer Down
programme.desc: Sgt. Joe Kenda is faced with his worst nightmare when he learns a friend and fellow officer, Mark Dabling, has been killed in the line of duty.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bad Moon Rising
programme.desc: The night before Halloween, a real-life nightmare unfolds when a young man is found clinging to life. The case takes a dark turn when Lt. Joe Kenda learns there is a second victim somewhere in the woods.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Standoff
programme.desc: A disabled man is killed on the job, but Kenda’s case hits a roadblock when forensic evidence is scrubbed from the scene.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Point of No Return
programme.desc: When a mysterious explosion rocks a sleepy suburb, it’s up to Kenda to ID a pile of charred remains and find the killer who triggered the blast.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Murder Bites
programme.desc: A young woman is found naked and strangled in a park not 200 yards from her home. It isn’t until Lt. Joe Kenda rethinks the entire case that he realizes someone has been lying.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hidden Agenda
programme.desc: Across the Midwest, a band of armed robbers struck banks at the rate of nearly one per month. They attacked with lightning precision and lethal force. They were in and out in five minutes.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Small Town Terror
programme.desc: In a small Ohio community, an elderly woman and a teenaged boy disappeared. Because they vanished within hours of each other, police believed the cases were linked. But they didn't know how.

programme.title: The FBI Files: A Family Torn
programme.desc: The parents of 11 yr. old Brittany Martinez knew their daughter was no runaway. Something had happened to her, something terrible. When they failed to find Brittany in their quiet Illinois neighborhood, they called the police.

programme.title: Cops: Check Please!
programme.desc: Deputies confront an intoxicated man who threatened a restaurant owner. A man tells officers he can assault who he wants. Officers are called to an altercation over a sleeping bag and a backpack.

programme.title: Cops: Decorating Tips
programme.desc: Officers pursue an SUV on the freeway. Deputies are called when an agitated man armed with scissors tears up a trailer. A driver tells officers the illegal items found in his car was left by a friend.

programme.title: Cops: Hide and Go Porch
programme.desc: Officers engage in a car chase when they spot a possible robbery suspect. A man nicknamed "Danger" is tasered after assaulting several girls. Suspects bail from a vehicle and hide under a porch.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Mysterious Deaths of Tupac Shakur and Biggie Smalls
programme.desc: Ryan and Brent explore the theories surrounding the deaths of legends Tupac Shakur and Biggie Smalls.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Horrifying Murders of the Zodiac Killer
programme.desc: Join Ryan and Brent on the hunt for clues as they delve into the chilling mystery of the Zodiac Killer.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Mysterious Disappearance of the Sodder Children / The Odd Death of Michelle Von Emster
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane dive into the Sodder children's disappearance and the truth about the Micelle Von Emster case.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Terrifying Axeman of New Orleans
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane explore the spine-chilling tale of the mysterious Axeman Killer of New Orleans.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Mysterious Death of the Boy in the Box / The Bizarre Road Trip of a Missing Family
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane unravel the mystery of the Boy in the Box as well as the unsolved case of a missing family.

programme.title: Buzzfeed Unsolved: The Tragic Murder of JonBenét Ramsey / The Odd Vanishing of Amelia Earhart
programme.desc: Ryan and Shane discuss the JonBenét Ramsey case and the mystery in the disappearance of Amelia Earhart.

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories (Classics): Tom Arnold, Dee Snider, Carnie Wilson, Nia Long
programme.desc: Tom Arnold takes his teenage anger out on a pipe organ, angering a revengeful spirit; Dee Snider's murdered brother-in-law has a message from the grave.

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories (Classics): Lisa Rinna, Jeffrey Ross, Vincent Curatola, Illeana Douglas
programme.desc: Lisa Rinna's family is haunted by a lonely ghost seeking a family of her own; Vincent Curatola rediscovers his mother's love after she dies.

programme.title: Andromeda: Cui Bono
programme.desc: Bekas onkel løper for kontoret i New Commonwealth, men et attentat får mannskapet til å opptre som hans sikkerhet.

programme.title: Mutant X: Into the Moonless Night
programme.desc: I den spennende sesongåpningen kommer de overlevende medlemmene av Mutant X ut av en dødelig eksplosjon for å møte Lexa, som får dem til å begynne å stille spørsmål ved grunnleggende antagelser om deres verden.

programme.title: Mutant X: Wages of Sin
programme.desc: Mutant X-teamet må stoppe auksjonen av et sterkt dødelig stoff som flere beryktede internasjonale terrorister kjemper om å skaffe seg.

programme.title: Mutant X: The Breed
programme.desc: Mutant X-teamet blir hentet inn for å hjelpe en militærbase som har blitt smittet med en dødelig sykdom.

programme.title: Mutant X: Where Evil Dwell
programme.desc: Mutant X-teamet må stoppe en seriemorder som etterlater ledetråder til sine neste ofre i form av gåter.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Wages of Sydney
programme.desc: Quan Shu, Manchuria 1359 f.Kr.: Kineserne oppfinner et eksplosivt gaveegg. New York, 2001: En rival slår Sydney og Nigel til et kart som fører til Dragon's Egg.

programme.title: On the Case: Under Suspicion
programme.desc: When a 26 year old wife and mother vanishes, investigators wonder if she simply just ran away or if it was something far more sinister. The search for answers would take nearly a decade and lead her family on a dark journey they could never have imagined.

programme.title: On the Case: Solemn Vows
programme.desc: A mother finds her daughter savagely murdered inside their family owned wedding chapel.

programme.title: On the Case: One Month of Terror
programme.desc: After abducting a 17 year old girl in front of her home her kidnapper taunts the family with phone calls and disturbing letters. But a tiny mistake will eventually lead police to his door.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Suspension

programme.title: Cops: Blood and Scars, Bro!

programme.title: Cops: My Jewelry's Fragile
programme.desc: A cyclist tries to bolt when questioned by police, a deputy uses a cotton swab to procure evidence from a suspect's mouth, and an unmowed lawn triggers a domestic disturbance.

programme.title: Cops: Fast Food Escape
programme.desc: When officers approach, a suspect flees into a fast-food restaurant. A driver takes his granny's wheels for a dangerous spin with cops in pursuit. Sheriffs catch up to a man who fled the scene of a possible domestic battery.

programme.title: Cops: Late Night Snacks
programme.desc: Officers stop a fleeing vehicle, and a man with a warrant learns that a doughnut shop is not the best place to hide from the police.

programme.desc: A man resisting arrest sics his dogs on the police, and a recovering addict about to take his first hit in years wanders into the path of police in pursuit of another suspect.

programme.title: Cops: You Didn't Get Very Far
programme.desc: A man complains of heart trouble after running from police, a suspect in a stolen car leads officers on a wild chase, and police check on a disabled vehicle and its occupants.

programme.desc: On April 18th 2014, in Visé, Belgium, policemen are informed that gunshots had been fired on the street.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Audrey Jouannet Case

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Mysterious Murder at the Farm (Valerie Bary Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Triple Murders in Vise
programme.desc: On May 17th 2005, a body is discovered in a forest of Sucy-en-Brie; Christophe Belle, 40 years old, a renowned pastry cook.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 602
programme.desc: En regnfull morgen den 19. oktober 2004 dreper en ukjent mann en åtte år gammel gutt og en 56 år gammel kvinne i Linköping. Gjerningsmannen forsvinner sporløst og politiet må nå finne ut hvem han er.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 205
programme.desc: Etter meldinger om et rykende bål i Hafjell går drapsalarmen hos politiet på Lillehammer. På bålet viser det seg å ligge rester av et partert menneske. Samtidig meldes to personer savnet fra en bolig i nærheten.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 305

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 508
programme.desc: Etter en fest i juli 2017 forsvinner Tom Rune Hagen. Han har vært en del av et belastet rusmiljø, men akkurat denne uka har han planlagt en tur på fjellet for å fiske. Hva skjedde med Tom Rune?

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 601

programme.desc: Jessica Alba is an actress whose career checks every box, from big budget blockbusters to TV cult classics.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Charlie Day Learns to Love Ridiculously Spicy Wings
programme.desc: As he seeks to promote his new movie "Fist Fight", Charlie Day submits to hot wings.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Charlie Sloth Makes His Mum Proud Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: As part of the "Hot Ones" U.K. tour, we had to link up with "The People's Prince," Charlie Sloth.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: George Washington Carver rose from slavery to become one of the 20th century's greatest scientists; at Tuskegee Institute, he invented over 300 peanut uses, developed crop rotation, and changed rural economy through agricultural innovations.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: More than 50 years after its construction, the Golden Gate remains one of the world's great engineering marvels. It took 25-million man-hours and 80,000 miles of cable to complete; the cost in human life proved even greater.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Built of stone and glass, persistence and prayer, gothic cathedrals are an epiphany of imagination and an articulation of joy; featured are such masterpieces as Chartres, Notre Dame and the National Cathedral in Washington D.C.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Cutting, digging, picking, stripping, shaking, and raking--whatever the crop, there's a custom machine to harvest it; it all began with handpicking and today it's often one man and one machine harvesting hundreds of acres in a single day.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: America's orchards and farms balance hand labor with mechanization through efficient harvesting methods; explore orchard management, California's largest fruit packing house, Nebraska corn fields, Wisconsin cranberry marshes, and more.

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution: Surprising Beginnings
programme.desc: Tyske kommandører oppdager effektiviteten i å gasse fanger, og Auschwitz forvandles fra en liten bakgårdsleir for de som motarbeider den nazistiske okkupasjonen av Polen, til en storstilt utryddelsesleir for jøder.

programme.title: Secret War: Christine Granville
programme.desc: Christine Granville, aka Krystyna Skarbek, a brave SOE agent, secured the release of captured comrades from the Gestapo before Operation Dragoon, earning the George Medal.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Dutch Collaborator
programme.desc: Anton Adriaan Mussert, initially resisted Hitler’s anti-Semitism despite modeling his NSB party, even welcoming Jewish members. His failed attempt to kidnap Queen Wilhelmina led him into hiding, after which he collaborated in hopes of gaining power.

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution: Orders and Initiatives
programme.desc: Höss håndterer komplikasjoner som oppstår fra det midlertidige gaskammeret og økende etterspørsel ettersom nazistene begynner å feie hele Europa for flere mennesker å ta med til Auschwitz og drepe.

programme.title: Signs of Evil - The Runes of the SS
programme.desc: The symbol of the SS stands for terror and the murder of millions. Documentary about the history of a symbol that represents murder.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: iCarly: Rektor kampen
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Freddie får rektor Franklin sparket, overtar miss Briggs og mr. Howard ledelsen og innfører strenge regler. Og Spencer leier en gammel rodeostjerne til å lære ham å ri på en mekanisk okse.

programme.title: iCarly: iSpeed Date
programme.desc: Så mange gutter dukker opp til 'ta Carly med på fest'-konkurransen, at Carly, Sam og Freddie må benytte speed-dating for å møte dem alle sammen. Spencer følger et merkelig treningsprogram fra en ny app.

programme.title: iCarly: Stjernehjelp
programme.desc: Når Carly, Sam og Freddie skal lage en musikkvideo til en popstjernes comeback, oppdager de at popstjernen er ute av form og talentløs. Og Spencer oppdager at kvinnen han dater er Gibbys mor.

programme.title: iCarly: Livredderen
programme.desc: Når Freddie redder livet til Carly, forelsker Carly seg i ham. Sam og Spencer kjemper mot hverandre i et painball-spill som heter Assassin.

programme.title: iCarly: Lewberts tapte kjærlighet
programme.desc: Når gjengen oppdager at Lewbert engang var en lykkelig ung mann som var forlovet med en vakker kvinne, setter de seg fore å gjenforene det adskilte paret.

programme.title: iCarly: Missekonkurransen
programme.desc: Sam avslører overfor Carly og Freddie at hun deltok i skjønnhetskonkurranser som liten. Da hun finner ut at hennes rival skal konkurrere i Seattle, overbeviser hun Carly om å stille opp mot henne.

programme.title: iCarly: Vi avlyser ikke
programme.desc: Etter at Sam plutselig må i fengsel, lover Carly og Freddie dyrt og hellig å ikke avlyse nettshowet ettersom faren hennes skal se det. Carly ber Spencer om hjelp, men det blir vanskelig, for han skal på date.

programme.title: iCarly: Vi avlyser ikke
programme.desc: En eksentrisk millionær ber Carly og vennene hennes om å sende det første nettshowet fra det ytre rom, så de må prøves ut for en romreise. Imens besøker en merkelig liten pike Spencer hjemme i leiligheten.

programme.title: iCarly: Freddie flytter ut
programme.desc: Freddie bestemmer seg for å flytte ut av leiligheten sin etter at moren hans har gjort ham flau. Carly, Sam og Freddie starter et firma og spesialiserer seg på bilder av kjæledyr.

programme.title: iCarly: iBeat the Heat
programme.desc: Når en hetebølge rammer Seattle og strømmen går, kommer Spencer til unnsetning med et norsk klimaanlegg.

programme.title: iCarly: Tabber
programme.desc: De medvirkende introduserer bloopers og bortklipte scener fra serien.

programme.title: Totally Turtles
