programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.

programme.title: World of Love Island
programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.

programme.title: World of Love Island
programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 502
programme.desc: Pappa Roine og Mattias laster høyballer – men plutselig stopper hjullasteren. Linda leverer drinker rundt i Stockholm – og benytter anledningen til å besøke forloveden Magnus. Piraten legger asfalt.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 503
programme.desc: Biltransportøren Robin må være ekstra forsiktig når han skal frakte en dyr Lincoln på lasteplanet! Det samme gjelder Micke som skal kjøre et dyrt spabad til Uddevalla.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 504
programme.desc: Tove kjører tømmer i Småland – og møter fans midt i skogen. Slamsugeren Magnus skal tømme et basseng på et renseanlegg. Kranfører Amanda er på et vindkraftverk på Gotland – men risikerer å miste båten.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 505
programme.desc: Elin sparker dagen i gang i Stockholm med komplisert lossing og tidspress. Tim kjører etsende last – og han må derfor være ekstra forsiktig på veiene. Peo sliter med containerne sine i Åre.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 506
programme.desc: Vi følger yrkessjåførene som jobber døgnet rundt for å levere forskjellige typer av varer over hele landet - og for å utføre viktige samfunnstiltak som holder Sverige i gang, fra nord til sør.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 507
programme.desc: Vi følger yrkessjåførene som jobber døgnet rundt for å levere forskjellige typer av varer over hele landet - og for å utføre viktige samfunnstiltak som holder Sverige i gang, fra nord til sør.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Male model Tyson Beckford surprises the models at the house and gives them a lesson on being a spokesperson. Most pull off an impromptu sales pitch for their teacher, but a few have a hard time concentrating on their task.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: With the finale only six weeks away, never-before-seen footage includes Bianca’s confrontations with Chantal and Ebony, and Jenah chips her tooth.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Tyra surprises the girls and gives them an in-depth lesson about how to model in front of a moving camera. One model continues to get jealous and be very critical of her competition.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The models go to FIDM (Fashion Institute of Design and Merchandising) and are paired with a student designer to be their creative muse to design a dress.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: When the models arrive in China they are introduced to their new penthouse suite, and one model who is left without a place to sleep becomes very upset.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: A Toxic Situation
programme.desc: Treningsleirkandidatene holder pusten når den unike Kitty Carter besøker treningsleiren. Kitty holder ikke tilbake når hun skjeller ut så vel nybegynnere som veteraner.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: The Pressure Cooker
programme.desc: De siste jentene sendes snart hjem og noen som er i faresonen må lære seg den berømte DCC-entréen, men treningen øker ikke akkurat deres sjanser til å komme på laget.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Game Day
programme.desc: Jentene har en siste sjanse før deres skjebne avgjøres. Drømmer begynner å bli til virkelighet når jentene poserer for lagbildet. Det bys på fantastisk dans når show-gruppen og resten av troppen opptrer for første gang.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: The Journey Begins
programme.desc: Følg med og se hvem som kommer til å klare de vanskeligste danseuttakene i sportsverdenen. 500 kvinner satser alt for drømmen om å bli en av de berømte Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders for 2014-2015-sesongen.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Dancing For Your Life
programme.desc: 55 jenter i toppklasse har kommet seg til finalen, noe som bekymrer de 30 veteranene som nå må kjempe for en plass i troppen. Kitty Carter holder ikke tilbake når hun forbereder jentene på å danse sine soloer.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Welcome to Valley Ranch
programme.desc: Når treningsleiren åpner med 43 kvinner, blir presset stort! Kellis entusiasme er smittsom, men det første møtet er også opprørende. Forventningene er skyhøye. Syv jenter må eliminieres for at troppen skal bestå av 36.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 2
programme.desc: At Barnsley Hospital the department is facing a big change, eight new junior doctors have joined the close-knit team. Sister Jane Hawksworth explains ‘twice a year, new doctors come into the department all fresh and unexpecting…'

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 3
programme.desc: Paramedics bring in 59-year-old Wendy with a critical heart condition and there’s a complication, she has kidney failure and needs dialysis three times a week.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 4
programme.desc: Advanced Nurse Practitioner Cheryl Barnes answers the red phone and heads to resus. ‘When that red phone rings it gives you a bit of an adrenaline rush, but I don’t think that’s a bad thing.’

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 5
programme.desc: Battling to keep the flow of patients moving is Sister Jane Hawksworth but she’s got a problem. They’re two porters down and it’s causing a backlog, but the emergencies keep arriving.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 6
programme.desc: We spend an eventful night shift with Barnsley Hospital’s Casualty team. Evenings are a peak time for road traffic collisions and the most critical cases are blue lit straight to Casualty.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 10
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Linda and husband Andy from Bedau in South Wales whose house is overrun with animals and hasn’t been cleaned in 4 years.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 11
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Joanna from Birmingham, whose 2-bedroom flat is overflowing with possessions. Joanna works two jobs, leaving her no time to look after her home.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 1
programme.desc: In the picturesque city of Bath, Paul’s cottage is bursting at the seams with a lifetime’s collection of junk. Known locally as ‘boot cottage’ - because everything Paul owns and wears comes from car boot sales - every room is a no-go zone.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 2
programme.desc: In Harlow, 63-year-old Bubbles’ high-rise flat is packed with piles of junk she can’t bear to throw away. But it doesn’t end there she also has a staggering 4 lock ups stuffed to the gills with rubbish.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 3
programme.desc: In Mansfield Sue’s hoard is driving her family and grandchildren away and her husband Neil to distraction. Every room is crammed with clutter including a bedroom that looks more like a dolls graveyard than somewhere to sleep.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 4
programme.desc: In Liverpool, the Bells are a family at war over hoarding. Mum Betty and son Richard are happy to live in their mess, but son in law Keith is determined that things must change. Can they change the habit of a lifetime and part with their possessions?

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 8
programme.desc: In the North East at Alpha Recovery, Kevin is faced with a real challenge. Crouch driver Abang has to save a sportscar that's gone off the road. Lanterns Merrie has a surprise for a Trucking Hell superfan and Aidan is faced with a busted bus.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 9
programme.desc: An Artic has come off the carriageway so Crouch sends in the big hitters. Alpha's Aidan is with a bus which has stopped near a school. Merrie must risk life and limb to rescue a coach and Lantern op Sean dices with death on a notorious road.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 10
programme.desc: On the Moors, a 50 ton construction machine has landed in a stream. The team at Alpha faces a dangerous two-day rescue. On The M1, Lantern's Bohdan rescues a stranded 44-ton artic and Stuart is called to the A34 to rescue a broken-down bus.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 11
programme.desc: On a remote track in the Yorkshire Dales, Kev and his fellow Alpha recovery ops are in the midst of one of their toughest rescue missions in years.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 12
programme.desc: On the busy A1 halfway between Newcastle and Durham an artic has veered into a 6-foot Armco roadside barrier, propelling it into the air and down a 20-metre embankment.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 13
programme.desc: In Hertfordshire Lantern Recovery op Sean has been sent to tackle a telehandler that's flipped over in the back of a very muddy garden. To make matters worse, the boom arm is extended and there are trees covering the site.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Bella & Jordan
programme.desc: “Bella Angel” is a devil in disguise. She bites anyone who comes near the house or the family. Jordan, an English Bulldog, jumps up and down, licks people incessantly and is obsessed by skateboards.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Sunshine & Teddy
programme.desc: Sunshine is a champion Doberman in the show ring but far too aggressive in the street. Teddy, a yellow lab, has bitten its owner twice, and has attacked more than one stranger.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Goldie & Pepsi
programme.desc: Pepsi, a German Shepherd, becomes intensely aggressive around cats. Goldie, the beautiful Brittany Spaniel of “General Hospital” star Jacklyn Zeman that has become aggressive towards female dogs.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Nicki
programme.desc: Nicky, a 4-year old black Rottweiler, suffered terribly in his youth. His new owner has given him a loving home. However, there are a few old habits he can’t shake, including dog aggression.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Percy & Justice
programme.desc: Percy, a West Highland White Terrier, is a handful, biting anyone who tries to touch his hindquarters. Justice, a Pit Bull, is slowly escalating toward dangerous aggression.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Stewart & Buddy
programme.desc: Stewart, a Chow/Golden Retriever mix, barks and growls at and seems to be fearful and aggressive toward children. Every time Johnny turns on the hose, Buddy the Beagle runs for the house.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Lucy & Lizzie
programme.desc: Lucy the Dalmatian snarls at larger dogs then turns in circles and attacks her own tail. Lizzie, a Red Tick Elizabethan Beagle, is obsessed with running, inside or outside.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Sophie & Daisy
programme.desc: Sophie, a Sheltie-Golden nix, tries to nip at the heels of her owner’s horse. Daisy has an annoying problem – she tries to “hump” various members of the Benda family.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Boyfriend & Alfie
programme.desc: “Boyfriend” is a Shephard mix that has repeatedly bitten his owner’s boyfriend. Alfie is the aggressive English Bulldog of popular actress/television host Daisy Fuentes.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 27
programme.desc: A pregnant Diane is betrayed by her boyfriend. Follow up with Kimberly Woodward.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 28
programme.desc: Jacob is a newlywed with anxiety about his new bride's fidelity. Follow up with Jennifer Peterson.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 29
programme.desc: Donna discovers her husband Clarence is up to his old tricks again. Follow up with Prince Slater.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 30
programme.desc: Miguel catches his girlfriend with an old flame. Follow up with Wes Cash.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 31
programme.desc: Monica fears her girlfriend shares time and affection with someone else. Follow up with Steven Hoffner.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 32
programme.desc: Sue gets to the bottom of Eddy's lies once and for all. Follow up with Justin Sandler.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 33
programme.desc: Taylor discovers her boyfriend gets up close and personal with a new friend. Follow up with Marsha Johnson.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 34
programme.desc: On this episode, Andy Wilkens ends his relationship by destroying her furniture. Follow up with Lily Renaldo.

programme.title: Cheaters: Episode 35
programme.desc: Judith Hughes ends her marriage of six years. Follow up with Joel "Doggie" Hines.

programme.title: Jade Fever

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Dårlige bremser, slitte nerver og vanskelige kjøreforhold får Claudia til å tvile på om mannskapet klarer å frakte den store sovebrakken til leiren i ett sett.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Claudia og teamet er fast bestemt på å fortsette gruvedriften til tross for skogbranner som herjer rundt området deres, inntil situasjonen forverres og de må evakuere.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Etter å ha mistet to ukers gruvedrift til skogbrannene tar Claudia og Robin risikoen med å returnere til Two Mile for å åpne en ny gruve.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Claudia stresser med å få klargjøre den beste jaden klar for kjøpere, mens mannskapets moral blir testet når de kjemper mot kulden og endelig begynner å skjære opp 90 tonns steinen.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Claudia gjør alt i sin makt for å selge til potensielle kjøpere, mens oppe i gruven sliter Guy og Gary med sesongens første snøstorm.

programme.desc: Claudia presser mannskapet til å fortsette gruvedriften til tross for frysetemperaturer og stadig vanskeligere veiforhold.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Claudias sesong starter med et smell da hun mottar en ordre på $250,000 for en jade.

programme.title: The Canton Godfather NO
programme.desc: Wah vet knapt ordet av det før han har blitt fralurt pengene sine. Han legger de siste slantene på en rose fra en blomsterhandler som mener at blomstene hennes fører med seg lykke og velstand. Og riktig nok ser Wah snart at flaksen har snudd.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles II: The Secret of the Ooze NO
programme.desc: Skilpaddene tror at deres fiende Shredder er død etter at han falt i søppelknuseren i slutten av forrige film. Fotklanen har fått vite om deres gjemmested i kloakken og derfor bor de midlertidig hos journalisten April.

programme.title: The Killer Meteors NO
programme.desc: Hua Wu Bin blir kalt The Killer Meteor takket være hans unike hemmelige kampkunster, som har gjort ham til en helt i hjemtraktene. Når en adelsmann blir forgiftet av sin kone, blir Hua leid inn for å få tak i en kur og beseire henne.

programme.title: The Hills: New Beginnings: Timing Is Everything
programme.desc: Kaitlynn knekker nyheten om sin graviditet til Brody, men er urolig når han og Kris skal møtes på fristedet. Pratt- og Wahler-gjengen håndterer endelig feiden som har delt gruppen. Justin får lære viktigheten av å vedlikeholde kontakter.

programme.title: The Hills: New City, New Drama
programme.desc: Når Lauren Conrad må mestre både moteskolen, en krevende praktikantjobb og en uforutsigbar romkamerat som ødelegger for henne, forstår hun raskt at alt er stort i Los Angeles, også hennes egne problemer.

programme.title: The Hills: A Change of Plans
programme.desc: Når Heidi fikser et intervju for drømmejobben som får henne til å overveie å hoppe av skolen permanent, forstår Lauren at hun og Heidi kanskje har helt forskjellige mål.

programme.title: The Hills: An Unexpected Call
programme.desc: Teen Vogue sender Lauren på et oppdrag til New York City, men vel tilbake i L.A. venter det henne en stor overraskelse fra fortiden. Heidi skjønner at å jobbe med festreklamering ikke bare er en fest.

programme.title: The Hills: Lauren and Jason: Part 2
programme.desc: Da Jason, Laurens eksflamme fra Laguna Beach, dukker opp igjen i livet hennes, forstår hun at hun kanskje ikke er så ferdig med ham som hun trodde. Samtidig, i sin nye jobb, spør Heidi seg om det egentlig er verdt alt strevet.

programme.title: The Hills: Jason's Birthday
programme.desc: Lauren haster hjem fra en lang Teen Vogue-event for å være sammen med Jason på bursdagen hans, men kvelden blir ikke som forventet. Audrina ber Heidi om råd rundt hennes nyeste date, modellen og skuespilleren Danny.

programme.title: The Hills: Boyfriends and Work Don't Mix
programme.desc: Jason utvikler seg til å bli et forstyrrende moment i Laurens profesjonelle og akademiske liv. Heidi får endelig mulighet til å jobbe i nattklubbene, men tidspunktet kunne ikke ha vært dårligere.

programme.title: The Hills: Somebody Always Has to Cry
programme.desc: Det er gjengens første ferie i L.A. og ikke alle får det de ønsket seg. Et nyttårskyss skal vise seg å bli litt av en oppgave for Lauren, når Jason finner ut at hun fikk en uventet telefon fra en gammel flamme.

programme.title: The Hills: You Can't Just Be With Me?
programme.desc: Jason vil gjerne gjøre Laurens 20-årsdag spesiell, men når hun lyver for ham angående en jobb med mannelige modeller for et Teen Vogue-oppdrag, settes forholdet deres på prøve.

programme.title: The Hills: Love is Not a Maybe Thing
programme.desc: Heidi bestemmer endelig at hun har opplevd nok dramatikk med Jordan. Lauren og Jason tenker på å gå et hakk videre.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: The Final Crush
programme.desc: Deltakerne må håndtere resultatene av løgndetektortestene sine. De må nå ta den ultimate avgjørelsen: Skal de dra hjem med ekskjæresten, den neste kjæresten eller alene?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach US: Reunion
programme.desc: Singler og ekser gjenforenes for første gang siden den enedelige crush-seremonien. Ashley Iaconetti og Jared Haibon er programledere. Vi finner ut hvilke par som stadig er i hvetebrødsfasen, som har slått opp eller har glidd tilbake i eksens seng.

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Body SOS: Paige & Sam
programme.desc: Paige vil ikke bestemme bryllupsdato før hun kvitter seg med noen kilo, og Sam vil bli veltrent for å kunne bli modell. Rekker de å forvandle seg før de må vise seg frem i Ex on the Beach?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Body SOS: Jourdan & Liam
programme.desc: Jourdan vil gå ned i vekt for å gjenoppdage Beyoncé-kurvene sine og Liam vil bli veltrent for å kunne bli skuespiller. Rekker de å forvandle seg før de skal vise seg fram i Ex on the Beach?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Body SOS: Deano & Paris
programme.desc: Deano er desperat etter å bli kvitt mannebrystene og bli like veltrent som kompisene, og kanskje få seg date. Paris øsker å temme kurvene og få tilbake selvtilliten. Men vil de klare forandringene før deres Ex on the Beach-avsløring?

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Body SOS: Becci & Kieran
programme.desc: Becci er lei av å være den tjukke søsteren og vil gå ned i vekt. Kieran er lei av å være liten og vil legge på seg. Vil de klare endringene før de må vise frem alt i 'Ex on the Beach'-avsløringen?

programme.title: Are You The One?: You Were The One
programme.desc: Etter uker med diskusjon om hvordan finne sine utvalgte, går singlene sammen og gjør et djervt forsøk på å finne ekte kjærlighet.

programme.title: Are You The One?: You Can't Handle the Truth
programme.desc: 10 single kvinner og 10 single menn skal tilbringe en måned sammen mens de finner ut hvem som passer sammen. Klarer de det, vil de dele den største prissummen i MTVs historie - en million dollar.

programme.title: Are You The One?: The Temptation of Chris T
programme.desc: Chris T risikerer hele premien på en million dollar fordi han ikke kan gi slipp på Shanley, og når Ryans dagbøker forsvinner, søker han trøst hos Kayla - som i sin tur søker trøst hos Wes.

programme.title: Are You The One?: A Real 'G'
programme.desc: Spenningen eksploderer mellom Jacy og Simone ettersom begge jentene kjemper om Johns følelser. Ting blir hett når Brittany og Adam tar en tur til Boom-Boom Room. Utfordringen avslører pinlige hemmeligheter om jentenes gamle vaner.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Karma's a Bitch
programme.desc: I utfordringen avslører guttas ekskjærester saker og ting og overnatter i huset. Brittany har vanskelig for å akseptere at Adam ikke er interessert, og Coleysia og Ashleigh fyrer opp under romantikken.

programme.title: Are You The One?: Double Shot
programme.desc: Det er spent mellom John og Simone. Kayla blir interessert i Wes igjen, men hun holder fortsatt på Ryan. Gjengen blir i godt humør når de får sende to par til sannhetsboksen etter fosskonkurransen.

programme.desc: The remaining 14 chefs battle in the competition.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Preparing breakfast for 50 paramedics is the challenge facing the contestants, with the first group to complete service winning.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The winners of the challenge, to create a perfect ravioli dish, will win a helicopter tour of the Pacific coast and a day of golfing.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: A day at Knott's Berry Farm is the prize for the team who's tasting menu for a `Hell's Kitchen' prom wins over the judges.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Ramsay challenges the contestants' creativity by asking them to make an innovative and delicious entree salad.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The contestants must name the ingredients that are labelled on a spinning roulette wheel. Chef Ramsay then asks them to prepare dishes using the ingredients that they named.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Undercover
programme.desc: Walker og Trent Malloy frykter for livet til deres gode venn, etterforsker Carlos Sandoval, når han går undercover som narkolanger og lederne for narkooperasjonen avslører hvem han er.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Hverdagshelter
programme.desc: Når en skambanket kvinne gir myndighetene informasjon om ektemannens narkotikafremstilling, må Walker beskytte henne fra ektemannens vrede.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Krigere
programme.desc: En bioingeniør, som har oppdaget et avansert DNA som kan sette en stopper for alle genetiske sykdommer, blir kidnappet av medlemmer av et nådeløst komplott.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Angel
programme.desc: Ranger Trivette gjenopptar forholdet til en tidligere flamme, Angel, men finner ut at hun nå er en profesjonell leiemorder som har satt ham i stor fare.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Vinterens sjel
programme.desc: Walker er fast bestemt på å felle Sons of the Reich, en hvitmaktgruppe han tror står bak drapet på en ung gutt foran vennens kirke, noe som skapte stor frykt i nabolaget.

programme.title: Walker Texas Ranger: Livets sirkel
programme.desc: Walker etterforsker en rekke ran som leder ham til en overgangsbolig for straffedømte som er ute på prøve, og en av dem viser seg å være ektemannen til en nær venn.

programme.title: MTV Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek styrer serien, som inneholder klipp fra nettet, samt har kjendisgjester og medprogramledere som Sterling «Steelo», Madison Beer og danske Nina Agdal. Nye episoder hver onsdag.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Tanned Triangle
programme.desc: Snooki føler seg fortsatt utstøtt og vurderer å reise sin vei. Første kveld på klubben blir flørtete, så kjærestene hjemme har kanskje grunn til bekymring. Et trekantdrama truer med å splitte huset.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Good Riddance
programme.desc: Trekanten blir mer intens når Ronnie tar Sammy i å gi nummeret sitt til en annen gutt. En deltaker velger å forlate The Shore for godt.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Destiny's Child, Taylor Hawkins, P.O.D.
programme.desc: Featuring the homes of P.O.D., Destiny's Child and Taylor Hawkins with Chad Smith.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Snoop Dogg, Jeremy Popoff, Silkk The Shocker
programme.desc: Featuring the homes of Snoop Dogg, LIT and Silkk the Shocker.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Pamela Anderson, K - CI, Jojo
programme.desc: Starting in sunny Southern California, Cribs pays a visit to Pamela Anderson's spectacular beach-front home.

programme.title: MTV Cribs: Moby, Xzibit, Brett Michaels
programme.desc: Featuring the homes of Moby, Bret Michaels and Xzibit.

programme.title: Made: Mixed Martial Artists
programme.desc: Sabrina and Jenna are best friends and the biggest girly girls in their school. They want to shed their spoiled images and be MADE into tough, disciplined Mixed Martial Artists.

programme.title: Made: Boxer
programme.desc: Cheerleading princess Erin wants to get tough by becoming a burley boxer. Can boxing trainer Kenny Porter get Erin ready to fight in the showcase of the stars in just 5 weeks?

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Double Dead
programme.desc: Gangsters running a loan-shark racket in Hawaii short-circuit the IMF team's investigation when they capture Willy and feed him gigantic doses of truth serum.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Casino
programme.desc: Guest star Jack Cassidy is Orin Kerr, an ex-hoodlum who now controls the largest gambling resort in the western hemisphere as a front for the underworld crime syndicate.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Trapped
programme.desc: Jim Phelps is struck on the head and loses his memory while trying to intercept an eight-million-dollar smuggling operation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Break!
programme.desc: Carl Betz, Barbara Anderson, and Robert Conrad guest star alongside Jim Phelps who, with the aid of Barney's electronic wizardry, takes on the guise of a hot-shot pool hustler to break up an illegal gambling operation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Two Thousand
programme.desc: Joe Collins is a nuclear scientist who is made to believe that he is a prisoner in the year 2000 and is about to be executed as part of the IMF's plans to learn where he has hidden enough plutonium to construct a dozen atomic bombs.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 404
programme.desc: Ida og Rasmus drømmer om å bytte ut sine lille leiebolig på Nørrebro med en murervilla i Hillerød. Men de angrer bittert på at de har spurt ekspertene om hjelp når de får se huset pengene gikk til.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 405
programme.desc: Anna Thora og Jonas har to små barn - og en drøm om å bo sammen med besteforeldrene. Så ekspertene leter etter et hus som har plass til to familier, med plass til alle og deres behov.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 406
programme.desc: Anne Sofie og Paw har ikke nok plass i den lille Frederiksberg-leiligheten etter en familieøkning. Men kravene til drømmehuset er store, så selv med 7 millioner finner de ikke det de er ute etter.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 501
programme.desc: Louise og Jonas fra Viborg drømmer stort, men drømmen faller i bakken med et brak. Ekspertene må jobbe hardt før den lille familien - forhåpentligvis - kan flytte inn i drømmehuset.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Bergen
programme.desc: Surrounded by some of the most beautiful landscapes in northern Europe, Bergen has become a centre for the finest seafood in northern Europe. Tareq heads into this winter wonderland to see the curious cuisine that has developed in western Norway.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: The Faroe Islands
programme.desc: Tareq comes to understand what is in the soul of the Faroese, and why their cuisine has developed the way it has. We explore the beautiful capital Torshavn and surrounding villages, and sail into a cave for a recipe prepared on a rowboat.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Central Jutland
programme.desc: Volcanoes and glaciers shaped this part of the country, leaving a giant fjord and pre-historic fossils in their wake. Farmers and food innovators work closely with nature to prepare food with the area’s plentiful herbs and award-winning seafood.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Åland (Part 2)
programme.desc: Tareq goes back to Åland to explore more of this island territory. Tareq finds a chef setting up a huge food village, sees forts left over from various invaders over the centuries, and learns about beer being recreated from 200 year old DNA.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Tornedalen
programme.desc: There are not many places like Tornedalen. A rushing river has provided for locals for centuries, and the very fertile land has yielded amazing crops for centuries.Tareq explores the traditions and the food that are part of the short summer season.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: North Jutland
programme.desc: At the northern-most part of Denmark, you are always close to raw, beautiful nature, and incredible sunlight that has drawn artists here for over 100 years. Tareq visits a salt maker using medieval techniques and experiences the magic light of Skagen.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: East Denmark
programme.desc: East Denmark contains some of Denmark’s most fertile lands, and many traditional farmers are converting to organic production and winning awards for their cheeses and wine. Tareq bikes through an area of limestone cliffs and Viking ships.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Kristianstad
programme.desc: Located in Sweden’s south, beautiful Kristianstad is a 400-year old town surrounded by the ocean, fertile farmland and protected wetlands to aid the environment. Tareq makes his own chocolate and learns all about the art of eel-fishing.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Get This Party Started!
programme.desc: Geordierne er spente på å komme tilbake til huset og de føeste er single. De ønsker to nykommere, Amelia og Ant velkomne, og viser dem hvordan de fester. Alt er kos og moro helt til Nathan og Beau kommer nære hverandre. Alt for nære for Bethan.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Family Friction!
programme.desc: Gjengen gleder seg over å bli kjent med nykommerne. Arbeidet tar en vri da Anna sender dem for å levere en unnskyldning fra en festløve. Og alt tar av da Chloe ignorerer Nathans råd om å komme for nære den nye gutten, Ant.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: It's Fright Night!
programme.desc: Chloe føler mindre for Ant, men han tror han har sjans etter at hun lot ham være i senga si. Gjengen blir skremt sanseløse av en tur i skogen fredag kveld. Abbie og Chloe tvinges til å snakke sammen for første gang på lenge.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Hello New Lad!
programme.desc: Den nye gutten, Louis, blir med i med gjengen og påvirker. Chloe faller for sjarmen hans, noe som får nesa til Ant ut av ledd. Gjengen har en vill fest og Ant konfronterer Chloe om at hun glodde. Bethan sier til Beau at hun trenger mer oppmerksomhet.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Big Mistake!
programme.desc: Louis er på Chloe for at hun skal be Ant om unskyldning. Så hun hopper opp i Ants seng og de råkliner. En stor feil! Beau og Bethan hae en åpenhjertig prat, og blir enige om at dagen er for venner og natten for dem. Beau blir full og ødelegger.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: See Ya, Nat!
programme.desc: Nat har ikke følt seg som seg selv og vil fjerne eksens tatovering. Men etter en masse selvransakelse bestemmer hun seg for å dra for godt. Beau og Bethan er på bristepunktet og har en anspent samtale om fremtiden.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Truth Will Set You Free
programme.desc: Mike klarer ikke å vente lenger med å avsløre 'sannheten' for Snookis kjæreste. Pauly, Vinny og Deena synes det er vanskelig å være de single i huset.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: One Meatball Stands Alone
programme.desc: Da Mike forteller Jionni om ham og Snooki, blir det bråk. Deena må takle sannheten om Joey. Noen fra huset drar på camping, mens Vinny og Pauly drar den største spøken i hele Shore-historien!

programme.title: Jersey Shore: After Hours 502
programme.desc: Her møtes Mike, Snooki, Pauly og Deena og snakker om å komme tilbake til Seaside Heights, og om Vinnys hjemlengsel. Og når gjengen gjennomgår dramatikken mellom Mike og Snooki, heiter det seg til en smule.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: After Hours 504
programme.desc: Vi møter Mike, Vinny og Deena som snakker om da Vinny kom tilbake til strandhuset, om Mikes forhold til Paula og Paulys forhold til...vel, alle andre. Og vi får en snikkikk på neste episode!

programme.title: Jersey Shore: After Hours 507
programme.desc: Det er damenes aften og Jenni, Sammi, Snooki og Deena skravler om Jennis kjærlighetstrøbbel med Roger, om kjøttbollegreier og Guidette-problemer. Og vi får en snikkikk på hva vi har i vente.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Gym, Tan, Look Back
programme.desc: Jerseygjengen tar et tilbakeblikk på sin reise sammen de siste tre årene. Amerikas yndlingssamboere forteller i intervjuer sine unike historier om uforglemmelige øyeblikk. Og en sniktitt på sesong 6 er med.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Once More Unto the Beach
programme.desc: Alle kommer til strandhuset en siste gang. The Situation forteller ærlig om rehabiliteringen og Snooki må møte den utfordringen det er å være gravid i et hus skapt for festing og moro.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Masques
programme.desc: Free to walk the streets openly on Halloween, Vincent becomes the guardian of an Irish peace activist who's been targeted for assassination.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Beast Within
programme.desc: Vincent must choose loyalties when a childhood friend becomes a mob enforcer.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Nor Iron Bars a Cage
programme.desc: Accidentally caught on film, Vincent become the target of a scientist desperate to learn the truth about him.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Song of Orpheus
programme.desc: When Father ventures to the Above World for the first time in decades, he is arrested for murder. Vincent and Catherine must delve into Father's mysterious past to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Dark Spirit
programme.desc: Investigating a mysterious death makes Catherine the target of a voodoo cult.

programme.title: JAG: Defensive Action
programme.desc: A patrolling F-14 malfunctions in a no-fly zone; the crew ejects, and the bird explodes.

programme.title: JAG: Boot
programme.desc: A woman Marine recruit dies at Parris Island. Harm investigates while Meg poses undercover as a recruit.

programme.title: JAG: The Brotherhood
programme.desc: During a landing exercise Marines find a beaten, comatose fellow Marine on the beach

programme.title: JAG: Hemlock
programme.desc: By mistake a foreign agent sends a fax to Meg's office; then he retrieves it and shoots Meg to prevent her from identifying him

programme.title: JAG: High Ground
programme.desc: A Marine sniper receives orders contrary to a previous deal; his CO refuses to listen; the sniper takes a shot at the CO's Humvee.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Bugged / Eye Of The Beholder / Lady From Sunshine Gardens
programme.desc: A nudist (Barbi Benton) gets help from an attorney (Peter Haskell) when she wants to bare it all on board.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Two For Julie / Aunt Hilly / The Duel
programme.desc: Academy Award-winning actress Olivia de Havilland stars as the captain's aunt, who may take away his daughter, Vicki, when she boards with her husband (Joseph Cotten).

programme.title: The Love Boat: Love With A Skinny Stranger / Vicki And The Gambler / That Old Gang Of Mine
programme.desc: Capt. Stubing becomes concerned about his daughter, Vicki, when his gambler friend (Gene Barry) has her calling the long shots.

programme.title: The Love Boat: A Model Marriage, Part 2
programme.desc: Dazzling high fashion, romance, intrigue, and comedy reign on beautiful seas as the Love Boat sails with a star-studded guest cast on a thrilling cruise to Acapulco.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Lost And Found / Then There Were Two / Maid For Each Other
programme.desc: Gopher's wealthy aunt (Jane Powell) meets a wealthy man (Howard Keel) and is afraid someone may discover her heartbreaking secret.

programme.title: Happy Days: Sight for Sore Eyes
programme.desc: After reading too many foreign car manuals, Fonzie is plagued with headaches and is forced to wear glasses for a few weeks, but fears glasses aren't cool.

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonzie Loves Pinky Part II
programme.desc: The Malachi brothers sabotage Pinky's car the night before the demolition derby.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Physical
programme.desc: A short-tempered sergeant loses his tenuous grasp on discipline when the Fonz reports to the army recruitment center soon after draftees Richie, Ralph and Potsie check in for physicals.

programme.title: Happy Days: The Apartment
programme.desc: Personality quirks begin to fray nerves after best friends Richie, Ralph, and Potsie rent an apartment together.

programme.title: Happy Days: Hard Cover
programme.desc: Richie and Fonzie must think fast to outwit a tough housemother after they're caught past curfew in the college girls' dormitory.

programme.title: Happy Days: Hollywood Part 2
programme.desc: Soon after getting the bad news that the studio deemed his James Dean impression obsolete, and gave Richie's wholesome good looks a contract instead, the Fonz finds a bigger fish to fry.

programme.title: Happy Days: Hollywood Part 3
programme.desc: Richie must choose either a 5-year Hollywood contract or college in Milwaukee while the Fonz accepts the California Kid's challenge to perform a dangerous water ski jump...over a shark!

programme.title: Happy Days: Fonsilectomy
programme.desc: Forced to spend the night in the hospital's children's ward, Fonzie worries more about who will be making time with his girl at the Halloween party than the tonsillectomy he's scheduled for the next morning.

programme.title: Happy Days: My Cousin the Cheat
programme.desc: Fonzie is furious with his rebellious cousin, Chachi Arcola, after Chachi cheats on a school test using answers stolen from a tutoring session with Joanie Cunningham.

programme.title: MacGyver: Final Approach
programme.desc: When their plane crashes in the wilderness, MacGyver and four teenage gang leaders struggle for survival.

programme.title: MacGyver: Jack of Lies
programme.desc: When MacGyver agrees to bail out an old buddy, he winds up on a rescue mission in Central America to save another old buddy from drug smugglers.

programme.title: MacGyver: The Road Not Taken
programme.desc: MacGyver and Pete Thornton travel to Southeast Asia to rescue a group of orphans, a nun, and Mac's old flame, Debra Easton, whose lives are threatened by an oppressive regime.

programme.title: MacGyver: Silent World
programme.desc: MacGyver and a deaf school teacher, Carrie Linden, live out a nightmare when they stumble upon an ex-CIA agent's ingenious plan to steal a missile, piece by piece, and sell it on the black market.

programme.title: MacGyver: Three for the Road
programme.desc: MacGyver battles the mob while protecting an elderly couple who have unwittingly become mixed up in a syndicate counterfeiting operation.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Ta frem bestikket! Fire fremmede konkurrerer om penger og tittelen som den ultimate vert for middagsselskapet, følg med for en spicy konkurranse.

programme.title: Matlock: The Abduction
programme.desc: While attending a UCLA Law seminar, Matlock and Michelle end up in a dangerous dilemma. After giving Matlock inside information regarding an upcoming hit his former law school classmate is involved in a fatal hit and run.

programme.title: Matlock: Mr. Awesome
programme.desc: Matlock defends Anne Johnson, a single mother who’s been accused of murdering her recently estranged boyfriend.

programme.title: Matlock: The Evening News (Part 1)
programme.desc: A phony story is planted on the nightly news when a corrupt land developer pays off the on-air talent but when the producer fakes his own death, the anchorwoman unwittingly helps him along, never realizing it’s somebody else she killed.

programme.title: Matlock: The Evening News (Part 2)
programme.desc: Hired to defend an innocent newscaster, Matlock is baffled until evidence turns up that puts him on the trail of the real killer.

programme.title: Matlock: The Assassination (Part 1)
programme.desc: Matlock’s daughter’s surprise visit home is interrupted when a judge, on a Blue Ribbon panel investigating the assassination of the town Mayor, is accused of sexual assault and seeks Matlock’s counsel.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mike Connors reprises his former role as tough-guy PI Joe Mannix, who gets assistance from Dr. Sloan to tackle an unsolved 1973 murder case.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: The investigation of a country star's murder revolves around a driven TV producer (Barbara Mandrell) and her daughter, a timid songwriter.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A psychiatrist murders his estranged wife and frames a patient for the crime.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A sultry but sinister pharmaceutical rep is dead set on winning the heart of the hospital's chief of staff.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A beach boy involved with a gang member's sister is a suspect in his murder.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Følg med huseiere når de tar valget om å endre livsstilen sin og bytte ut bylivet med det rolige livet på landet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Hollywood Shore
programme.desc: Vinny innser at hjemme alltid er best. Mike bytter Prosciutto med placenta. Og et rykte skaper brudulje under jentenes store tur til Vestkysten.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Meatballs Don't Hike
programme.desc: Jentenes Hollywood-tur får en omvei når de får høre at Vinny har solgt huset sitt. Men før alle drar gir Vinny dem en L-A-opplevelse de alltid kommer til å huske, men kanskje vil glemme på grunn av all krangel mellom Angelina og Vinny.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Two Baptisms and a Pet Psychic
programme.desc: Pauly D skal til Jersey under uken og alle skal få treffe lille Romeo. Samtidig trenger Angelina klarhet om ekteskapet, og tar hjelp av et dyremedium. Situation gjør seg klar for en 'Blessification'.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Blessification
programme.desc: Mike føler seg gjenfødt etter å ha blitt 'blessified'. Angelina føler seg fortapt etter en seanse med et dyremedium. Og gjengen gjør seg klar for neste familieferie.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Not-So-International Vacation
programme.desc: Gjengen legger ut på en familieferie, hvor Mike får en geografitime, Jenni får en stor overraskelse og en uventet konflikt dukker opp.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Deenas hevn.
programme.desc: Pauly D får lære å spille bingo, Angelina går under uten bagasjen sin, Mike etterforsker og en alarmerende oppdagelse ryster gjengen.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Chen squares off against Munetaka Takahashi, a rising star from Kyoto, in an all-out battle of bamboo shoots.

programme.title: Iron Chef

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXXII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' holder Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Karrueche Tran trygg avstand til 'Kanonballknusere', bommer på svingslagforsøk med 'Luftslag' og forbløffes av folk som beveger seg så smidig at 'Det kan være magi'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' er Rob, Steelo og Rocsi Diaz ute og henger med noen 'Kule utkastere', feirer folk med hodeskaller av stål i 'Knuserskaller' og skitner seg til når de tar seg et par 'Jordbad'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Rocsi Diaz farene ved å bli oppmuntret i 'Dette fikser du ikke', sjekker noen teknologifiender i 'Robothatere' før de møter noen arge englendere i 'Britisk raseri'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' skyter Rob, Steelo og Rocsi Diaz rett i kurven med stil med 'Ballfintere', oppdager at enkelte dager er 'Umiddelbart dårlige dager' og blir vitner til søt justis på veien i 'Veikarma'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' er Rob, Steelo og gjestende vert Rocsi Diaz veldig oppmerksomme men gjør likevel 'Forsiktige feil', mister taket på 'Overdimensjonert last' og drar sin vei med stil i 'Smidige avskjeder'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXXI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' flipper Rob, Steelo og Rocsi Diaz ut i 'Halvt baklengs', setter seg på 'Billige stoler' og ser hvem som får seg en 'Dekksmekk'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXXII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tilbringer Rob, Steelo og Rocsi Diaz en smertefull dag på vannet i 'Båtknekt', går ut og blir 'Terrassevrak' og manifesterer en del smeller i 'Dårlig tiltrekning'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Rocsi Diaz XXXIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' passer Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Rocsi Diaz godt på bakdelene sine, så de ikke blir 'Rumpestukket', tar rare omveier for å unngå 'Ville veisperringer' og går tilbake til Robs røtter med 'Skaterhatere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Daymond John II
programme.desc: I kveldens episode av 'Ridiculousness' møter Rob, Steelo, Lolo Wood og gjest Daymond John nifse haier i 'Finneskrekk', vil ikke investere i folk som er 'Ikke banebrytende' og finner ut hva som skjer når man tar 'Slurvete snarveier'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Daymond John III
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim, Lolo Wood og gjest Daymond John pengerådgivning av 'Mini-Daymonds', møter noen rasende bier som skaper 'Biebataljer' og tester produkter i 'Prøv før du kjøper'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XLI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' blir Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood rådløse på sjøen og blir helt 'Havkorka', kaster for mange erteposer i 'Villvest-Cornhole' og må jobbe med egen tålmodighet fordi de 'Avskyr å vente'.

programme.title: Andromeda: Hjertet av reisen (del 1)
programme.desc: Beka tar Andromeda til Tarn-Vedra, men lengre tid i slipstream forårsaker bivirkninger. For å bekjempe dem, begynner Beka å ta Flash og blir snart avhengig.

programme.title: Andromeda: Dens time kommer 'Runde endelig
programme.desc: Et gammelt minne fra Andromeda aktiveres ved et uhell, noe som sender henne på oppdrag og etterlater Dylan ved siden av mannskapet ikke i stand til å overstyre kommandoen.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Widinging Gyre
programme.desc: Dylan og Rommie må redde Tyr, Harper og Rev fra et Magog-verdensskip.

programme.title: Andromeda: Utgangsstrategier
programme.desc: Dylan, Beka, Rev og Tyr krasjer land etter å ha rømt en gjeng Nietzscheans, men møter snart en ny trussel: Revs behov for å mate..

programme.title: Andromeda: Et hjerte for falskhet innrammet
programme.desc: Mannskapet må stjele en juvel som er i sentrum av en strid mellom en driftseier og Than. Beka faller for en sikkerhetssjef som tidligere var en tyv.

programme.title: Andromeda: Pitiless as the Sun
programme.desc: Andromeda svarer på et nødanrop når et lasteskip blir angrepet

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Sometime during a neighborhood Christmas party, five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared. Investigators turned to forensic science to help them see what the witnesses missed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: The doctors at the hospital couldn't determine the cause of Bobby Curley's hallucinations and intense pain. They treated it as a neurological disorder but his condition deteriorated. He was being poisoned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ties That Bind
programme.desc: Who was the sexual offender who murdered two adolescent boys in Nebraska? The key to stopping him would be the unique composition of the "junk rope" he used to tie his victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Body of Evidence
programme.desc: Mark Fair left for work and his fiancée, Karla Brown, stayed home. Later, he found her dead. During the autopsy, bite marks on her body were re-examined and forensic odontology identified the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Accident or Murder
programme.desc: Janice Johnson was found dead at the foot of her basement stairs. Police in Nova Scotia had to unravel the circumstances surrounding Janice's death and answer the question: Was it an accident or murder?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Core Evidence
programme.desc: In 1996, more than a dozen children in Seattle, Washington, were fighting for their lives. Each one of them had contracted a serious unknown illness. After one died, investigators knew the clock was ticking.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Haunting Vision
programme.desc: Fire engulfs the home where Lori Keidel and her siblings were left alone while their father went to the laundromat. Years after her mother's disappearance, Lori tells police she witnessed her mother's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: With Every Breath
programme.desc: Young Navajos in the Southwest were dying at an alarming rate. The tribe's medicine men provided investigators with a critical clue that would lead halfway around the world to a most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Slippery Motives
programme.desc: Edward Post drew a bath for his wife before going for a run. He returned to find her not breathing. She died before emergency response arrived. Police considered her death accidental until a motive surfaced.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Voice from Beyond
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier. One of the few clues was an address book found along with the body.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 13
programme.desc: This episode includes: DJ Death & UD, Update: Medford Millions, Missing Valentine Pts. 1 & 2 & UD, Update: Stroke Amnesia and Florida Flim Flam & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 14
programme.desc: This episode includes: Carnies, VA Cop Killer & UD, Red Lake Heir & UD, Leo Koury & UD, Hayward Kidnapping and Tatum's Ghost.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 15
programme.desc: This episode includes: Shopping Mall Pen Pal & UD, Update: Thumbs, Orphan Train & UD and Dorothy Allison Pts. 1 & 2.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 16
programme.desc: This episode includes: Vice Cop, Update: Florida Flim Flam, Where's the Witness? & UD, Update: Thank You Phillip, Lost Sister Jackie & UD and Missing Ex-Monk & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode 17
programme.desc: This episode includes: Alcatraz.

programme.title: The FBI Files: A Stranger in Town
programme.desc: She appeared on the highway in the spring, a young woman, her life cut short, her past and her identity a mystery. Only by finding out who she was could we ever hope to find her killer.

programme.title: The FBI Files: When Seconds Count
programme.desc: On July 2nd 1994, a 12-year-old girl was abducted from her home in northern California. The FBI knows to act fast, search wide, enlist volunteers. But as the hours slipped by, agents also realized their chances for recovering her alive grew slim.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Vanished
programme.desc: A daring kidnapping and a bizarre ransom note baffled Mississippi authorities. The victim was the wife of a wealthy businessman. A list of 12 names and a few drops of blood were the only clues to her fate.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Unlawful Flight
programme.desc: In Alabama, two desperate criminals fled the custody of a local deputy. Eluding authorities, they made their way across the country in a wave of car theft, abduction, and murder.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Murdering Cowboy
programme.desc: The sun set on the Wild West long ago, but some people refused to notice. Claude Dallas was one of them. A wily trapper, Dallas typified the rugged individualism that forged this country. He went too far when he killed two game wardens in 1981.

programme.title: The New Detectives: In The Line of Fire
programme.desc: Bombers, snipers, spree killers: some people don't care who they kill, they just want to hurt innocent people.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Marked For Death
programme.desc: Sometimes killers are careful to leave no fingerprints behind. But methods of the murder itself can leave a lasting impression on police, especially when the tools (or weapons) of a killer's trade leave an innocent victim marked for death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Bloodlust
programme.desc: For homicide investigators, it's a race against time as they track their deadliest foe: a serial killer for whom killing is the only way to feel alive.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Random Targets
programme.desc: Most victims of multiple murderers are meticulously chosen because of a mutual connection with the killer or because they match an intricate set of criteria that fits the killer's MO.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Trial By Fire
programme.desc: At a crime scene, anything left behind or seemingly out of place is considered a clue. But a fire can extinguish everything in its path challenging forensic investigators at every turn and making each arson a trial by fire.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Liverpool's Secret Haunted Mansion
programme.desc: Bex and Sean delve deep into Woolton Hall, a derelict mansion in Liverpool. They appear to be forced out of the building by an unknown force and it takes its toll on one of the team members.

programme.title: Past Hunters: The Haunted Mill – Part 1
programme.desc: Derek Acorah’s The Past Hunters travel to Stockport and investigate an abandoned Mill, Weir Mill, said to the most haunted Mill in the UK. Demonic figures haunt anyone that enters. Will the team survive the night with the spirits?

programme.title: Past Hunters: The Haunted Mill – Part 2
programme.desc: Derek Acorah’s The Past Hunters continue their investigation of Weir Mill and the search for paranormal activity takes a darker turn. Will they finally uncover the truth behind the buildings dark hauntings?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Spirits at The Lord Eldon
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension team travels to the old town of Knutsford, Cheshire to investigate the historic Lord Eldon Inn, hoping to contact the spirit of Sarah Ann Pollitt who is said to haunt the pub.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Lost Souls of One Melling Road
programme.desc: The team heads to Liverpool to help a restaurant uncover what could be haunting there. Bex and Sean encounter the spirit of a white lady in the private quarters.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Jack The Ripper
programme.desc: Bex and Sean head to Sefton and investigate a police station connected to the murderous Jack The Ripper. Was James Maybrick really the Ripper? Did his wife poison him?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Tragic Accident
programme.desc: Rebecca left her baby with fiancé James and his mother Adeline, only to discover that her baby was hospitalized. Rebecca suspects that James is responsible. Adeline blames her for the baby’s death!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I’m Starving Myself to Death
programme.desc: Pamela aims to weigh 40 pounds. Samantha, who suffers from bulimia and alcoholism, steals to accomplish her binging. Can both women confront their eating disorders with support and treatment?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Crawl to Your Wife
programme.desc: After surviving a wild car chase, losing her leg, and being comatose due to her husband, Portia will finally confront him. He won't admit fault, but today Steve’s helping Portia find her voice.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: My Teen Daughter Wants a Baby
programme.desc: 17-year-old Naomi has undergone a sudden attitude change and is on a mission to have a baby. Parents Leeanders and April need Steve to intervene!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Stole 15 Years of My Life
programme.desc: Jennifer left home to protect herself from her stepdad Allen. 15 years later, her mother wants a second chance, but Jennifer is hesitant. Can Steve help mend this broken family?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: She Is My Property
programme.desc: Lanikka is sick and tired of her boyfriend Malcom’s abusive ways. Then, Tim’s jealousy has torn his family apart, but now he’s desperate to win them back, but will Tiffany leave him for good?

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Murder Bites
programme.desc: A young woman is found naked and strangled in a park not 200 yards from her home. It isn’t until Lt. Joe Kenda rethinks the entire case that he realizes someone has been lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Invisible Hand of Death
programme.desc: Two teens stumble upon a woman engulfed in flames, leaving detectives to wonder just who in her inner circle could kill so cruelly.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: Lt. Joe Kenda and his team investigate the scene of an apparent suicide, only to be forced to flee when they discover the house is booby-trapped.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Human Animal
programme.desc: The naked body of a vibrant young mother is found frozen solid in a deserted cemetery. Kenda reopens the investigation and recognizes the sinister hallmark of a serial killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Trigger
programme.desc: A sharp-dressed pedestrian is shot in the back for unknown reasons. Chasing a promising lead, Kenda realizes he’s barking up the wrong tree.

programme.title: Cops: Hide and Go Porch
programme.desc: Officers engage in a car chase when they spot a possible robbery suspect. A man nicknamed "Danger" is tasered after assaulting several girls. Suspects bail from a vehicle and hide under a porch.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A prostitution sting leads police to uncover additional crimes . A prostitute tells deputies she wanted money to buy her daughter a birthday gift. Deputies are called to an assault at a pub.

programme.title: Cops: Alleycat
programme.desc: Officers search for a runaway suspect with a weapons charge. A man admits to having a large number of drugs during a traffic stop. Officers respond to a man with a gun in an alley.

programme.title: Cops: Victoria's New Secret
programme.desc: Deputies observe a woman stuff drugs into her bra. A mother attacks her daughter because she got married in Vegas. Officers are called when a woman is accused of stalking her friend.

programme.title: Cops: Apologies Detective
programme.desc: Officers hold a man under a car at gunpoint after a traffic stop. Officers are flagged down and directed to an arguing couple. A man apologizes to detectives for the illicit items they find.

programme.title: Unsolved Murders
programme.desc: On February 26, 2003, garbage bags containing pieces of human bodies were fished out of the Pas-de-Calais on the banks of the Escaut Canal.

programme.title: Unsolved Murders
programme.desc: On April 27, 2007, Gaëlle Fosset was found dead in her small house in Saint-Germain-la-Campagne in Normandy.

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories (Classics): Lisa Rinna, Jeffrey Ross, Vincent Curatola, Illeana Douglas
programme.desc: Lisa Rinna's family is haunted by a lonely ghost seeking a family of her own; Vincent Curatola rediscovers his mother's love after she dies.

programme.title: Celebrity Ghost Stories (Classics): Carnie Wilson, Eric Roberts, Elisabeth Rohm, C. Thomas Howell
programme.desc: Carnie Wilson meets the ghost of a drunken barber from the 1890s; Eric Roberts has an out-of-body experience after a car wreck.

programme.title: A Haunting: Gateway to Hell
programme.desc: Bobby Mackey has heard tales that the river by his club draws Satanists to the area.

programme.title: A Haunting: Cursed
programme.desc: Romie moves into a new home but begins to have nightmares and see shadowy spirits pacing.

programme.title: A Haunting: Hungry Ghosts
programme.desc: In Taiwan, an American family refuses to believe there are ghosts in their house.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Wages of Sydney
programme.desc: Quan Shu, Manchuria 1359 f.Kr.: Kineserne oppfinner et eksplosivt gaveegg. New York, 2001: En rival slår Sydney og Nigel til et kart som fører til Dragon's Egg.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Vampire's Kiss
programme.desc: Lucas Blackmer, en babymagnet, professor og romanforfatter, ber Sydney hjelpe til med å finne Vlad Tepes 'tapte relikvie. Og han er ikke den eneste etter det.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Mr. Right
programme.desc: Sydney støter på eksen Gray og drar på ferie med ham til Bali, men når Derek Lloyd dukker opp for å verve henne til å finne Parvati's Bowl, kan hun ikke motstå.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Sydney at Ten
programme.desc: Sydneys samboer fra skolen er på sporet med et anheng fra fortiden hennes og verver Sydney for å hjelpe til med å finne den og fange morderen.

programme.title: Andromeda: Den ensomme og jevne sanden
programme.desc: Når Andromeda blir angrepet av rompirater, blir de reddet av et langt mistet romskip fra jorden.

programme.title: Andromeda: Slipfighter Hunder av Krig
programme.desc: Mannskapet oppdager at en falsk planet, Marduk, har skapt masseødeleggelsesvåpen.

programme.title: CBS News Sunday Morning
programme.desc: News, features, weather and commentary.

programme.title: CBS News Sunday Morning
programme.desc: News, features, weather and commentary.

programme.title: Face the Nation
programme.desc: Margaret Brennan hosts news interviews with distinguished national and foreign figures, offering insight and analysis on the top issues of the day.

programme.title: Face the Nation
programme.desc: Margaret Brennan hosts news interviews with distinguished national and foreign figures, offering insight and analysis on the top issues of the day.

programme.title: On the Case: A Killer in Disguise
programme.desc: Police race to track down the unlikely killer responsible for three terrifying murders.

programme.title: On the Case: Left in the Dark
programme.desc: When a beautiful young graduate student is found stabbed to death, detectives must determine if the murder was a crime of passion or a brutal attack by a violent intruder.

programme.title: On the Case: Path of Tears
programme.desc: A 14-year-old girl is killed while walking her dog on a popular community bike trail.

programme.title: On the Case: Signed In Blood
programme.desc: In order to solve the vicious double murder of a beloved couple, police must uncover a cold blooded killer's carefully calculated plot.

programme.title: On the Case: Murder At Sunset- Part 1
programme.desc: A mother and two daughters are discovered floating in Tampa Bay after a brutal triple homicide. Police must rely on a victim who survived a similar attack to bring the killer to justice in this special two-hour On The Case.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Suspension
programme.desc: A furious Joe fights against a federal suspension that will prevent him from carrying passengers for the first time in 20 years. It's also a setback for Jeremy and the other rampies, which takes a turn for the worse with an unexpected injury.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Cause for Celebration
programme.desc: AJ and Candace get married in the Ice Castle. A frustrated Chuck tries to get the Electra to pay her way. A flummoxed Mikey tries to bake a cake for Joe's birthday.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Transatlantic Crossing
programme.desc: The Turkey crew makes the critical jump over the North Atlantic. But en route to Portugal, one crew is forced to turn back.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Thin Ice
programme.desc: C-46 and DC-4 crews race against the spring melt to fly mining equipment to an airstrip on a frozen lake. Jeremy tries to catch up to fellow rampies Audrey and Wilf.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: The Crash
programme.desc: After thousands of hours of painstaking preparation and dangerous flying, a terrible accident devastates the waterbomber crew in Turkey - and everyone at Buffalo.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Serena Williams
programme.desc: Drew sits down with tennis superstar Serena Williams to chat about her final match, her family life and her new children's book, 'The Adventures of Qai Qai.' Plus, Serena plays a rapid fire round of all of her favorites in GOATS To Go.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News, Bridesmaid Who Went Viral For Eating Wrong Cake
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny side up in an all-new Drew's News. Plus, Drew helps the bridesmaid who went viral for accidentally eating a special cake for the bride and groom make her wedding wrong right.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Nicole Richie, Super-Sized Drew's News with CBS Mornings Co-Hosts Gayle King, Tony Dokoupil, Nate Burleson
programme.desc: "Making The Cut" Judge Nicole Richie updates Drew on her bearded dragon Speedy, the birthday trauma they've both experienced and what it's really like working with Heidi Klum.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: CBS Mornings Co-Hosts Gayle King, Tony Dokoupil, Nate Burleson, Dating Tips with Damona Hoffman
programme.desc: CBS Mornings Co-Hosts Gayle King, Tony Dokoupil and Nate Burleson join Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk breaking down everything.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Lena Dunham, Drew's News
programme.desc: Lena Dunham on her new medieval comedy film "Catherine Called Birdy." Plus, Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News, Stooping It with Sarah T, In A Minute Drew's Memory Bank
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Then, upcycling expert Sarah Teresinski is transforming items off the street that she found on the Stooping NYC Instagram page.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News with Guy Branum, Billy Eichner & Luke Macfarlane, In A Minute Drew's News Podcast with Benny Drama
programme.desc: "Bros" star and co-producer Guy Branum joins Drew and Ross at the new's desk. Plus, "Bros" stars Billy Eichner and Luke Macfarlane stop by to chat and play a rousing game of Never Have I Ever with a twist.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: "Bros" Cast Ts Madison, Jim Rash & Miss Lawrence, Drew's News
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny side up in an all-new Drew's News. Plus, "Bros" stars Ts Madison, Jim Rash and Miss Lawrence.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Jon Hamm, Drew's News with Bobby Moynihan
programme.desc: "Confess Fletch" star and avid dog lover Jon Hamm plays a rousing game of Pup Quiz with Drew and rescue dogs available for adoption.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Betty Gilpin, Drew's News with Bobby Moynihan
programme.desc: Bobby Moynihan tackles the latest headlines including why 69% of Americans are feeling overwhelmed by their TV & movie watch list, what your dreams are trying to tell you, how which emoji you use can affect your desirability when flirting and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News with Fat Joe, Nick Kroll
programme.desc: Drew is joined by rapper, actor, and entrepreneur Fat Joe at the news desk. Then, comedian Nick Kroll stops by to chat about his new stand-up comedy special, "Little Big Boy."

programme.title: 48 Hours: Alisa Mathewson's Night Terrors
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder Comes Knocking
programme.desc: In July 2004, Jarrod Davidson was shot to death outside his California apartment. Estranged from his ex-wife, Kelee, Jarrod had been seeking full custody of his daughter. After further investigation, Kelee’s parents were arrested for the murder of Jarrod.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Death Without Mercy
programme.desc: On November 29, 2005, firemen put out a fire in a house in Morgantown, West Virginia -- and discovered the charred remains of Jimmy Michael and his wife Shelly. A medical examiner’s report found that Jimmy was dead before the blaze had even started.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Drawn to Murder - Part 2
programme.desc: A two-part report on the February 1987 murder of 37-year-old Peggy Hettrick in Fort Collins, Colorado. Her mutilated, half-naked body was discovered in a field near the home of Tim Masters, a 15-year-old who lived near the crime scene.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Hannah Graham: Deadly Connections
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Crazy Love
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.
