programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' smasher Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood handlevogner med 'Vognkrasjere', deler luftyogaens felles smerte med 'Dinglende duoer' og blir banket opp av gårdsdyr i 'Buskapssmell'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' faller Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood lett i 'Henfallen til fall', forbauser aper voldsomt med 'Apemagi' og har problemer med å finne tingene sine i 'Borte, men funnet'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LIV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' kan ikke Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood løpe fra den morsomme snublingen i 'Fluktfall', viser fram imponerende bisker i 'Hermehunder' og snakker varmt for bruken av solide hodeplagg i 'Skudd fra oven'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' finner Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ut hvor stor skade en strippepåle kan forårsake i «Pål-lateral skade', oppdager at ikke alle liker å bli skremt i 'Skremtraseri' før de avslutter med noen 'Forlatte farer'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' slår Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ut fra tee i 'Sving-ding', krasjer med 'Små landingsmatter' og blir offer for noen 'Byfeller'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood besøk av sangeren Teddy Swims og ser nærmere på folk som 'Mister kontrollen', får faderlige råd i 'Pappavisdom og kaster ut noen problemtyper i 'Vis dem veien ut'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood problemer med å sette seg på grunn av 'Stolnasking', møter brått uventede dyr i 'Dyrestøkk' og bruker god tid på å falle i 'Gradvise fall'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood nærbilkontakt med leppene i 'Bilkyssere', får seg et slag under beltestedet med 'Lavtslåtte damer' og orker ikke å spise når de er sammen med 'Matlystslukkere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppdager Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood at telefoner kan være distraherende i 'Telefonblind', møter unger som bør finne seg en annen sportsgren i 'Minigolfere' og besøker noen steder der det er 'Kjempekaldt'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' går Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood smertefullt på hodet i 'Stup hvor som helst', kaster seg på sykkelen i 'Pedaltrøkk rett i pølen' og blir vitner til tupékatastrofer i 'Tupé på vift'.

programme.title: Andromeda: Vær alle mine synder husket
programme.desc: En kroppsidentifikasjon går galt når det viser seg at Bekas tidligere mannskap ikke er død.

programme.title: Andromeda: Mayflies dans
programme.desc: Andromeda redder døende mennesker fra en drift, men de blir snart til zombier som blir kontrollert av en bikube.

programme.title: Andromeda: I himmelen er nå tre
programme.desc: Motoren til skapelsen er i stand til å omskrive universet i henhold til eierens ønsker. Dylan, Beka og Trance må skaffe det før noen med mørke planer får det.

programme.title: Andromeda: Ting vi ikke kan endre
programme.desc: Et svart hull slår Dylan ut og sender ham inn i en alternativ virkelighet med kone og barn.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Fair Unknown
programme.desc: Mannskapet redder en av de tapt grunnleggerne av Commonwealth, men oppdager at hun kan være mer trøbbel enn hun er verdt.

programme.title: Andromeda: Dyrets mage
programme.desc: Et mytologisk rommonster prøver å spise Andromeda.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Purr-fect Match
programme.desc: When police discovered the body of Douglas Beamish's estranged wife, authorities linked 20 cat hairs found on her jacket to a cat owned by Beamish's parents. It was the first time animal DNA was used to solve a criminal case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bio-Attack
programme.desc: When more than 700 Oregonians contracted food poisoning from a unique strain of salmonella in 1984, investigators uncovered a secret plot to influence local elections.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: Two sets of scientists probe a woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Prayer
programme.desc: In 1995, the founder of American Atheists disappeared with one of her sons, her granddaughter and $500,000 in gold coins. The police investigated several suspects, including David R. Waters, who worked for American Atheists.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clutch of Witnesses
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses may hold the key to the death of a motorcycle gang member.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scout's Honor
programme.desc: In 1984, a passerby finds the torso of a woman in a cardboard box. A forensic entomologist analyzes nearby insect activity to determine when the victim was killed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Touching Recollection
programme.desc: The investigation into the kidnapping and rape of an 18-year-old Ohio woman is aided when the victim returns hours after the incident occurred. With her help, the police are able to track the assailant to his front door.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg to Stand On
programme.desc: The police investigate when a severed leg is discovered among garbage. Conventional means of identifying the victim are impossible, leading investigators to rely on DNA, forensic anthropology and toxicology.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Partners in Crime
programme.desc: In a 1992 murder case, the autopsy of a cremated body turns up telltale clues of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within a Hair
programme.desc: In 1996, Indiana police identified Richard Alexander as the “River Park Rapist” who assaulted four women that year. Later, DNA analysis casts doubt on his conviction.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 2
programme.desc: This episode includes: Realtor Murder, Miracle Cross, Update: Robbinghood and Nudist Fraud.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 3
programme.desc: This episode includes: Kay Hall & UD, Update: Thanks Lieutenant Stevens, Coin Scam, Marth's Kennel, Sarah Joe and Baltimore Babynapping.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 4
programme.desc: This episode includes: Bad Chief, Locust Grove, Update: Pizza Man and Perpetual Partners.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 5
programme.desc: This episode includes: Platinum Pilfer, Update: Orphan Train, Ghost Lights, Greeting Card and Caruana.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 6
programme.desc: This episode includes: Hess Pts. 1 & 2, The Wanderer and Arlington Murder & UD.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 7
programme.desc: This episode includes: Christmas Party Murder, Update: Nudist Fraud, Gypsy Fraud, Drummond's Dollars & UD and Coma Recovery.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hunter's Game
programme.desc: In the 1970s and 80s, people went to Alaska looking for a fresh start, to reinvent themselves, or to disappear for a while. Some of those disappearances weren't by choice.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Silent Strike
programme.desc: Money may not be the root of all evil, but for some men, a million dollars is enough to justify murder. Even men sworn to uphold the law can sometimes be tempted.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Crime Spree
programme.desc: They swept through six states like a plague, thrill killers acting without rhyme or reason. They targeted adults and young girls, kidnapping, and murdering. And in their rampage, they left plenty of clues, but moving targets are the hardest to hit.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Heist
programme.desc: In Arizona, an armored van loaded with cash failed to reach its destination. Authorities suspected an inside job. When the vehicle was recovered with the drivers and the cash missing, those suspicions grew even more.

programme.title: The FBI Files: John Gotti: Convicted
programme.desc: John Gotti was ambitious, powerful and ruthless. He ruled with flash and conspicuous style, playing celebrity with the media and cat and mouse with the FBI. They called John Gotti the Teflon Don. Serious charges just wouldn't stick.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Murderous Attraction
programme.desc: In Columbus, Ohio, a woman is found shot in the head. The death is ruled a suicide, but something is not right and detectives refuse to let the matter rest.

programme.title: The New Detectives: For Love Or Money
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When money is the motive, murder can rip at the very foundation of marriage and family.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Mind Hunters
programme.desc: Psychological Profiling: Journey into the dark recesses and calculated madness present only in our worst nightmares, and in the minds of serial killers.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Partners In Crime
programme.desc: They say that a burden shared is a burden halved, but when partners team up to commit murder, the weight of their guilt remains just as heavy. Investigators must rely on forensic science to capture partners in crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Broken Trust
programme.desc: A New York homebuyer gets more than he bargained for when a house inspection turns up a mummified corpse. For decades, the crime had gone undiscovered. The victim unmissed, and the killer unpunished.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Lost Souls Of The Tivoli Venue
programme.desc: The Ghost Dimension Team travels to North Wales and the Tivoli Theatre in Flint for a night of haunting entertainment.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Strange Things at Owd Betts
programme.desc: Sean heads to Rochdale and investigates strange paranormal reports at Owd Betts. Something spooky lurks in the basement and it seems Sean is not alone as he investigates the main bar.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Carnfield Hall
programme.desc: Carnfield Hall is a country house dating from the 15th and 16th Centuries. This private residence turn event hall is using its paranormal activity to draw in business. Are these spirits the old residents?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Poltergeist Haunting The Station Hotel - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Ashton-Under-Lyne to investigate poltergeist activity claims in a local pub. It's believed that it's not just the locals that return to haunt here. Sean comes face to face with the activity in a night he will never forget.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Poltergeist Haunting The Station Hotel - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation at The Station Hotel and it appears his presence is not welcomed by the spirits. This is one experience of the paranormal that leaves a mark in Sean's memory forever.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Haunted escape room at Moviescape - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to a haunted escape room attraction and although the sets are dressed to scare, something more sinister seems to be lurking here. Will Sean escape unscathed tonight?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Look What You Did to Your Baby
programme.desc: Kristy wants her baby back from her mother Donna! Donna claims she took the baby away because he was born with severe disabilities due to Kristy’s drug use during pregnancy. Who’s the liar?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Teen Mom Murderer?
programme.desc: At 17, Janelle's infant son died from serious injuries. She was sentenced to 3 years in prison for reckless homicide, but claims she's innocent. What will her polygraph results say?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Shocking Betrayal
programme.desc: Korey is positive that his girlfriend Dominique is cheating on him and is also worried that she might be selling sex. She says that his suspicions have caused him to become abusive. Then, Gregory thinks that his girlfriend Robin isn’t faithful!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Did It To Hurt You
programme.desc: Aeshia’s here to prove to Terrence and his wife Lashondra that Terrence is the father of her child, but Lashondra knows she’s wrong! Both Shaunah and Chris have convinced themselves that they’re being cheated on. Who’s the father?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Left You, But You Are The Father
programme.desc: Anastasia and Robert's 2 year relationship crumbled when he heard rumors that she was cheating on him. She says that she's always been faithful, but Robert doesn't believe her and now he doubts he is the father of her newborn baby.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Were You Ever Even Pregnant?
programme.desc: Kaliegh is 23 but has been a heroin addict for five years. Her mom, best friend, and ex-boyfriend who got her hooked on heroin are here to beg her to go to rehab. Follow her as she travels to the rehab clinic and tries to get clean!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Forbidden Love
programme.desc: At twelve, Crystal dated 20-year-old Matt and was pregnant at 13. He served 15 months for sexual assault on a minor and is a registered sex offender. Is this inappropriate love or a misunderstanding?

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The End
programme.desc: Kenda faces his most difficult case yet – the slaying of a young boy. The detective makes the most consequential decision of his career.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: When the Music Stops
programme.desc: Vietnam War veteran Charles Walker is found unconscious, after a stabbing attack so savage even 45 units of blood couldn’t save his life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Monster Awakes
programme.desc: When Julie Smith reports being sexually assaulted, Lt. Joe Kenda and his Sex Crimes Unit discover a terrifying similarity to other attacks on the east side of town.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Last Fare
programme.desc: A young man is found dead behind the wheel of his taxi. With robbery seeming unlikely, Kenda and Gaenzle wonder if this was personal.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Six Feet Under
programme.desc: Kenda finds the body of a bruised and battered young woman named Vicki Ross strangled. Kenda must sort through the endless suspicious characters in Vicki's past to find the elusive truth.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood From A Stone
programme.desc: A bystander receives a deadly head injury during a roadside altercation, but the stakes are raised when his body disappears from the scene. When a toddler is kidnapped for ransom Kenda joins forces with an undercover team in a desperate race against time.

programme.title: Nurses Who Kill NO: Vickie Dawn Jackson
programme.desc: Vickie Dawn Jackson was described as sweet and 'gone to fat' by locals in her small Texas town. Why did Vickie kill off the friends and relatives of those whom she knew in Nocona, Texas?

programme.title: Nurses Who Kill NO: Jeannie Miata
programme.desc: Jeannie Miata was a nurse who killed a woman with a lethal dose of insulin. Experts analyse the actions and motive of this disturbing murderer.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Dr. G must figure out if a man died as a result of his infected stab wound or if his history of drug abuse was the culprit.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Both natural disease and sports injury are likely suspects in Eric Brody's death. But then Dr. G learns that he was treated with antibiotics for a spider bite prior to his death.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Paramedics respond to a mother in distress: one of her infant twin girls hasn’t woken up. By the time help arrives, it’s too late. But there is no apparent cause of death.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Bible Codes
programme.desc: Does the Bible contain hidden messages encoded within certain passages of the Old Testament? Is the prophetic nature of these 'codes' proof the Bible's author is of supernatural or extraterrestrial origin?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Journey to the Center of the Earth
programme.desc: Richard interviews the expedition organizer who is planning on leading a team of scientists, filmmakers and tourists to the Arctic aboard a Russian nuclear ice-breaker in search of an entrance into the interior of our world.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard meets members of the 9/11 Truth movement who challenge the official version of events concerning the attack on the U.S. Pentagon. Researchers present evidence to suggest the attack was perpetrated by some rogue element inside the U.S. government.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Razor Ruddock's Home
programme.desc: We visit the home of Soccer legend Neil "Razor" Ruddock which seems to be haunted. Is it his home specifically? Or are these ghosts attached to him?

programme.title: Past Hunters: Blackpool Pleasure Beach
programme.desc: Blackpool Pleasure Beach is one of the most visited attractions in the United Kingdom. People visit it not only for the fun, but to also hopefully catch a glimpse of the many ghosts that haunt there.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Whitby Hall
programme.desc: Built in the early 1800s, Whitby Hall used to be an administrative center and now stands as a public park and arts center. It has never before been investigated, but staff have reported many noises and presences among them.

programme.title: My Haunted House: Pest House and Sleepwalkers
programme.desc: An earthquake triggers terrifying activity in a house with a dark past. A young woman sees visions in her sleep that lead her to an abandoned hospital.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Women Want to Know
programme.desc: Sydney har funnet et tempel med et afgud av Ganesha, og det blir filmet for TV, men de blir fanget inne når de lokale opprørerne snubler over dem. Kan Nigel og Karen hjelpe fra USA?

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Star of Nadir
programme.desc: En anonym sultans kone Danielle dør under mystiske omstendigheter i ørkenen. Hun hadde imidlertid bedt Sydney om å hjelpe. Sydney mener Danielle lette etter stjernen til Nadir.

programme.title: Andromeda: Og ditt hjerte vil fly bort
programme.desc: Når en forlengst mistet kjærlighet kommer tilbake, forsvinner Tyr fra skipet for å beskytte henne mot en snikmorder.

programme.title: Andromeda: Den ukontrable mannen
programme.desc: Sett i et alternativt univers der Dylan døde og Gaheris Rhade prøver å reformere Commonwealth.

programme.title: Andromeda: Delenda Est
programme.desc: Gruppen som angrep Andromeda under den første undertegningen av Commonwealth-charteret, vender tilbake til mer kaos.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Dark Backward
programme.desc: Trance går gjennom noen forskjellige scenarier og prøver å finne en der mannskapet hennes ikke dør.

programme.title: 60 Minutes
programme.desc: Newsmagazine with features focusing on people, and events in the news and behind the headlines.

programme.title: Face the Nation
programme.desc: Margaret Brennan hosts news interviews with distinguished national and foreign figures, offering insight and analysis on the top issues of the day.

programme.title: CBS News Roundup
programme.desc: The headlines one needs to know overnight... plus, a roundup of MoneyWatch, health, consumer and up-to-the-minute technology news, the latest weather, and inspiring stories of kindness and hope.

programme.title: CBS News Roundup
programme.desc: The headlines one needs to know overnight... plus, a roundup of MoneyWatch, health, consumer and up-to-the-minute technology news, the latest weather, and inspiring stories of kindness and hope.

programme.title: On the Case: Vanished in the Night
programme.desc: When 20 year old Lynsie Ekelund suddenly goes missing in the dead of night, it leaves her mother scrambling for answers.

programme.title: On the Case: Courage and Conviction
programme.desc: A college student's battle for survival may be the key to solving a double homicide from years earlier.

programme.title: On the Case: Darkness in The Desert
programme.desc: Paula Zahn investigates the story of a Las Vegas starlet who mysteriously vanished during a visit to a local spy store.

programme.title: On the Case: River of Tears
programme.desc: Paula examines the discovery of a young woman's lifeless body on the bank of a shallow river. A note in her pocket may point to her killer.

programme.title: On the Case: Painful Memories
programme.desc: A young marine comes home and finds his nine month pregnant wife savagely beaten in their bedroom. Was he an innocent victim or could he have been responsible for the terrible crime.

programme.title: On the Case: Last Dance
programme.desc: A woman's walk home from a night out at a dance club ends in a brutal murder.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Ski Plane

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Buffalo Scores

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Special Delivery
programme.desc: Chief Pilot Arnie lands the DC-3 on a homemade sand strip at a remote lodge. Electra expert Chuck goes one-on-one with a stubborn power unit, and Rod's wife Sasha goes into labour with the newest member of the McBryan family.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Yukon
programme.desc: When thunderstorms and a shaking engine threaten a DC-3 charter to Whitehorse, Joe pulls out all the stops to get the passengers to their destination.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: British Invasion
programme.desc: oe and Mikey head off to Coventry, England to navigate the potential purchase of an Electra turboprop to add to Buffalo's fleet of fire-fighting tanker planes.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Arnie Calls It
programme.desc: While training waterbomber captains for the upcoming fire-fighting season, Chief Pilot Arnie makes a surprising decision. AJ becomes a DC-4 captain and ponders whether to accept a promotion.

programme.desc: Horticulturist Christopher Freimuth shares holiday decor tips. Drew & Ross report on E.T. auction & benefits of being in the rain. James Warren talks about building benches at local bus stops.

programme.desc: Queen Latifah shares behind-the-scenes stories. Chris Appleton does music teacher's hair. Drew's News w/ Ross Mathews & Mikel Welch. TikToker Sarah T. shows hack for lamp cords.

programme.desc: Drew and Cameron Diaz cook and chat about their culinary adventures. Andrea Lavinthal recreates Drew's past looks.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 105

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 301
programme.desc: Justisminister Tor Mikkel Wara blir i 2018 utsatt for en rekke alvorlige angrep på sitt private hjem. I flere måneder står politiet uten spor, helt til det kommer et sjokkerende gjennombrudd i saken.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 404
programme.desc: I desember 2015 gjør gallerist Reidar Osen et ærend med varebilen sin da han blir kapret av ukjente gjerningsmenn, som truer ham på livet og krever to millioner kroner. Hvem står bak kidnappingen?

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 102
programme.desc: Åtte år gamle Monika Sviglinskaja blir funnet død i sitt hjem på Sotra. Politiet mener det dreier seg om et selvmord og henlegger saken. Men moren hennes er fortsatt overbevist om at noe kriminelt har skjedd.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En politietterforskning settes i gang etter at Maud Johansson meldes savnet den 18. oktober 2005. Etter flere år med iherdig leting ser det ut til at etterforskningen stopper opp, men politiet gir ikke opp.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 704
programme.desc: En sommernatt i Värmland bryter det ut slagsmål, hvoretter 21 år gamle Harout mottar et dødelig knivstikk. Politiet får mistanker om at et sjalusidrama kan være nøkkelen til å finne den skyldige.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Execution
programme.desc: Just before being hanged for shooting a man in the back, a man in 1880 is transported into the year 1959 by a professor who soon realizes that he has brought forward a savage killer.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Big Tall Wish
programme.desc: An over-the-hill boxer gets a boost from one of his biggest fans - a little boy with an unwavering belief in magic.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Nice Place to Visit
programme.desc: After being shot to death, Rocky Valentine encounters the amiable white-haired Mr. Pip, who gives Rocky everything he wishes for.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Still Life/The Little People of Killany Woods/The Misfortune Cookie
programme.desc: Dan finds mystic photos in antique camera/Irishman's leprechaun tales turn real/Critic's end foretold by fortune cookies.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Monsters!/A Small Talent for War/A Matter of Minutes
programme.desc: Young monster fan meets alleged vampire neighbor/Alien threatens humanity, nations rush disarmament/Couple finds empty street with strange workers.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Nightmare as a Child
programme.desc: Schoolteacher Helen Foley finds a strange and very serious little girl on the stairs outside her apartment. The little girl seems to know her and tries to jog her memory about a man she saw earlier that day. The man arrives at Helen's door…

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Stop at Willoughby
programme.desc: Riding home on the train one day, a man falls asleep and dreams it is 1880, and he is entering a small town called Willoughby.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: America's orchards and farms balance hand labor with mechanization through efficient harvesting methods; explore orchard management, California's largest fruit packing house, Nebraska corn fields, Wisconsin cranberry marshes, and more.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Heavy metals occupy select periodic table portions and are essential to America's economic and military might, stored in National Defense Stockpile; vital metals include copper, uranium, lead, zinc, nickel, and corrosion-resistant superalloys.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Take a peek into one of today's fully-automated homes that is so smart, the owner can operate everything from the home theater to the outdoor waterfall at a push of one button.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Explore the world of extreme horsepower from fastest accelerating cars to massive hydroplane racing boats; discover horsepower's steam engine marketing origins, container ship diesel power, Hoover Dam water harnessing, and more.

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: A computer-managed home in Colorado showcases the high tech gadgetry destined to inhabit every wall in the future; a network of walls with cutouts and Plexiglas windows reveal how pests and creepy crawlies of all kinds can congregate.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: In Power
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler's secret agenda is to rid Germany of Jews. By 1938, after creating work schemes and rearming, he orchestrates "The Night of Broken Glass," burning 1,000 synagogues and killing 91 Jews, preparing for further aggression.

programme.title: Battle Of Dunkirk
programme.desc: I et kappløp med tiden krysset over åtte hundre private båter Den engelske kanal for å redde de havarerte soldatene fra infernoet på strendene ved Dunkerque. Se de enkelte veteranenes ekstraordinære heltemot i et slag som endret andre verdenskrigs forløp.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Overlord
programme.desc: After a careful campaign of disinformation that throws the German defenders off-guard, the Western Allies finally land on Normandy.France is liberated.

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution: Factories of Death
programme.desc: Året 1942 skal bli det mest betydningsfulle i "Den Endelige Løsningen", ettersom nazistene nå begynner å gjennomgå Vest-Europa og til og med tar jøder fra steder så fjernt som de britiske Kanaløyene.

programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: iCarly: Turen til Las Vegas
programme.desc: Når Sam får vite at moren hennes er i fengsel i Vegas, bestemmer gjengen seg for å ta sine mest verdifulle eiendeler, kjøre til Vegas og pantsette dem - så de får nok penger til å betale borgen for henne. Gjesteartister: History Channels PAWN STARS.

programme.title: iCarly: Nattsynbrillene
programme.desc: Sams venn kommer ut av ungdomsfengselet, og Sam advarer alle om å holde seg unna, men Carly hører ikke etter og havner på dypt vann. Hjemme i leiligheten finner Spencer noen nattsynbriller.

programme.title: iCarly: Verden er rystet del 1
programme.desc: Jimmy Fallon inviterer iCarly-gjengen til å opptre live i programmet sitt i New York. De elsker New York og er kjempeglade for å være med i programmet, men alt kan skje på live tv.

programme.title: iCarly: Verden er rystet del 2
programme.desc: Jimmy Fallon inviterer iCarly-gjengen til å opptre live i programmet sitt i New York, men en stor klesmiss fra Gibby betyr store problemer for nettshowets fremtid.

programme.title: iCarly: Spencers venner
programme.desc: iCarly-gjengen vil finne venner til Spencer på hans egen alder. De finner noen gode muligheter, men vil vennskapet blomstre?

programme.title: iCarly: Den stjålne laptoppen
programme.desc: Når Sams laptop blir stjålet, prøver iCarly-gjengen å hjelpe henne med å oppspore tyven. Imens får Spencer vite at han ikke får komme inn i sin yndlingsspillehall hvis han ikke er i følge med et barn. Hellet snur når Guppy trenger barnevakt.

programme.title: iCarly: Farvel del 2
programme.desc: Carly er på vei til å akseptere at hun ikke kan gå på det årlige ballet, da faren hennes dukker opp og går sammen med henne. Kvelden tar en uventet vending når faren hennes stiller et livsavgjørende spørsmål.

programme.title: iCarly: Vårt eget webshow
programme.desc: Når Miss Briggs avviser alle yndlingsdeltagerne deres fra uttakene til talenshowet, bestemmer Carly og Sam seg for å lage sitt eget talentshow for klassekameratene gjennom iCarly på nettet.

programme.title: iCarly: Herr Nesten Perfekt
programme.desc: Carly er keen på en gutt på skolen som heter Jake. Han er råkul og kjekk, og fordi hun liker ham, inviterer hun Jake til å spille gitar og synge på sitt nye webshow. Men hun oppdager forsent at Jake synger helt forferdelig.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg vil ha flere seere
programme.desc: Carly og Sam konkurrerer med Freddie og Spencer om å finne den beste planen for hvordan å få flere ungdommer til å se på iCarlys websendinger. Når alle planene deres slår helt feil, blir alt helt sprøtt.

programme.title: iCarly: En pågående kritiker
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie vil at web-showet deres skal bli anmeldt av 'Nevelocity', en populær webside for slike anmeldelser. Carly drar for å møte Nevel, og det viser seg at han er en irriterende gutt som vil date henne.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Strange Bedfellows: Part 1
programme.desc: Sam uttrykker interesse for politikk når han faller for en kvinne som stiller til valg i bystyret.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Strange Bedfellows: Part 2
programme.desc: Diane slutter når hun finner ut at kjæresten til Sam vil ha henne sparket.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Strange Bedfellows: Part 3
programme.desc: Diane prøver å gjøre Sams liv problematisk etter at han sendte henne på dør.

programme.title: Cheers NO: The Proposal
programme.desc: Gjengen venter i spenning når Sam frir.

programme.title: Cheers NO: The Cape Cad
programme.desc: Diane vil ha Sam tilbake, men han er glad i friheten sin.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Money Dearest
programme.desc: Cliff setter opp et møte mellom moren sin og en ekstremt velstående mann.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Abnormal Psychology
programme.desc: Frasier dukker opp i et TV-show for en debatt med Dr. Lilith Stern.

programme.title: Cheers NO: House of Horrors with Formal Dining and Used Brick
programme.desc: Cliff overnatter når Carla blir skremt i sitt nye hus.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Tan 'n' Wash
programme.desc: Cheers-gjengen investerer i et nystartet solariumfirma.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Work is Death (aka Burger World) / Werewolves of Highland / Tech Support
programme.desc: After the Manager explains that Workers Compensation pays you for getting injured on the job, Butt-head sets out to injure Beavis / A Vampire craze hits the high school / Beavis and Butt-Head misinterpret what it means to ask a man for his daughter's hand

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Killing Time / Dude, a Reward
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head's worst fears are realized when they have to kill two hours, until something good comes on TV. / Images of Beavis and Butt-head grace the walls of a photo gallery after they find a lost camera and put it to creative use.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Teen Talk / vs.the Vending Machine
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head join Captain Dick Jackman on his Sunday morning program, "rapping" about their problems. / The vending machine wins.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Fluktrommet/Den viktige
programme.desc: Beavis og Butt-Head prøver å løse Fluktromgåten, bare for å bli fanget på badet. / Beavis møter sin største helt - Ild.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Snille Butt-Head/ Hjemmehjelp
programme.desc: Butt-Head får medisin for sin aggresjon mot Beavis og blir litt for snill./ Middelaldrende Beavis og Butt-Head går tom for ølpenger, så Beavis må finne seg en jobb.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Shopping cart / Die Fly, Die! / Drinking Butt-ies
programme.desc: Our duo find out that accidents can lead to money / Beavis and Butt-Head get annoyed at a fly / After a beating by Todd, they become best friends over beer

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Virtuelt vannvidd / Utestengt
programme.desc: Beavis og Butt-Head tar på seg solbriller og tror de er virtual reality-briller./ Beavis og Butt-Head blir låst ute av huset og ødelegger det når de prøver å komme seg inn.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Radio Sweethearts / The Great Cornholio
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head win a radio contest and become disc jockeys for a day. / During a sugar rush, Beavis' alter ego appears. He reeks havoc at Highland High looking for "teepee for his bunghole."

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Murder Site / Sexual Harassment
programme.desc: Beavis can't take Butt-head's verbal abuse anymore, and snaps while they're checking out the site of a local murder. / Beavis and Butt-head sue Kimberly for sexual harassment, since she's giving them wood.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: A Very Special Episode / Dumbasses Anonymous
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head come to the aid of a wounded baby bird...almost. / Beavis and Butt-head show up at an AA meeting hoping to score some booze.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Nektet service / Balleskvis
programme.desc: Beavis prøver yogabukser og får dem ikke av. / Guttene oppdager at de har rett til å nekte service til kunder på Burger World.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: A Girl & Her Cat
programme.desc: A Christmas Eve catnapping renews Salem’s love for his family.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Jenny's Non-dream
programme.desc: Behaving as mortals for just one night turns out to be more than the Spellman household can handle.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Trial by Fury
programme.desc: Sabrina and her aunts use magic to show an unfair teacher that what goes around comes around.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina Through The Looking Glass
programme.desc: Sabrina's in a foul mood and only baseball great Brady Anderson can help her out of her slump.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Hilda And Zelda: The Teenage Years
programme.desc: Aunts Hilda and Zelda experience growing pains when they turn into teenagers for the night.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Mars Attracts
programme.desc: A winter vacation to Mars and a cute ski instructor test Sabrina’s feelings for Harvey.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: First Kiss
programme.desc: Sabrina’s first kiss becomes a test of true love when Harvey is turned into a frog.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sweet Charity
programme.desc: When Sabrina uses Libby’s likeness to promote a community service program, the real Libby manages to steal the limelight.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Cat Showdown
programme.desc: Salem enters a cat show to make some fast cash, but Sabrina uncovers a fur-raising scandal.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Meeting Dad’s Girlfriend
programme.desc: Love definitely isn’t in the air when Sabrina meets her dad’s new girlfriend.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: As Westbridge Turns
programme.desc: Sinister plots, tumultuous romance, danger, and intrigue – just another day at Westbridge High, after Sabrina casts a spell wishing for more excitement.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Heartstrings - Part 2
programme.desc: The family anxiously awaits while Steven undergoes heart surgery.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Heartstrings - Part 3
programme.desc: Steven struggles with fear after returning home after his heart surgery.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Basic Training
programme.desc: Skippy decides to join the Army.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Deja Vu
programme.desc: Jennifer dates Mallory's ex-boyfriend's brother.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Nick's Best Friend
programme.desc: Nick is devastated when his childhood dog gets hit by a car.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Get Me to the Living Room on Time
programme.desc: Andy befriends two senior citizens from a retirement center.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Job Not Taken
programme.desc: Alex must choose between a friendship and his career.

programme.title: Fem i familien: The Wrecker's Ball
programme.desc: Elyse races to save a building she designed from the wrecking ball.

programme.title: Fem i familien: My Best Friend's Girl
programme.desc: Skippy falls for Alex's girlfriend, Lauren, when he begins counseling her.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Biological Dad
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer et romvesen som lærer om kvinnelig anatomi, karer som prøver å overgå hverandre og møtet mellom de to siste mennesker på Jorden.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Y'all Ready For This?
programme.desc: Et fotballag girer seg opp før en kamp, president Obama og Luther møter Hillary Clinton, to karer forbereder seg på potensielle trusler på et fly, pirater synger en sang og en betjent er litt for skyteglad.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Manly Tears
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en narkohandel som går på trynet, en mafiafyr som er en stor grinasabb, og Darius Rucker som prøver å takle sin Hootie-fortid.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Michael Jackson Halloween
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan feirer Halloween med å flykte fra rasistiske zombier, skuespillerne i 'Human Centipede' har en skremmende gjenforening, og vi besøker en folkeskole for trollmenn med problemer.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Killer Concept Album
programme.desc: En politiker benekter å ha sendt rampete bilder, en detektiv forhører en rapper, Cedric og Levi finner lyn i en flaske, to herrer fra sør komplimenterer kvinner, Jordan møter en gammel venn og en betjent tar tingene helt bokstavelig.

programme.title: Key & Peele: East West Bowl #2
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en introdukjson av de nyeste East/West Bowl-spillerne, utleier-Devon ransaker Jordans leilighet, og Jordan blir støtt av en overseksuell kollega.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Sex Detective
programme.desc: En respektert kriminalbetjent, ekspert i sexforbrytelser, benytter ukonvensjonelle metoder for å løse en sak, en actionhelt redder kjæresten sin og en ansatt i en butikk med yoghurt-is tester for mange vareprøver.

programme.title: Key & Peele: I'm Retired
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en ungkars-fest som blir underlig og en svart fyr med en hvit penis.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Joke Stealing
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en fotballspiller som blir straffet for å juble for mye, Jordan og Keegan som går på premieren på "Othello" og en high school-elev som blir berømt for å stjele en vits.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Sex Addict Wendel
programme.desc: Artister blir sparket i skrittet på grunn av kunsten sin, klassens klovn terroriserer læreren og en mann prøver å få hellet med seg på et møte for sexmisbrukere.

programme.title: Key & Peele: East Bowl Rap / West Bowl Rap
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer All-Stars fra East/West bowl som rapper, karene spiller mafioso og de to parkeringstypene har vanskelig for å tro at noen tør å provosere Batmans.

programme.title: Broad City: Stories
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana farer fra toppen av Manhattan til bunnen for å feire Abbis 30-årsdag, og treffer på både gamle og nye venner på veien.

programme.title: Broad City: Shework and S**t Bucket
programme.desc: Ilana gir seg i kast med sin seneste mulighet til å tjene penger da hun en åpner et utendørs kontorlandskap for New Yorks røykere; Abbi konfronterer husverten sin da han nekter å modernisere sanitæranlegget hennes.

programme.title: Broad City: Bitcoin & the Missing Girl
programme.desc: Ilana besøker en gammel flamme for å få sin del av en Bitcoin-formue; Abbi glemmer klesvasken sin for første gang, og mister favorittgenseren sin.

programme.title: Broad City: Make the Space
programme.desc: Ilana oppdager en skremmende hemmelighet om Jaimé; Abbi prøver å avansere fra genserbretter til vinduskunstner på Anthropologie.

programme.title: Broad City: Artsy Fartsy
programme.desc: Abbi inviteres til et fancy kunstarrangement på MoMA; Ilana og Lincoln analyserer det første året de har vært sammen.

programme.title: Broad City: Lost and Found
programme.desc: Jentene møter Ilanas femtenmenning, som overlevde Holocaust, og tar ham med på en kjedelig brunch; Abbi prøver en ny look.

programme.title: Broad City: Shenanigans
programme.desc: Ilana rekrutteres som hårmodell; Abbis nye flamme forteller henne at hun ikke er moden nok.

programme.title: Broad City: Sleep No More
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana besøker 'Sleep No More', og Abbi prøver å finne rett tidspunkt for å fortelle Ilana noe som vil forandre livet hennes radikalt.

programme.title: Broad City: Along Came Molly
programme.desc: Abbi, Ilana og Bevers selger Abbis eiendeler i New York; Abbi får billetter til en Lil Wayne-konsert, og jentene tar en 'tripp'.

programme.title: Broad City: Broad City
programme.desc: Jentene tar farvel.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Milkshake Man's Death
programme.desc: Reno District Attorney Mike Powers investigates the Sheriff's Department.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Investigation Concluded
programme.desc: District Attorney Mike Powers concludes his investigation of the Sheriff's Department, while Terry the prostitute takes off in Reno's police helicopter.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Released from Prison
programme.desc: Members of the Reno Sheriff's Department start new lives after getting kicked off the force.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Revenge of Mike Powers
programme.desc: The deputies enjoy their new lives in the private sector, but a specter from their past continues to haunt them.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Cop School
programme.desc: Some promising new recruits intimidate the team with their skills, and Wiegel has trouble making magic with her incarcerated boyfriend.

programme.title: RENO 911!: SARS Outbreak
programme.desc: Dangle, Jones and Wiegel lose it in quarantine after exposure to SARS, while the rest of the sheriffs hang out with kids' show host Reading Ron.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Fastest Criminal in Reno
programme.desc: The deputies try to catch the infamous Fast Eddie McLintock.

programme.title: RENO 911!: The Prefect of Wanganui
programme.desc: Kimball and Dangle escort the Prefect of Wanganui, Reno's sister city, around town; Junior and Wiegel struggle to stand out at the high school job fair.

programme.title: RENO 911!: ...And the Installation Is Free
programme.desc: Jones discovers the delights of fame after doing radio commercials for a carpeting company.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Clemmy Marries a Dead Guy
programme.desc: Johnson tries to marry the late Hot Tub King of Reno, and Garcia and Williams discover the magical properties of Liberace's piano.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Real Movies & Wu-Tang Financial
programme.desc: Dave takes a realistic look at "Pretty Woman" and "The Matrix" and introduces the Wu-Tang Clan's new financial consulting firm.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Tyrone Biggums's Intervention & Racist Hollywood Animals
programme.desc: Tyrone mistakes an intervention for a crack sale, and "Frontline" covers racist animals.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Blackzilla & Playa Haters' Ball
programme.desc: Dave takes Japan by storm in the sci-fi adventure "Blackzilla," and America Undercover presents The Playa Haters' Ball.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Piss on You & The World's Greatest Wars
programme.desc: Dave presents the History Channel coverage of great inner-city gang wars from the 1980s.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Make-A-Wish & Fisticuff
programme.desc: Dave sees people's inner thoughts and freaks out when a little kid beats him at video games.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: O'Dweeds & Trading Spouses
programme.desc: Dave shows what happens when couples try "Trading Spouses" and introduces a family-friendly brand of pot; musical guest Black Star.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Samuel Jackson Beer & Racial Draft
programme.desc: Dave debuts Samuel Jackson beer and reveals major upsets in "The Racial Draft."

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Negrodamus & The Niggar Family
programme.desc: Paul Mooney introduces Negrodamus, and Dave imagines a black Gallagher.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: White People Can't Dance & The Three Daves
programme.desc: Dave challenges the myth that white people can't dance.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: The Love Contract & True Hollywood Stories: Rick James
programme.desc: Rick James is one of the baddest mothaf**kers of all time.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: True Hollywood Stories: Prince & Red Balls Energy Drink
programme.desc: Negrodamus answers questions, and Charlie Murphy plays basketball with Prince.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Crying Mukbanger
programme.desc: Daniel bryter brød med en kranglefant, forklarer hvorfor det er viktigere å tvitre enn å stemme og finner ut hvem som mangler 'O.P.P.'.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Deafies in Drag
programme.desc: I denne superskumle Halloween-episoden snakker Daniel med noen døve dragqueens, viser oss noen smakløse kostymer, og beviser en gang for alle at spøkelser er 100 % virkelige.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Adrenaline Junkie Chase
programme.desc: Daniel hjelper en adrenalin-junkie å ta overdose, introduserer deg for nettets mest snuskete pervoer og tilbyr de siste valgresultatene live.

programme.title: Tosh.0: One Hole or Two?
programme.desc: Daniel avklarer nettets heiteste hull-debatt, introdusere nye sportsgrener som tar nasjonen med storm og presenterer tilbakekomsten av showets mest ubesvarte innslag.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Shot Girl
programme.desc: Daniel deler minner fra 2018 som han ikke klarer å holde tilbake og får rapport fra sin grovmælte favoritt-footballanalytiker.

programme.title: Tosh.0: March 19, 2019 - Hard Rock Nick
programme.desc: Daniel sits down with the most confident man on social media, reads life-ruining tweets and puts his own spin on the Cheese Challenge.

programme.title: Tosh.0: March 26, 2019 - Tirdy Works
programme.desc: Daniel meets a woman who makes a living polishing turds, breaks down a video of a man and his sinking pickup truck and checks out some soap-cutting videos.

programme.title: Tosh.0: April 2, 2019 - Pony Play
programme.desc: Daniel talks to a man who enjoys acting like a horse, makes the case for celebrating all birthdays on the same day and exposes celebrities without their makeup.

programme.title: Tosh.0: April 9, 2019 - Energy Drink Reviewer
programme.desc: Daniel meets a low-energy energy drink reviewer, explores the fine art of balloon popping and breaks down video of a man getting a "purple shower."

programme.title: Tosh.0: April 16, 2019 - Vape Bros
programme.desc: Daniel learns vape tricks from some Canadian bros, finds out about a jousting expert's made-up language and assesses the injuries of two stabbing victims.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard's dream of being a paid artist comes true when he is commissioned to paint a mural for New York City.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When gentile Del falls for Risa Glickman, who only dates Jewish men, he takes drastic measures to pretend that he is Jewish.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline discovers that Richard's father is a former vaudeville comic, Ben Karinsky and tries to reunite him with a reluctant Richard.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline observes that her pet cat Salty is troubled, she consults her veterinarian boyfriend, Joe, who suggests taking Salty to an eccentric cat therapist.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Annie's mother shows up on Annie's doorstep with suitcase in hand, Caroline finds herself caught in the middle.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Another side of Caroline's artistic expression -- her dream of being a ballerina -- is revealed when she is locked in a laundromat overnight with a homeless man.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline and Joe's romance takes a nosedive when his ex-girlfriend Lisa returns from her Greenpeace mission and seeks shelter at Joe's apartment.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Annie's sister Donna visits New York in hopes of resurrecting her career, she finds the love letter Richard hid from Caroline and decides that setting the lyrics to music could be her next big hit, forcing Richard to feel slightly off-key.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Del brings one of Richard's paintings to a posh country club to impress a girl, but the best impresssion is made on a wealthy socialite, much to Richard's delight.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline cheers Richard on when he gets the chance to win big money by making the half-court free-throw shot at a New York Knicks game.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies come to the rescue when Jim tries to convince his family that he didn't squander his inheritance by buying a run-down restaurant.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Latka worries that Simka's wacky behavior might cost her the right to remain permanently in America.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies embark on a frantic race against time when they team up in a wild nonstop drive from New York to Miami so that Alex can see his long-lost daughter on her twenty-minute layover at the airport in the premiere episode of Taxi.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex’s romantic instincts are triggered by the sexy voice at the answering service. Her alluring manner prompts him to arrange a dinner date that turns into a big surprise on Taxi.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A pretty girl has John in a whirl, and his determination to meet her prompts the taxi gang to come up with a surefire line that would unfreeze any woman on earth in Taxi.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine fears the worst when the cabbies invite themselves to her party for her highbrow art world friends who have no clue that she moonlights as a cab driver.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The high-spirited taxi gang helps a jittery Bobby fight potential disappointment when he decides that he will end his stage career if he doesn’t get an acting job before midnight.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas faces deportation unless he marries a U.S. citizen. The taxi gang comes to his rescue by pitching in and hiring a local working girl to be his bride.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: John and his new wife, Suzanne, reach a crisis point in their marriage when one of them must drop out of college due to financial woes.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker gets into a passionate discussion about faith in the power of God versus medicine with a Priest and Jake, Reggie and Bob take a stab at the stock market.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Reggie has a panic attack about where her life is going and Becker confesses that he misses Elizabeth. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker assesses his feelings for Liz when she is offered a new job in Chicago and Linda breaks-up with Gil for lying to her. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John's four attempts to watch the same movie are annoyingly interrupted, Reggie goes back to school and Hattie discovers her husband's infidelity. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John is in an awkward situation when his building super is found dead of natural causes

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker had an ethical decision to make with one of his patients and Reggie is proposed to on her second date with a man. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker is a mentor to a student and Reggie, Bob and Jake come to a standstill in their friendship. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John is accused of being a creature of habit and as a result, tries a new restaurant.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker runs into an old flame and fights with his conscience to spend the night with her because she's a married woman. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker has made a resolution to quit smoking and he announces it to everyone at the diner.

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: Hotellet er åpnet og elleve gjester sjekker inn til sesongens første fest. Foran seg har de uker med hardt spill, sterke følelser, ville fester, kjærlighet, allianser og vanskelige valg.

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: Spillet er i gang! Gjesten på solo er gjenstand for spekulasjon og parene skal gjennom en tillitseremoni. Stoler de på hverandre, eller er det noen som blir fristet til å bytte partner?

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: Parenes troskap settes på prøve idet en ny deltager sjekker inn. På Solo kommer det inn et brev med et hemmelig oppdrag som snur opp-ned på hele hotellet.

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: Det er klart for sesongens første parseremoni. Spillet er i gang for fullt og slue planer legges. En mystisk gjest sjekker inn på Perla.

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: Mayoo har inntatt rollen som rektor mens inspektøren følger nøye med i det parene må opp til eksamen. Hvilken jente blir satt i fare som følge av manglende kunnskap?

programme.title: Paradise Hotel - Sesong 18
programme.desc: En upopulær handling under eksamen skaper splid i den ene alliansen. De «dummeste» på hotellet skal på date med den nye jenta, som må ta et vanskelig valg.

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 1005
programme.desc: Samboerne Linn og Joakim bor i dag i drømmehuset, men det ligger på helt feil sted! Hans Christian møter Christine, som leter etter en ny leilighet med uteområde til katten sin.

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 1006
programme.desc: Christian skal selge leiligheten han har arvet, og Karianne får derfor en helt ny utfordring! Vi møter også tidligere deltagere og får bli med inn i deres nye leiligheter, hus og gårdsbruk.

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 901
programme.desc: Toppblogger Isabel Raad har tidligere leid leilighet for 29 000 kr i måneden. Nå skal hun kjøpe sin aller første bolig, men klarer Karianne å finne noe som kan leve opp til de skyhøye forventningene?

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 902
programme.desc: Amalie Snøløs drømmer om å kjøpe et oppussingsobjekt! Men har hun egentlig tid til det? Solfrid og André har spurt Hans Christian om hjelp til å finne drømmehuset, men ikke for enhver pris.

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 903
programme.desc: Hanne kjøpte drømmeboligen som viste seg å være infisert av både rotter og skjeggkre. Etter sitt forrige bomkjøp håper hun at Hans Christian kan hjelpe. Og Christian skal kjøpe sin første leilighet.

programme.title: Boligjakten: Episode 904
programme.desc: Positivitetsblogger Petter ønsker å bo nærmere sentrum, men klarer Karianne å finne den perfekte guttebula? Camilla og Jon Erik trenger mer plass og får hjelp av Hans Christian.

programme.title: Camp Kulinaris: Episode 416
programme.desc: Etter årets første underkjente servering i går, står det konkurranse på programmet i dag. I lærlingkampen står det en Camp kulinaris-klassiker på menyen.

programme.title: Camp Kulinaris: Episode 418
programme.desc: Det er menysmakingstid på Camp kulinaris. Fetisha har gitt Ole ansvaret for en hel rett alene og er usikker på det valget. En av rettene blir kritisert av Kjartan og en konflikt oppstår i kjølvannet.

programme.title: Camp Kulinaris: Episode 621
programme.desc: Mutta og Monica blir ekstra glade over denne ukens meny, men det nærmer seg finale og Kjartan gir deltakerne en ekstra utfordring på kjøkkenet.

programme.title: Camp Kulinaris: Episode 710
programme.desc: Frustrasjonen er stor hos ett av lagene når én deltaker sover bort formiddagen i stedet for å hjelpe til. Begge lag gjør store feil, og de to restaurantsjefene frykter å måtte lage årets snack.

programme.title: Camp Kulinaris: Episode 704
programme.desc: Første deltaker elimineres fra Camp kulinaris. Det er klart for en fysisk krevende lærlingkamp før to deltakere møtes i årets første kokkekamp - der én må overvinne sin egen frykt for å lykkes.

programme.title: Camp Kulinaris: Episode 428
programme.desc: Siste dag før finaleuka setter i gang på Camp Kulinaris og i dag må en reise hjem. Etter gårsdagens mislykkede servering er restaurantsjef Benedicte automatisk førstelærling.

programme.title: Charterfeber: Episode 905
programme.desc: Svein får hjelp av det fastboende kunstnerparet Tara og Rune, da han trenger inspirasjon til sin kommende reisetips-bok, mens damene fra Buskerud tester ut hotellets fasiliteter.

programme.title: Charterfeber: Episode 1105
programme.desc: Harstad-familien fortsetter på den strabasiøse grotteturen sin. Haider går selvsikkert inn som kaptein på det åpne hav. Jane og gjengen ankommer Gran Canaria, mens Cathrin og Odin prøver seg på minigolf.

programme.title: Charterfeber: Episode 1010
programme.desc: Fred Åge og kameraten Sven Erik tar turen til en fjelllandsby, hvor de møter Bjørge og Tove. Gjengen fra Radio Kvinesdal ankommer, og første radiosending går ikke helt som planlagt.

programme.title: Charterfeber: Episode 1312
programme.desc: Pensjonistene nyter en hyggelig middag på den lokale yacht-klubben, mens Harstad-familien leier bil og legger ut på en liten shoppingrunde, klare for å prute seg til gode kupp.

programme.title: Charterfeber: Episode 1107
programme.desc: Fred Åge og Monsen ankommer Tenerife. Svein og Lillian får hemmeligheter avslørt hos en spåkone. Gutta i Radio Kvinesdal koser seg på romantisk date. Lars får sjansen til å vise frem sine kjøreegenskaper.

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing: Episode 707
programme.desc: I Rennebu ligger det en gård med en gammel tømmerhytte som ser ut som et feriehus i Karibia. Gutta vil finne tilbake til husets sjel, så her må de tenke kreativt.

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing: Episode 708
programme.desc: Fra stuevinduet i årets siste hytte ser man rett opp mot Gaustatoppen. Gutta får seg en stor overraskelse når de skal sette inn større vindusflater, men hytta blir likevel lun og koselig med nærkontakt til naturen.

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing: Episode 801
programme.desc: I sesongens første episode går turen til vakre Orre på Jæren utenfor Stavanger. Her er det planer om store forandringer. Halvor tar gutta med på surfing, og bofasilitetene denne uka er nok litt utenom det vanlige.

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing: Episode 802
programme.desc: Gutta drar til avsidesliggende Ytre Fure på Stadlandet. Her skal de forvandle en gammel sveitservilla til et idyllisk og praktisk sommerhus. Halvor lærer Ole å legge tapet, og det skjer også et spennende prosjekt under det gamle fjøset.

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing: Episode 803
programme.desc: Urke er ei lita bygd like ved Hjørundfjorden. Her ligger Eventyrlig Oppussings første «A-frame»-hytte. Praktiske oppbevaringsløsninger står på lista, og Ole lager en hev/senk-trapp man aldri har sett maken til.

programme.title: Eventyrlig oppussing: Episode 804
programme.desc: Gutta reiser til Finnmark for første gang, nærmere sagt Bugøynes. Her sammenlignes hytta med «huset på prærien» og stikkord som «ville vesten» og «ralph lauren» setter stilen. Ole får lekt seg med gamle materialer, og Halvor setter malingsrekord.

programme.title: Luksusfellen: Episode 2403
programme.desc: Råneren Mathias fra Bergen er en svoren bilentusiast, og med denne dyre hobbyen – i kombinasjon med høyt forbruk – har inkassokravene nå virkelig begynt å ta han igjen. Når han i tillegg sliter med å holde på jobber, har samboeren nå sett seg lei.

programme.title: Luksusfellen: Episode 2404
programme.desc: Tina bor i Trondheim med samboer og barn, og har i dag grei kontroll over egen økonomi. Problemet er bare at hun tidligere i livet opplevde at ekskjæresten tok opp forbrukslån i hennes navn.

programme.title: Luksusfellen: Episode 2405
programme.desc: Johnny bor i Sandnes sammen med kjæresten Savina. Han har hatt dårlig kontroll på egen økonomi hele livet, og nå vippser han hele lønnen sin til Savina hver måned, for at hun skal forvalte pengene hans på fornuftig vis.

programme.title: Luksusfellen: Episode 2406
programme.desc: Iselin bor i Vear, og har nylig gjennomgått et tøft samlivsbrudd. Selv om Iselin nå er skilt, er hun fortsatt gift økonomisk – hun og eksmannen deler nemlig store forbrukslån sammen, og skyhøye renter gjør at lånene bare stiger og stiger.

programme.title: Luksusfellen: Episode 2407
programme.desc: Michael bor i Skien, jobber som elektriker og spiller i et kristent poprock band. Da han var 18 år tok han opp sitt første lån og istedenfor å stoppe der, fortsatte han å bruke penger han ikke hadde.

programme.title: South Park: Den røde homsemedalje
programme.desc: Hele byen South Park deltar i den årlige gjenskapningen av slag fra borgerkrigen.

programme.title: South Park: Dø, hippie, dø

programme.title: South Park: Zimmermans verdenskrig

programme.title: South Park: South Parks fantastiske påskespesial

programme.desc: Da moren får en ny jobb blir Cartman misfornøyd.

programme.title: Paradise: Episode 233

programme.title: South Park: Kristne rocker hardt
programme.desc: Cartman er fast bestemt på å få platinaplate med sitt nye kristne band Faith+1.

programme.title: South Park: Moro med kampsportvåpen
programme.desc: Guttene kjøper våpen på et loppemarked og blir forvandlet til japanske anime-krigere, med alvorlige konsekvenser for stakkars Butters.

programme.title: South Park: Dø, hippie, dø
programme.desc: Cartman blir arrestert for å fange hippier, men når South Park blir oversvømmet av hippier, vender de seg til ham og hans uvanlige metoder for hippiefjerning.

programme.title: South Park: Thanksgiving på History Channel
programme.desc: Når gutta prøver å lære seg alt om Thanksgiving fra historiekanalen på TV, blir de fanget i et mysterium som involverer utenomjordiske, Natalie Portman og kalkunfyll!

programme.title: South Park: Black Friday
programme.desc: Gutta forbereder seg på å slåss mot andre kunder på første dag i julehandelen.

programme.title: South Park: Gjennom ræv og ild
programme.desc: 'Svartefredag' nærmer seg og kampen om spillkonsollene blir mer intens - og siden prinsessen Kenny svek Cartman, er han ute etter hevn.

programme.title: South Park: Pupper og drager
programme.desc: Dørene til kjøpesenteret skal endelig åpnes for det største 'Svartefredagsalget' i historien. Gutta er uenige om hvilket spillutstyr de skal kjøpe, og et blodig slag vil avgjøre om Xbox eller Sony blir vinneren.

programme.title: South Park: Glade hologram
programme.desc: Cartman trender, mens resten av USA forbereder seg til det største juleprogrammet på tv noensinne.

programme.title: South Park: Bæsjeproblemer
programme.desc: Mr Hankeys støtende oppførsel får ham nesten avskjediget som leder for det årlige julespillet. Samtidig blir South Park grunnskoles Strong Woman og rektor PKs forhold utfordret på helt nye måter.

programme.title: South Park: Sykkelparaden
programme.desc: Guttenes vinnersjanse i sykkelparaden settes på spill når Kenny trekker seg.

programme.title: South Park: Julesnø
programme.desc: Julenissen dreper all glede under julefeiringen i byen.

programme.title: South Park: Starvin' Marvin
programme.desc: I en reklamepause under 'Terrance and Phillip' bestemmer guttene seg for å adoptere et etiopisk barn for å få en gratis klokke.

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Hankey, julebæsjen
programme.desc: Borgermesteren vil lage en høytidsfeiring som ikke støter noen, og Kyle tror han har løsningen.

programme.title: Tungsten Talk
programme.desc: Glen Durrant joins Chris Murphy on Tungsten Talk to reflect on his career.

programme.title: Scott Mitchell- On the Farm
programme.desc: Join Scott Mitchell off the oche for an exclusive behind-the-scenes look at life on his farm.

programme.desc: Featuring Jonny Clayton, Joe Cullen, Fallon Sherrock and More!

programme.title: Darts

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam attempts to make the office feel more inviting since Andi will be joining him at work every day; Lowell hides a life-changing secret.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi have a disagreement at the office and must prevent it from becoming a problem at home; the kids try to extend Lowell's stay at their house after realizing he's an amazing cook.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam sees a kid push Emme, he convinces Teddy to defend his younger sister; Adam and Don persuade Joe to hire a nurse to help him after he has his upcoming knee surgery.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and the guys visit Lowell at his new bachelor pad and start using it to get away from their home lives; Andi keeps pushing Adam for her own desk at the office.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam catches Kate sneaking back into the house at night, he is determined to fix the behavior with old-school parenting tactics; Andi is dismayed when she can't find many baby pictures of Emme.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi go to great lengths to secure a loan to fix an unexpected issue on their flip house.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi are eager to book a night away in a hotel after Teddy keeps sleeping in their bed; Kate is allowed to stay home alone but doesn't follow Adam and Andi's strict rules.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam offers to go on a vegan diet with Kate in an effort to bond with her, his love of meat proves a hard habit to break.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: After Adam throws out his back on his 50th birthday, he is still determined to take a dirt bike excursion and check it off his bucket list; Don and Adam give out bonuses at work.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam gets jealous when Teddy names Andi as his hero for a school essay.

programme.title: Snooker 900
programme.desc: Snooker 900 is the new fast, 15-minute version of snooker. It features legends like Jimmy White and showcases top amateurs, juniors, women, and disabled players.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Steve Forrest guest stars as a gunfighter whose speed is legendary but who now is trying to live a quiet, nonviolent life with Teresa, the girl he loves.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Hiding Behind a Star
programme.desc: Earp needs new deputies so Doc Holliday recommends his former brother-in-law for the job even though his sister-in-law hates Doc.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Judge Roy Bean names his town after a British actress who he loves but has never met.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Wyatt Earp Rides Shotgun
programme.desc: Earp is asked by Wells Fargo to ride shotgun to help catch the Purvis gang. Earp agrees but a grandmother complicates the situation when she refuses to wait for a later stage.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Hang 'Em High
programme.desc: Bat is forced to hang Dal who he believes is innocent. Dal has been framed by the White Cap vigilantes and Earp wants to stop them.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A lawyer (Ronald Reagan) sues a man who killed a boy's dog.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Nineteen Notches on His Gun
programme.desc: The Dutch Henry gang is rustling cattle and killing ranch hands on some of the smaller ranches around town. Sheriff Bassett is sick so Earp and Bat decide to go undercover into the gang.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Threat
programme.desc: En skandaløs avisoverskrift kobler kongressmedlemmet McVane til en ung jente i Washington. Han innser at Alexis står bak. Kirby finner ut at hun er gravid.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Cabin
programme.desc: Når Blake får vite at Stevens advokat, Chris, har flyttet sammen med sønnen, sverger han på kjempe for omsorgen for lille Danny.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Arrest
programme.desc: Krystle og Alexis, som er innesperret en brennende hytte langt uti skogen, finner ut at døren er låst – fra utsiden. Mark redder de to kvinnene på dramatisk vis.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Bungalow
programme.desc: Mark blir siktet for drap og brannstiftelse. Alexis forteller Blake og politiet at han ville hevne seg. De andre mistenkte i saken, McVane, Hess og Adam, blir avhørt og løslatt.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Note
programme.desc: Alexis får en beskjed fra avdøde Joseph – han startet brannen for å drepe henne. Claudia slipper ut fra sanatoriet. Steven og Blake slåss om lille Danny.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Hearing - Part 1
programme.desc: Kirby angriper Alexis og krever å vite hvorfor Joseph ville drepe henne. I rettsaken om foreldreretten til Danny, vitner Alexis mot Blake, som blir rasende.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Tournament Of Champions - PT2
programme.desc: World Poker Tour ignited the global poker boom with a unique television show based on a series of high-stakes tournaments. WPT events turned Gus Hansen into the Great Dane and Daniel Negreanu into Kid Poker, and created dozens of poker-made millionaires.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Tournament Of Champions - PT3
programme.desc: World Poker Tour ignited the global poker boom with a unique television show based on a series of high-stakes tournaments. WPT events turned Gus Hansen into the Great Dane and Daniel Negreanu into Kid Poker, and created dozens of poker-made millionaires.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: LAPC Rockstar Energy High Roller - Part 1
programme.desc: Maria Ho, Alex Foxen, Nick Petrangelo, and WPT Champion Sam Panzica are all at this $25,000 buy-in final table looking to win $424,000 and this exclusive title at Commerce Casino in Los Angeles.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: LAPC Rockstar Energy High Roller - Part 2
programme.desc: Maria Ho, Alex Foxen, Nick Petrangelo, and WPT Champion Sam Panzica are all at this $25,000 buy-in final table looking to win $424,000 and this exclusive title at Commerce Casino in Los Angeles.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: LAPC Rockstar Energy High Roller - Part 3
programme.desc: Maria Ho, Alex Foxen, Nick Petrangelo, and WPT Champion Sam Panzica are all at this $25,000 buy-in final table looking to win $424,000 and this exclusive title at Commerce Casino in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Twenties: The Pilot
programme.desc: Den ambisiøse manusforfatteren Hattie finner seg kastet ut, arbeidsløs og ulykkelig. Så løper hun på den berømte forfatteren og produsenten Ida B, hvis serie Cocoa's Butter Hattie has fulgt i sosiale medier.

programme.title: Twenties: I've Got The World On A String
programme.desc: Hattie navigerer kontorpolitikk på sin første dag som forfatterassisten. Samtidig krangler Marie med sin spillende mor mens Nia sjanser på en date med yogaeleven sin.

programme.title: Twenties: Happy Place
programme.desc: Hattie leter forgjeves etter et velvalgt sted å skrive. Marie presses mot den eneste svarte studiosjefen. Nia spør seg om hun har valgt riktig karriere.

programme.title: Twenties: You Know How I Like It
programme.desc: Tiden er imot Hattie når hun slår seg gjennom Hollywood på ulike jobber fra Ida B. Nia kjemper med en prøvespilling.

programme.title: Boomerang: Hot Sex
programme.desc: Crystal reiser alene til Paris for å feire sin nye jobb. Først mer interessert i sosiale medier, oppdager hun eventyr og romantikk uten mobilen. Hun blir en ny sterk, sexy, uavhengig Crystal, som ikke defineres av vennene sine.

programme.title: Boomerang: Feels Like Heaven
programme.desc: Davis har en sjudagers religiøs faste og går inn i en drømmeaktig tilstand. Han følger heltens reise for å finne Gud for å få de svarene han søker.

programme.title: Boomerang: End of the Road
programme.desc: Sesongen slutter i at gjengen omgås. Men ved nærmere øyensyn, er de kanskje ikke de samme som de en gang var. Kanskje de virkelig har vokst fra hverandre.

programme.title: Being Mary Jane: No Eggspectations
programme.desc: Kara foreslår en levende versjon av 'Talk Back', men verken hun eller Mary Jane er forberedt på nyheten dr. Marrs kommer med. Cameron og Niecy forhandler om hans gjenkomst i hennes liv.

programme.title: Being Mary Jane: Pulling The Trigger
programme.desc: Mary Janes hormoner kommer ut av kontroll når hun får en hCG-sprøyte, noe som gir eggløsning om 36 timer. Hun tilbys en eksklusiv historie av Sheldon DeWitt, noe som presser hennes allerede anstrengte vennskap med Lisa.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 6
programme.desc: Richard slår seg løs i en Veritas, en sprø sportsbil fra Tyskland, og Boris Johnson er kveldens stjerne i en billigbil.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 7
programme.desc: Storbritannias fremste motorshow, med utfordringer, vurderinger og kjendisgjester.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 1
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond og James May setter seg fore å finne ut hvordan Top Gear kunne ha sett ut for 60 år siden.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 2
programme.desc: Top Gear-teamet prøver å finne den perfekte bil for 17-åringer ved å takle forsikringsselskaper, reparasjoner og en gjørmete festivalparkeringsplass.

programme.title: Top Gear: Episode 3
programme.desc: Jeremy, Richard og James konfronterer kredittkrisa og prøver å finne tre små biler med fornuftige priser.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 403
programme.desc: Dr. Martin Ellingham er overrasket over å finne Louise og Joan utenfor døren før åpningstid. Louisa er bekymret for at noe er galt og vil ha Martins bekreftelse på at alt er i orden.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 404
programme.desc: Dr Martin Ellingham blir tilkalt til Louisas nye hjem etter at hun nesten besvimte mens hun flyttet møbler.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 405
programme.desc: En familie saksøker Joan etter at hun har sperret inn deres svært plagsomme barn i hønsegården.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 406
programme.desc: Dr Martin Ellingham møter Portwenns nye jordmor, Molly, som skal ta seg av Louisa. Martin liker ikke yrket, og de finner ikke tonen med hverandre.

programme.title: Doc Martin: Episode 407
programme.desc: Dr Martin Ellingham oppsøker Louisa for å prate om sin nye kirurgjobb i London, men de blir avbrutt av Bert, som ønsker å planlegge en baby shower for Louisa.
