programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' går Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood smertefullt på hodet i 'Stup hvor som helst', kaster seg på sykkelen i 'Pedaltrøkk rett i pølen' og blir vitner til tupékatastrofer i 'Tupé på vift'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood hva som skjer når du ikke lander støtt i 'Ustø landing', sjekker de mest lojale kjærestene i 'Jeg er opptatt' og avslutter med uheldige campere i 'Glamourløs camping'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' krasjer Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood med stil idet de 'Flyr over styret', spaserer på løs grunn i 'Fallgulv' og drar for å gjøre innkjøp altfor sent i 'Grubutikken'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' hogger Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ned trær med noen 'Tømmerflopper', får seg noen 'Luftige-svev-madrasser' og har det kjempekult på 'Rockeførskolen'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXIV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' havner Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood i 'Faresoner', avklarer ulike situasjoner av 'Glassknas' og oppnår betydelig høyde med 'Flygebiler'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' møter Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood ufokuserte fedre med 'Distraherte pappahjerner', driver høyt spill i golf med 'Djerv gjenvinning' og viser sine fiseferdigheter når de utfører 'Gasstriks'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppsummerer Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood kostnadene ved å ha barn i 'Dyre barn', snubler over sirkusartister som lager 'Plutselig sirkus' og opplever slitsomme feiringer med 'Dårlige bursdager'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' denger Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood hodet i veggen som første trekk i 'Kraftskaller', ødelegger golfutstyret sitt i 'På tide med nye køller' og møter farene ved å benytte 'Samkjøring om natten'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' utforsker Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood ildidrettens verden i 'Flammesport', finner ut hvor farlige dører kan være i 'Helt av hengslene' og blir overrasket over noen svært 'Uventede raketter'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' krasjer Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood inn i ubevegelige gjenstander i 'Parkert smerte', oppdager at trafikkflyten kan påvirkes av bisarre årsaker i 'Motorveiforsinkelser' og opplever farene ved 'Olme okser'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' støter Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood på farlige voltere uten 'Saltobevissthet', opplever smerten ved knuste tohjulinger i Billigsykler' og oppdager at heis og fyll ikke går så godt sammen i 'Heisa-heistur'.

programme.title: Andromeda: Dyrets mage
programme.desc: Et mytologisk rommonster prøver å spise Andromeda.

programme.title: Andromeda: Ridderen, døden og djevelen
programme.desc: Dylan prøver å frigjøre en flåte med fangede skip, men flåten er ikke sikker på at den vil bli frigjort. AI-ene deres frykter at nye kapteiner vil slavebinde dem.

programme.title: Andromeda: Immaculate Perception
programme.desc: Genitter angriper Tyrs kone og koloni.

programme.title: Andromeda: Tunnel ved enden av lyset
programme.desc: Med femti partier ombord er Dylan vert for signeringen av New Commonwealth-charteret, men oppdager snart at det er inntrengere som har til hensikt å stoppe signeringen.

programme.title: Andromeda: Hvis hjulet er løst
programme.desc: Beka og Tyr blir overtatt av energien fra en dimensjonal tunnel. Dylan, Trance og Harper må redde dem før de ødelegger skipet.

programme.title: Andromeda: Skårene i Rimni
programme.desc: Dylan er innrammet for drap og må rydde navnet sitt mens han finner bitene i en vase som sies å gi eieren kosmos 'velsignelser.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within a Hair
programme.desc: In 1996, Indiana police identified Richard Alexander as the “River Park Rapist” who assaulted four women that year. Later, DNA analysis casts doubt on his conviction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Evidence
programme.desc: After the 1996 murder of Seattle residents Raquel Rivera and Jay Johnson, evidence from the couple's dog eventually ties one of the murderers to the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bitter Pill to Swallow
programme.desc: Soon after becoming pregnant by Dr. Maynard Muntzing, firefighter Michelle Baker's health quickly deteriorates. Eventually, she raises suspicions that Muntzing is doing her harm.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sip of Sins
programme.desc: In the 1980s, a trio of unsolved murders occurred in Wichita Falls, Texas. Later, a fourth murder from the same time period provided the police with far more than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Telltale Tracks
programme.desc: The disappearance of Philadelphia college athlete Aimee Willard is investigated after her car is found on the roadside. When her body is found, the police find unusual marks and DNA evidence that eventually lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ghost in the Machine
programme.desc: While investigating the apparent overdose suicide of Reverend Bill Guthrie's wife, detectives recover incriminating files from Bill's computer and learn of his infidelity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dressed to Kill
programme.desc: After 6-year-old Michelle Lee Dorr went missing, her father confessed to murdering her. But investigators soon poked holes in his story, leaving the case unsolved for 14 years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Storage
programme.desc: The 1987 disappearance of Houston resident Tracy Jo Shine is recalled. The investigation went cold until 2000 when a "cold case squad" learned that the woman's ex-boyfriend Michael Neal had bragged about killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Metal Business
programme.desc: Doctors cannot pinpoint the source of a businessman's illness.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Print Conviction
programme.desc: The 1996 investigation into 48-year-old Martha Hansen's murder is helped by a legal requirement that bars have video cameras installed on the premises.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 7
programme.desc: This episode includes: Christmas Party Murder, Update: Nudist Fraud, Gypsy Fraud, Drummond's Dollars & UD and Coma Recovery.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 8
programme.desc: This episode includes: Sonny Liston, Update: Locust Grove, Sharon's Search and Campbell Kidnapping.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 9
programme.desc: This episode includes: Mental Daze, Steve's Flag & UD, Spooks and Stalker Reward.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 10
programme.desc: This episode includes: Dead Ringer & UD, Woody's Millions, Plummer's Booty and Jim and Tammi.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Episode: 11
programme.desc: This episode includes: Fool's Gold, Update: Baltimore Babynapping, Suicide Homicide, Baby Broker and Donald Eugene Webb.

programme.title: The FBI Files: John Gotti: Convicted
programme.desc: John Gotti was ambitious, powerful and ruthless. He ruled with flash and conspicuous style, playing celebrity with the media and cat and mouse with the FBI. They called John Gotti the Teflon Don. Serious charges just wouldn't stick.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Polly Klaas: Kidnapped
programme.desc: On October 1, 1993, a stranger abducted 12-year-old Polly Klaas during a slumber party in her home.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Firefight
programme.desc: In Miami, a gang of robbers targeted banks and armored cars. They carried assault weapons and weren't afraid to use them. They struck during the day, and sometimes twice a day. For awhile, they seemed unstoppable.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Brutal Abduction
programme.desc: A Chicago street gang thought they had figured out how to kidnap people for ransom again and again, and never get caught. But their one mistake was they underestimated the Federal Bureau of Investigation.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Above the Law
programme.desc: California Highway Patrolman George Gwaltney discovered the body of 23-year-old Robin Bishop near her car on a remote desert highway.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Broken Trust
programme.desc: A New York homebuyer gets more than he bargained for when a house inspection turns up a mummified corpse. For decades, the crime had gone undiscovered. The victim unmissed, and the killer unpunished.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Tools Of Death
programme.desc: Tool marking: A tool used to commit a crime can often be the same tool used to solve it. The pattern a machine leaves on an item, the unusual way a tool crimps a wire, and even something as innocuous as the shape of a wood chip can lead to a killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Out To Kill
programme.desc: An abandoned car outside Philadelphia brings heartbreak to a family and terror to a community. A young woman is dead, the killer gone. But the marks of his passage remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Death Grip
programme.desc: Fingerprinting: The Identification Division of the FBI relies on fingerprints as one of the most effective ways to identify criminals.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Blood Money
programme.desc: Some people murder for love. But these killers did it for the money. When greed is the motive, investigators must make every clue pay off.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Haunted escape room at Moviescape - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to a haunted escape room attraction and although the sets are dressed to scare, something more sinister seems to be lurking here. Will Sean escape unscathed tonight?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Haunted escape room at Moviescape - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation of the escape rooms and investigates the haunted bible and radio. Prepare for a fright when Sean and Paul join forces and witness paranormal activity firsthand

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Evil Spirit in the Cave
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension face a dark sinister ghost inside haunted Caves. Crank caves based in St Helens are said to be the most haunted in the area. Strange paranormal spirits spooky anyone that ventures inside.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: High Spirits at The Gothic Mansion
programme.desc: Bex and Sean investigate a haunting inside a gothic mansion, that is said to be haunted by the former owner of the building.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: Spirits Flying High at Speke Aerodrome
programme.desc: The team head to Speke Airport to investigate claims that some of the aircraft located there have ghostly passengers still aboard, waiting to take flight.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Forbidden Love
programme.desc: At twelve, Crystal dated 20-year-old Matt and was pregnant at 13. He served 15 months for sexual assault on a minor and is a registered sex offender. Is this inappropriate love or a misunderstanding?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: 16-Year-Old Surrogate Stole Our Baby
programme.desc: Sarah was Dawn and Derek's surrogate, but took off while five months pregnant. Sarah claims that they took advantage of her. Who are the baby's rightful parents?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: She's a Crazy Stalker
programme.desc: Victor met Jasmine a few years ago but claimed they never had sex. Jasmine claims that they fell in love and want him back! Who's telling the truth?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: These DNA Results Will Floor You
programme.desc: Joe met “Jessica” on a phone chat line. A few months later, she revealed she was pregnant. Then, Chastity claims that her ex Trent fathered her child. What will the DNA results reveal?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Punch a Woman like I Punch a Man
programme.desc: Chelse claims that her 19-month-old daughter is Malcolm's and that he beat her while pregnant. Amber and Phillip accuse each other of being abusive and want the polygraph tests to prove their claims!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Slept Around: Who's the Dad?
programme.desc: Tasha wants to prove to her ex Martin that he fathered her four-year-old. Martin's sister says that the child might belong to her boyfriend Terrence. Who's the real father?

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood From A Stone
programme.desc: A bystander receives a deadly head injury during a roadside altercation, but the stakes are raised when his body disappears from the scene. When a toddler is kidnapped for ransom Kenda joins forces with an undercover team in a desperate race against time.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Eyes of a Child
programme.desc: A loving, churchgoing grandmother is found stabbed to death in her apartment, leaving Joe Kenda to wonder what sort of monster could do such a thing.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: City Of Fear
programme.desc: When a spate of violent robberies spreads terror across the city, Kenda and the major crimes unit are called in to bring the masked gunman to justice.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Setup
programme.desc: Douglas Warren stumbles into a downtown bar with a gunshot wound to the neck and bleeds out on the floor. Kenda must conduct a risky sting operation and launch an interstate manhunt.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Dead Weight
programme.desc: A seemingly random attack leaves Mary Moebus dead, and police flummoxed by a daunting field of suspects. But when Lt Joe Kenda uncovers a cache of new evidence, he realizes someone’s been lying.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Paramedics respond to a mother in distress: one of her infant twin girls hasn’t woken up. By the time help arrives, it’s too late. But there is no apparent cause of death.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A hiker stumbles across a man's dead body in the woods. The victim's brother is convinced he was murdered. Dr. G must get to the bottom of this case. Was foul play really involved?

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: A hotel clerk calls 9-1-1 complaining of severe facial trauma, but he has no recollection of what happened and dies soon after. Police are counting on Dr. G to aid them in this investigation.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Dr. G has a challenge on her hands: a victim's body spent days decaying before it was found, and decomposition could get in the way of her investigation.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Vanished
programme.desc: A daring kidnapping and a bizarre ransom note baffled Mississippi authorities. The victim was the wife of a wealthy businessman. A list of 12 names and a few drops of blood were the only clues to her fate.

programme.title: My Haunted House: Pest House and Sleepwalkers
programme.desc: An earthquake triggers terrifying activity in a house with a dark past. A young woman sees visions in her sleep that lead her to an abandoned hospital.

programme.title: My Haunted House: The Whispering and Ethel
programme.desc: After returning home for her mother's funeral, a young woman is terrorized by visions from her past. A musician finds a suicide note that reveals the dark history of his new house.

programme.title: My Haunted House: The Boy Did It and Frozen Forest
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy claims that his imaginary friend pushed his sister through a second story window. A newly divorced woman relives the terrifying history of the remote cabin she's rented.

programme.title: My Ghost Story: It Watches Me While I Sleep
programme.desc: The suburban house of two young cousins is filled with scary encounters after a demonic ceramic giraffe is brought into their home.

programme.title: My Ghost Story: The Axe Murderer
programme.desc: An unknown axe murderer still stalks a family he brutally murdered a century ago and then next-door a spirit with a deadly secret haunts a young couple. An off the beaten path bar is stocked with other worldly spirits.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Dark Backward
programme.desc: Trance går gjennom noen forskjellige scenarier og prøver å finne en der mannskapet hennes ikke dør.

programme.title: Mutant X: No Exit
programme.desc: En mutant som har muligheten til å feste med hvilken som helst datamaskin med tankene sine, som er lammet etter et møte med teamet, tar over Sanctuarys datamaskiner.

programme.title: Mutant X: Brother's Keeper
programme.desc: Mutant X-teamet lærer om Lexas fremmede tvillingbror når han blir hovedmålet for en underjordisk operasjon som høster mutante organer.

programme.title: Mutant X: Possibilities
programme.desc: Brennan og Mutant X-teamet slår seg sammen med en tidsreisende mutant for å spre en bombe som truer ødeleggende konsekvenser.

programme.title: Mutant X: Conspiracy Theory
programme.desc: Mens Brennan og Shalimar etterforsker en mystisk flyulykke, tenker Lexa på fremtiden sin med Mutant X-teamet.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Devil Doll
programme.desc: En guide fører Sydney og Nigel til et uvanlig, underjordisk aztekisk gravkammer. I stedet for en kropp finner de en relikvie.

programme.title: CBS News Roundup
programme.desc: The headlines one needs to know overnight... plus, a roundup of MoneyWatch, health, consumer and up-to-the-minute technology news, the latest weather, and inspiring stories of kindness and hope.

programme.title: CBS News Roundup
programme.desc: The headlines one needs to know overnight... plus, a roundup of MoneyWatch, health, consumer and up-to-the-minute technology news, the latest weather, and inspiring stories of kindness and hope.

programme.title: CBS Morning News
programme.desc: CBS News Mornings is a live daily morning news show that is anchored by Anne-Marie Green. Get ahead on the latest news by streaming the most important national and global stories first thing in the morning.

programme.title: On the Case: Last Dance
programme.desc: A woman's walk home from a night out at a dance club ends in a brutal murder.

programme.title: On the Case: Screams for Justice
programme.desc: The eyewitness accounts of neighbors may help or hinder investigators as they seek to solve the murder of a young woman.

programme.title: On the Case: Race To Judgment
programme.desc: A late-night crash claims the lives of four girls. Texas community is torn apart in the search for justice.

programme.title: On the Case: A Hole in their Hearts
programme.desc: A mother of three disappears from her office in broad daylight, and the case remains open for eight years until two farmers unearth a clue.

programme.title: On the Case: Shattered Hope
programme.desc: Nineteen-year-old Shelley Sikes vanishes one night after her shift, and then her abandoned, blood-streaked car is discovered on a dark roadway.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Arnie Calls It
programme.desc: While training waterbomber captains for the upcoming fire-fighting season, Chief Pilot Arnie makes a surprising decision. AJ becomes a DC-4 captain and ponders whether to accept a promotion.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Under New Management
programme.desc: Joe hires outsider Duane Hicks to help Buffalo navigate the future and coach Mikey. Gord and Sean's DC-3 delivery mission to the High Arctic goes awry when blizzard conditions and a broken oil cooler force an emergency landing.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Dambusters
programme.desc: Buffalo gets into the stunt flying business when veteran pilot Arnie flies the DC-4 for the re- enactment scene of a famous WWII bombing raid.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Chuck Walks
programme.desc: Critical of the many stops and starts in the Electra program, and frustrated with the constant drama at Buffalo, Chuck quits. Joe clashes with the maintenance department when a series of delays puts the sale of an old Canso waterbomber in jeopardy.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Gear Up, Gear Down
programme.desc: Frustrated with her lack of flying and stuck in a rut as a courier driver, Audrey decides her time at Buffalo is over.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Big Boost
programme.desc: When a ferry breakdown causes a gasoline shortage in Yellowknife, new manager Duane begs Chuck to return and prepare the Electra for a fuel haul.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Dr. Charles Sophy, Drew's News
programme.desc: Dr. Charles Sophyis joining Drew. Plus, an all-new Drew-gooderfeaturing a hero mailman. Drew and Ross Mathewsare serving the news sunny-side upin an all-newDrew's News!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's Merrymore X People Magazine Giveaway Show
programme.desc: Drew & Ross Mathews host Drew MerryMore X People Magazine Holiday Giveaway. Studio audience of Drew-gooders get $300K in gifts. Drew highlights Drew-Gooders making difference in community.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Kristina Zias, Drew's News
programme.desc: Kristina Zias talks nostalgic fashion trends and wedding etiquette with Drew & Ross Mathews. Brendan Fraser's comeback and scientific reasons behind listening to sad songs on Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Mindy Kaling, Drew's News
programme.desc: Mindy Kaling talks holiday prep with kids, shares behind-the-scenes stories from "The Office" and "Oceans 8" and more. Drew & Ross Mathews cover snooze button science, dating ghosting debate, and saving a NY deli on Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew's News, Money-Saving Holiday MealFor Next Gathering
programme.desc: Pilar Valdes and Drew share money-saving holiday meal. Drew & Ross Mathews talk empowering single moms, Greta Gerwig's thoughts on a movie, and feature Drew-crime segment with two great grandmas stopping a purse snatcher. (200)

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Aubrey Plaza, Savannah Guthrie
programme.desc: "Today" co-anchor Savannah Guthrie is serving the news sunny-side up with Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk and dishing on her new series "Princess Power." Aubrey Plaza stops by to chat about the follow-up to "The Return of the Christmas Witch."

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Gabe LaBelle, Chef Melissa King
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are hitting the headlines in an all-new Drew's News. Drew chats with "The Fabelmans" star Gabe LaBelle who shares what it was like working with and portraying a young Steven Spielberg. Chef Melissa King joins Drew in the kitchen.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Emily in Paris" Cast
programme.desc: The cast of "Emily in Paris" including Lily Collins, Ashley Park, Philippine Leroy-Beaulieu and Lucas Bravo stop by to chat about the new season. The cast is also participating in an "Emily in Paris" style makeover for a deserving audience member.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Drew & A with Cast of "Emily in Paris," Pilar Valdes
programme.desc: "Emily in Paris" stars Lily Collins, Ashley Park, Philippine Leroy-Beaulieu and Lucas Bravo are joining Drew for a round of Drew & A. Pilar Valdes is joining Drew in the kitchen to whip up some yummy crepes.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Pilar Valdes, Drew's News
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathewsare covering the news including headlines like the study that found mammals who have friends live longer and the ice cream shop in D.C. serving everyone, even those who can't pay! Pilar Valdesis back with a new Pro Tips with Pilar.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show: Tig Notaro, Drew's News
programme.desc: "Your Place or Mine" star Tig Notaro is telling Drew about working with Reese Witherspoon on their new film and the latest season of "The Morning Show."

programme.title: 48 Hours: Blood Feud
programme.desc: Nancy Seaman, an award-winning teacher living in Farmington Hills, Michigan was accused of the 2004 hatchet/stabbing murder of her husband, Bob. She admits killing him, but says it was self-defense, claiming that he had been abusing her for years.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Shadow of Death
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder in Beverly Hills
programme.desc: A report on new details in the ongoing saga of millionaire Robert Durst. The first in-depth look at an unprecedented recent interview that infamous millionaire and alleged killer Robert Durst gave to a prosecutor looking to put him in prison.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Millionaire, The Model, and The Hit-man
programme.desc: An investigation into the relationship between Dino Guglielmelli, a millionaire health supplement distributor, his model wife, Monica Olsen, his business partner Richard Fuhrmann, and the $80,000 "hit" Guglielmelli ordered on his wife.

programme.title: 48 Hours: All American Murder: The Rise and Fall of Aaron Hernandez
programme.desc: What made NFL star Aaron Hernandez kill and kill himself? Best-selling author and "48 Hours" contributor James Patterson unravels Hernandez's complicated and troubling story.

programme.title: Cops: Dishonest Dudes
programme.desc: Torrential rain hampers the pursuit of a fleeing vehicle, a man on a moped is carrying more than he lets on, and a persistent police officer unravels a sketchy man's story.

programme.title: Cops: Fighting to Lose
programme.desc: Shots fired in a park after hours leads to a messy situation for one officer, and a disturbed man with a gun takes responding officers on a harrowing chase.

programme.title: Cops: Mom Still Loves You
programme.desc: Officers track down a suspect who eluded them earlier, a suspicious vehicle takes off at the sight of police, and a man gets busted for possession in front of his mom.

programme.title: Cops: The Young and the Reckless
programme.desc: Police catch up to a man with warrants and a history of resisting arrest, a fidgety driver arouses suspicion, and a minor with beers in his pants has to answer to his mom.

programme.title: Cops: Too Many Cooks
programme.desc: A fleeing driver becomes cooperative once he reaches his destination, a woman gets feisty with police, and police respond to a domestic dispute involving a frying pan.

programme.title: Cops: Second Time Around
programme.desc: Deputies are led on a chase by a driver they pursued just weeks earlier, and a man caught with drugs tries to pin the blame on his girlfriend.

programme.title: Cops: Party in a Box
programme.desc: Officers review dashcam footage after a suspect claims force was used against him unjustly, and a weed enthusiast drops some knowledge on police about the founding fathers.

programme.title: Cops: Two in the Bush
programme.desc: A woman leads police on a dangerous chase, a driver is remorseful for the damage he's caused, and a man's denial of solicitation is undermined by his open fly.

programme.title: Cops: Undeniably Fishy
programme.desc: A man loses his friend and finds trouble, officers stop a vehicle they believe was involved in a shooting, and a suspicious vehicle leads to a suspicious story.

programme.title: Cops: Nothing to See Here
programme.desc: A man's mole gives him away when he tries to fool police with a fake name, a drunken man shows officers he has nothing to hide, and a reckless driver imperils a neighborhood.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Shadow of A Serial Killer: The Sophie Le Tan Case
programme.desc: On September 7, 2018, in Strasbourg, Sophie Le Tan is about to celebrate her 20th birthday with her family.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Pierre and Gabrielle Labrell Case
programme.desc: After an ordinary dinner, Pierre and Gabrielle Labrell suffer severe abdominal pains. Taken to hospital, the couple die several days apart. The food poisoning theory is quickly ruled out and forensic tests show the Labrells were poisoned with arsenic.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Nelly Crémel Case
programme.desc: Nelly Crémel, 39, leaves her home to go jogging. Eight days later, after a vast search campaign, her body is found. There's no doubt that it's murder. The case soon ignites public opinion, even inflaming passions at the highest level of the state.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Drost Notthoff Case
programme.desc: On September 11th 2011, in Èze, near Monaco, the owner of a luxury villa discovers the lifeless hanging body of his tenant, a rich German businessman.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Françoise Desnoue Case
programme.desc: On the evening of August 30st 2013, in a small village of Bougrogne, Éric Desnoue, 52 years old, reports his wife missing to the police. Did Françoise Desnoue run away? Or did she reattempt to kill herself?

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 704
programme.desc: En sommernatt i Värmland bryter det ut slagsmål, hvoretter 21 år gamle Harout mottar et dødelig knivstikk. Politiet får mistanker om at et sjalusidrama kan være nøkkelen til å finne den skyldige.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 504
programme.desc: En sommernatt i 2001 er Gunn Merete Lode på vei hjem etter et venninnetreff i Bryne. I nabolaget sitt blir hun overfalt av en ukjent mann. Situasjonen bli observert av 17 år gamle Øyvind.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 702
programme.desc: Ekteparet Suzanne og Lars lever et stille og rolig liv på landet utenfor Stockholm. Men når Suzanne avlyser en viktig tenniskamp på kort varsel, blir hennes tennispartner mistenksom og varsler politiet.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: Da 32 år gamle Memo plutselig forsvinner, tar vennene hans saken i egne hender og begynner å lete desperat etter ham. Bekymringen forvandles til frykt når letingen fører til urovekkende oppdagelser.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: Natt til 13. februar 2023 rystes den lille bygda Malå i Nord-Sverige av et brutalt angrep. Etter hvert som politiet begynner å nøste opp i saken, dukker det opp mørke hemmeligheter og mistanker mot uventede personer.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 603
programme.desc: Politiet har ikke gitt opp å oppklare dobbeltdrapet i Linköping. Etter en endring i svensk lov i 2019, har politiet nå muligheten til å bruke kommersielle slektsdatabaser for å finne gjerningsmannen.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Stop at Willoughby
programme.desc: Riding home on the train one day, a man falls asleep and dreams it is 1880, and he is entering a small town called Willoughby.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Chaser
programme.desc: A man, desperate to win the affection of a beautiful woman, slips her a love potion. He is overjoyed that the potion works so well...at first.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Passage for Trumpet
programme.desc: A trumpet player who's convinced he'll never amount to anything attempts suicide and finds himself in a world where no one can hear or see him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Elevator/To See the Invisible Man/Tooth and Consequences
programme.desc: Brothers steal growth serum, find tasty web and giant plants/Chaplin invisible for emotional coldness/Dentist wishes to be loved, meets tooth fairy.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Welcome to Winfield
programme.desc: A grim reaper tracking a fleeing young man whose soul he is collecting follows the trail to a town seemingly from the Old West.

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: How iron mined in Minnesota is made into steel; iron weapons revolutionize warfare; military metallurgists customize weapons and demonstrate their firepower; iron magnets.

programme.title: Secret War: The Aristocrat and the Balkan Communists
programme.desc: Fitzroy Maclean, an MP and WWII spy, supported Tito's Communist partisans in Yugoslavia against the Germans, forging a lasting friendship and honored at Tito's funeral post-war.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Belgian Collaborator
programme.desc: Leon Degrelle, a charismatic Belgian leader, joined the Nazis and led Die Wallonien on the Eastern Front. Despite no military background, he earned the Knight's Cross for valor. He recruited 4000 more for the SS, defending Berlin until April 1945.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: The Misfits Gather
programme.desc: Hitler finds his political destiny in post-war Munich. He quickly dominates a fringe party & builds it into the Nazi Party. He recruits infamous men to the cause including Herman Goering & Heinrich Himmler & they plot a coup known as the Beerhall Putsch.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: The Western Allies secure supply routes that will allow them to enter Germany, and the Ardennes counter-offensive fails. The Red Army advances rapidly. The SS implements the Holocaust.

programme.title: World's Messiest Fails
programme.desc: It takes a lot longer to clean up a mess than it does to make it.

programme.title: World's Messiest Fails
programme.desc: Kids, pets, adults, and driving disasters - proof that mess knows no bounds.

programme.title: World's Messiest Fails
programme.desc: Shoppers, drivers, kids and Mother Nature herself all want in on the action.

programme.title: World's Messiest Fails
programme.desc: Pranks gone wrong, restaurant mishaps, party fouls and ocean fails leave behind a giant clean up time.

programme.title: World's Messiest Fails
programme.desc: Watch as air, water, fire, and land collide in a mess of epic proportions!

programme.title: World's Messiest Fails
programme.desc: This holiday season, people are getting exactly what they asked for: a big old mess.

programme.title: World's Messiest Fails
programme.desc: From office oopsies to muddy mayhem, love tangles, and nature's chaos - mess takes the lead!

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.

programme.title: iCarly: En pågående kritiker
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie vil at web-showet deres skal bli anmeldt av 'Nevelocity', en populær webside for slike anmeldelser. Carly drar for å møte Nevel, og det viser seg at han er en irriterende gutt som vil date henne.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg vil bli hos Spencer
programme.desc: Bestefaren til Carly og Spencer kommer på overraskelsesvisitt. Han tror at Spencer er for uansvarlig til å passe på Carly. Carly og vennene hennes må bevise overfor bestefaren at Spencer er i stand til det.

programme.title: iCarly: Rekordforsøket
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie prøver å slå verdensrekorden for den lengste sammenhengende nettvideovisningen. For å klare det, må iCarly gå i over 24 timer i ett kjør.

programme.title: iCarly: En date med Freddie
programme.desc: Valerie er iCarly-fan og ber Freddie på date. Daten går så bra at Freddie begynner å filme Valeries eget webshow. Men når hennes webshow kommer i veien for iCarly, får Freddie problemer.

programme.title: iCarly: En lidenskapelig amatør
programme.desc: Carly inviterer Spencers kunsthelt, Harry Joyner, for å se på Spencers arbeid. Når Harry kaller Spensers ting amatørmessige, føler Spencer at livet har mistet all mening.

programme.title: iCarly: iCarlys største fan
programme.desc: iCarlys største fan, Mandy, blir invitert til showet som enslig studiopuplikum. Mandy viser seg å være mer av en forfølger enn et fan, og de blir nødt til å kvitte seg med henne.

programme.title: iCarly: Kyllinger på rømmen
programme.desc: Carly og Sam starter med å klekke ut kyllinger for et naturfagprosjekt. Kyllingene klekkes tidligere enn ventet og rømmer fra inkubatoren. Nå må Carly, Sam, Freddie og Spencer finne alle kyllingene rundt om i leiligheten.

programme.title: iCarly: Jeg vil ikke krangle
programme.desc: Carly makes Sam en unik iCarly T-skjorte for å markere årsdagen for vennskapet deres. Men når Sam bytter den bort mot konsertbiletter, havner de to vennene i klammeri.

programme.title: iCarly: Dansende drømmer
programme.desc: iCarly ber fansen om å sende inn videoer av dem selv når de danser sine kuleste danser. Over tre tusen danseklipp kommer inn, og Carly, Sam og Freddie prøver å holde seg oppe hele natten for å se på alle videoene.

programme.title: iCarly: Det spøker på Halloween
programme.desc: Carly, Sam og Freddie sender iCarly fra en leilighet som det sies at det spøker i. Når det begynner å skje nifse ting, begynner også vennene å bli redde for at spøkelsesryktene er sanne.

programme.desc: Cheers-gjengen investerer i et nystartet solariumfirma.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Young Dr. Weinstein
programme.desc: Sam stjeler Dianes middagsreservasjon på en fancy restaurant.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Knights of the Scimitar
programme.desc: Diane prøver å gjøre Sam sjalu ved å flørte med en av studentene sine.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Thanksgiving Orphans
programme.desc: Cheers-gjengen har en høsttakkefest hjemme hos Carla.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Everyone Imitates Art
programme.desc: Et magasin avviser Dianes dikt og godtar Sams forfatterskap i stedet.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Book of Samuel
programme.desc: Woody lyver for kjæresten fra hjembyen når hun dukker opp med en annen fyr.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Dance, Diane, Dance
programme.desc: Diane blir lurt til å tro at hun kan bli en stor dansestjerne.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Chambers vs. Malone
programme.desc: Diane lurer Sam til å fri til henne igjen, og denne gang svarer hun ja.

programme.title: Cheers NO: Diamond Sam
programme.desc: Diane kaster forlovelsesringen ut av vinduet når hun tror den er falsk.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Nektet service / Balleskvis
programme.desc: Beavis prøver yogabukser og får dem ikke av. / Guttene oppdager at de har rett til å nekte service til kunder på Burger World.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: The Mystery of Morning Wood / U.S. History
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head try to stay awake all night, in an attempt to discover the secret behind morning wood. / For his oral report on an historical figure, Beavis recounts the valuable lessons he learned one night while eating at Burger World.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: En spirituell reise
programme.desc: Beavis ser ansiktet til Jesus i en nacho-chips. Det sender ham på en episk reise for å finne svar på det store spørsmålet - "Hvorfor får jeg aldri pult?"

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Nose Bleed / Vaya Con Cornholio
programme.desc: Butt-head tries some sadistic home remedies in an attempt to stop Beavis's nosebleed. / When Beavis turns into Cornholio in Burger World, Immigration Officials take him in as a possible illegal alien and try to make sense of his gibberish.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Give Blood / Beware of the Butt (aka Drive-In #1)
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head explore the career possibilities in selling blood. / While causing mischief at a drive-in movie theatre, Beavis & Butt-head experience a new phase of the moon.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Sick / For Better or Verse (aka Haiku)
programme.desc: Suffering from nasty colds, Beavis & Butt-head visit a doctor in hopes of glomming a prescription remedy. / Beavis & Butt-head's school assignment is to write a poem in the venerated Haiku format.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Figure Drawing / Date Bait
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head get to look at real nudes. / The return of Lolita and Tanqueray! Beavis and Butt-head go on their first date, well, almost.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: To teite menn / Fredagsgalskap
programme.desc: Middelaldrende Beavis og Butt-Head oppfyller sin samfunnsplikt som jurymedlemmer./ Beavis og Butt-Head tror feilaktig at de har byttet kropp.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Car Wash / Kidnapped
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head attempt to make some money washing cars. / Beavis & Butt-head decide that kidnapping Stewart would be a quick way to some cash.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Politically Correct / True Crime
programme.desc: To better understand their female classmates, Beavis & Butt-head must get in touch with their feelings. Huh huh, he said "touch." / Beavis & Butt-head unknowingly star in their favorite crime reenactment shows.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: As Westbridge Turns
programme.desc: Sinister plots, tumultuous romance, danger, and intrigue – just another day at Westbridge High, after Sabrina casts a spell wishing for more excitement.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Great Mistake
programme.desc: Sabrina finds herself in a little trouble when she sneaks out of the house after being grounded.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Crucible
programme.desc: Sabrina is put on trial for witchcraft when her class visits historical Salem, Massachusetts.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: The Troll Bride
programme.desc: When Sabrina is tricked into marrying a troll, only a prince – a.k.a. Harvey – can save her.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina Gets Her License (Part 1)
programme.desc: Sabrina's 17th birthday turns stressful when she has to start studying for her witch's license.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina Gets Her License (Part 2)
programme.desc: Sabrina learns about the responsibilities that come with using magic when she earns her witch’s learner’s permit.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Dummy For Love
programme.desc: Sabrina takes advantage of Vice Principal Kraft’s attraction to Aunt Hilda.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Dante’s Inferno
programme.desc: Sabrina learns not to date outside of her realm after a bad evening with a witch boy.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: A Doll’s Story
programme.desc: Babysitting becomes a test of ingenuity when Sabrina’s bratty little cousin turns her into a doll.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina The Boy
programme.desc: The mysteries of men are revealed when Sabrina poses as a boy to figure out how they think.

programme.title: Fem i familien: My Best Friend's Girl
programme.desc: Skippy falls for Alex's girlfriend, Lauren, when he begins counseling her.

programme.title: Fem i familien: 'Til Her Daddy Takes the T-Bird Away
programme.desc: Steven refuses to co-sign on a loan for Mallory's new car.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Simon Says
programme.desc: Jennifer is caught in the middle when she begins working with her inept friend.

programme.title: Fem i familien: All in the Neighborhood - Part 1
programme.desc: Steve and Elyse face bigotry in their own backyard.

programme.title: Fem i familien: All in the Neighborhood - Part 2
programme.desc: The Keatons fight against bigotry in their own neighborhood.

programme.title: Fem i familien: They Can't Take That Away From Me - Part 1
programme.desc: Alex falls for someone else when Lauren leaves town.

programme.title: Fem i familien: They Can't Take That Away From Me - Part 2
programme.desc: Alex is forced to choose between Lauren and his new love.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Rain Forests Keep Falling on My Head
programme.desc: Jennifer becomes obsessed with protecting the environment.

programme.title: Fem i familien: Wrap Around the Clock - Part 1
programme.desc: Andy’s time capsule revives some funny family memories.

programme.title: Key & Peele: East Bowl Rap / West Bowl Rap
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer All-Stars fra East/West bowl som rapper, karene spiller mafioso og de to parkeringstypene har vanskelig for å tro at noen tør å provosere Batmans.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Flicker
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan har en flickerkamp og en MMA-fighter går for langt når han erter motstanderen. Andre sketsjer inkluderer en bryllupsgjest somvil være dj og spille "klassiske" låter.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Terrible Henchman
programme.desc: En nødsituasjon tvinger en mann til å endre morgenritualet sitt, en medforbryter ødelegger for superskurken og Jordan minner Keegan på at han er voksen nå.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Dubstep
programme.desc: President Obama og hans vredeoversetter, Luther, taler til Mitt Romney, vi møter mannen som skulle holde tale etter Martin Luther Kings 'I Have A Dream'-tale, og to venner prater om hva som skjer med bæsjen deres atter at de skyller ned.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Bitch
programme.desc: I denne seriepremierer av komiprogrammet prøver Jordan Peele og Keegan Michael Key å si et forbudt ord om deres kvinner, Lil Wayne venner seg til livet bak lås og slå, og president Obama uttrykker hva han egentlig føler.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Dueling Magical Negroes
programme.desc: Jordan og Keegan spiller to mystikere som kjemper om rettigheten til å gi skarpsindige råd. Andre sketsjer inkluderer Jaden Smith og hans agent som diskuterer et nytt manuskript, og et homsepar som 'feirer' ny lovgivning.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Severed Head Showcase
programme.desc: En gospel-gruppe må øve uten læreren sin, en gjeng krigere feirer en halshugning, en fange prøver å narre fengselsvakten og en ung mann blir konfrontert fordi han bare snakker i floskler.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Old Ladies And Satan
programme.desc: To gamle damer slåss mot Satan, ting går galt når en mann vil kjøpe en ny madrass og gjestene på en klubb tvinges til å se sannheten om seg selv.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Obama Shutdown
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer at Keegan blir litt for høy, en forballspiller som vil gjøre alt for å få rødt kort, og to sexeksperter som gir råd om cunnilingus.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Black Ice News
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer Samuel og Lashawn som gleder seg over fordelene ved sine nå lovlige ekteskap, en politibetjent som møter sin nye makker og Lando fra 'Star Wars' blir forfulgt av et superfan.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Non-Stop Party
programme.desc: Sketsjene inkluderer en fyr som jager etter kjæresten sin til verdens ende og LMFAO som ikke kan holde opp med å feste.

programme.title: Broad City: Broad City
programme.desc: Jentene tar farvel.

programme.title: Broad City: What A Wonderful World
programme.desc: Ilana får nyss om en hemmelig Lil Wayne-konsert. Sammen med Abbi loffer hun seg frem i New York. Jentene lar ingenting hindre dem i å skrape sammen nok penger til billettene. Selv om det blir skremmende, mister de aldri målet av sikte.

programme.title: Broad City: Stolen Phone
programme.desc: Etter å ha prøvd å finne gutter på Facebook, bestemmer Abbi og Ilana seg for å prøve å finne gutter i 'virkeligheten'.

programme.title: Broad City: Working Girls
programme.desc: Ilana prøver å tjene litt ekstra penger i 'temp game'. Abbi lover naboen sin å vente på pakken hans, men hun går glipp av leveransen og må dra til verdens ende for å få fatt i den.

programme.title: Broad City: The Lockout
programme.desc: Når Abbi får sprøytet leiligheten sin mot skadedyr og Ilana mister nøklene sine, blir jentene nødt til å bo på gaten - akkurat når Abbi har sin første kunstutstilling.

programme.title: Broad City: P*$$Y Weed
programme.desc: Jentene må bli voksne! Abbi vil kjøpe sin egen marihuana, som en voksen kvinne, mens Ilana må takle skatten på egen hånd. Og, jentene er høye som hus.

programme.title: Broad City: Fattest Asses
programme.desc: Når Abbi innser at hun er for snill, blir hun mere bitchy. Ilana bestemmer seg for å nå sitt fulle potential. De går på en eksklusiv fest og møter noen eventyrlige DJ-er. Nå kan ingenting gå galt.

programme.title: Broad City: Hurricane Wanda
programme.desc: Abbi og Ilana klarer sig igennem stormen med hjælp fra deres venner (Jaimé, Lincoln og Jeremy), men de får desværre selskab af Bevers og hans søster. Et spil 'Who Done It?' udspiller sig, mens orkanan raser udenfor.

programme.title: Broad City: In Heat
programme.desc: Ilana leter febrilsk etter en gave i siste øyeblikk til Lincoln, mens Abbi prøver å finne et klimaanlegg for å få det kjølig på soveværelset.

programme.title: Broad City: Mochalatta Chills
programme.desc: Der dukker opp nye muligheter når Abbi endelig kan trene noen på Soulstice og Ilana gjør suksess som firmasjef.

programme.title: Broad City: Wisdom Teeth
programme.desc: Abbi skal trekke visdomstennene og Ilana ser det som sin plikt å passe henne til hun får det bedre - noe som selvfølgelig innebærer en masse 'medikamenter' og en total mangel på tilsyn.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Clemmy Marries a Dead Guy
programme.desc: Johnson tries to marry the late Hot Tub King of Reno, and Garcia and Williams discover the magical properties of Liberace's piano.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Garcia's Secret Girlfriend
programme.desc: Dangle and the gang solve Reno's biggest mystery: who is Garcia's new girlfriend?

programme.title: RENO 911!: Dangle's Son
programme.desc: While Dangle spends time with a beautiful young man who might be his son, the other deputies enjoy the new department Humvee.

programme.title: RENO 911!: CSI: Reno
programme.desc: The deputies work as security guards when "CSI: Miami" comes to Reno, and Wiegel and Dangle get a homeless man into a bathtub.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Naked Stake-Out
programme.desc: After a drug sting goes wrong, Dangle and Junior race back to the station on foot -- and naked.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Wiegel and Craig Get Married
programme.desc: Good news and bad news for Wiegel: her boyfriend proposed, but he's going to be executed for multiple murders.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Wiegel's Pregnant
programme.desc: Did Dangle and Garcia freeze to death? Did Wiegel's serial killer husband get lethally injected? What is Carrot Top doing in Reno, and why is he so mad?

programme.title: RENO 911!: The Junior Bros.
programme.desc: While Garcia goes undercover to bust undocumented workers and the people who hire them, Junior spends his day off with his brothers.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Jet Ski Blues
programme.desc: The Reno Sheriff's Department inherits a beautiful, cursed jet ski from a fallen deputy.

programme.title: RENO 911!: Rick's On It
programme.desc: Rick the Citizens' Patrolman one-ups the Sheriff's Department in investigating a crime spree, and Garcia receives a visit from an old, unpredictable friend.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: True Hollywood Stories: Prince & Red Balls Energy Drink
programme.desc: Negrodamus answers questions, and Charlie Murphy plays basketball with Prince.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: The Internet & Moment in the Life of Lil Jon
programme.desc: Dave walks in Lil Jon's shoes and considers the Internet's sleaziness.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: World Series of Dice & Mooney on Movies
programme.desc: The Marcy Projects hosts a champion shooter contest, and Paul Mooney talks "Gone with the Wind."

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: I Know Black People & Keeping It Real Goes Wrong
programme.desc: Dave asks contestants how much they know about black American culture.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Oprah's Baby Daddy & Jury Duty
programme.desc: Dave gets Oprah pregnant and recalls being a member of the O.J. Simpson trial jury.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Kneehigh Park & Making da Band
programme.desc: P. Diddy gives unusual requests, and Snoop Dogg visits Kneehigh Park; appearances by Q-Tip and Wyclef Jean.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Mandela Boot Camp & The Time Haters
programme.desc: Dave reveals sketches that are too hot for television.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Wayne Brady & Tyrone Biggums's Fear Factor
programme.desc: Dave gives up his show to Wayne Brady, and Tyrone Biggums returns as a guest on "Fear Factor."

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: Lil Jon on Lil Jon & Black Bush
programme.desc: Dave considers how recent events would have played out if President Bush were black; special guests Jamie Foxx, Lil John, and music from Outkast's Big Boi.

programme.title: Chappelle's Show: PopCopy & Clayton Bigsby
programme.desc: A blind white supremacist unleashes hate, and Dave unveils Nat King Cole's booty videos.

programme.title: Tosh.0: April 16, 2019 - Vape Bros
programme.desc: Daniel learns vape tricks from some Canadian bros, finds out about a jousting expert's made-up language and assesses the injuries of two stabbing victims.

programme.title: Tosh.0: April 23, 2019 - Sneeze Guy
programme.desc: Daniel sits down with a man who makes a living sneezing online for fetishists, reveals his method of self-defense and compares British and American road rage.

programme.title: Tosh.0: April 30, 2019 - Big Arms Guy
programme.desc: Daniel breaks down a video of an over-the-top ATM heist, meets an arm wrestling champ with giant limbs and video chats with two men who demand value from their potato chips.

programme.title: Tosh.0: ToshCon: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Daniel reunites with past guests at the inaugural ToshCon, interviews BYU's first openly gay valedictorian for a job and gives a special thank you to his fans.

programme.title: Tosh.0: September 17, 2019 - SteveWillDoIt
programme.desc: Daniel examines a swinging tattoo convention, tests social media star SteveWillDoIt's limits, talks sports in Around the Horn.0 and unveils the Aussie Viddie of the Weekie.

programme.title: Tosh.0: September 24, 2019 - Brother K
programme.desc: Daniel meets with "intactivist" Brother K, teams up with Dom Irrera to quiz a focus group about racist terms and examines a video of a dog dancing to an accordion.

programme.title: Tosh.0: October 1, 2019 - "I Eat Ass" Free Speech Defender
programme.desc: Daniel gets his staff fired up for tape day, interviews an ass-eating First Amendment protector and is unnerved by videos of a man who pies himself in the face.

programme.title: Tosh.0: October 8, 2019 - Misha
programme.desc: Daniel reviews a college student's shocking night, meets a 12-year-old with a love for songs about video games, and reveals what it's really like to attend a live taping.

programme.title: Tosh.0: October 15, 2019 - BarSoap Guy
programme.desc: Daniel welcomes his best-smelling guest ever and wealth-shames young people on TikTok.

programme.title: Tosh.0: October 22, 2019 - Burping Girl
programme.desc: Daniel takes inspiration from a woman who sprayed milk from her breasts at a music festival, is taught how to slackline at the office and meets with a renowned burp fetishist.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline cheers Richard on when he gets the chance to win big money by making the half-court free-throw shot at a New York Knicks game.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard finds himself in a life-or-death predicament when Caroline aims to boost the value of his work by convincing an influential art columnist that Richard is a deceased artist.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline feels that Annie consistently chooses the men in her life over their friendship and challenges Annie to take a girls-only trip, but chaos ensues when they take a trip together and both girls find romance at a local ski resort.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline, who is trying to face single life bravely, tries her hand at an evening on the town alone, with a little coaching from Richard.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline supports Del in his efforts to expand business for her "Caroline in the City" cartoon strip and merchandise.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline's naive, helpful nature comes out in full bloom when she starts catering to her new elderly neighbor, Miriam, but Annie thinks Caroline is being taken advantage of.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: When Caroline discovers that only one newspaper in the country has not renewed her cartoon strip, she obsesses on the matter until finally convincing herself to face the editors in person.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Caroline has difficulty confronting her neglectful building superintendent, Mr. Tedescu about her faulty plumbing, so she hires a mediator to pressure Mr. Tedescu into taking care of her request.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: Richard is stunned when his former love Julia informs him that she is about to be married.

programme.title: Caroline in the City
programme.desc: In the ongoing charade of Caroline pretending that she and Richard are married.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: John and his new wife, Suzanne, reach a crisis point in their marriage when one of them must drop out of college due to financial woes.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A Christmas party at the garage is interrupted when Louie, the dispatcher teams up with Alex in a game of high-stakes poker against his cardshark brother Nick.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The taxi gang scrambles to come up with a scheme aimed at ending a one-sided romance when a determined, pretty cabbie sets her cap for Tony and joins the Sunshine Cab Co. to be near him.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Alex feels sympathy for a fare who’s a real loser with the women and arranges a date for the man with Elaine, who later discovers that her klutzy companion for the evening is a U.S. Congressman.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Bobby’s career dreams come true when he lands a role in a soap opera, prompting him to throw his torn-up cabbie’s license at Louie, but the dispatcher vows to take revenge if Bobby ever comes crawling back.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: After an operation, Louie, the sharp-tongued dispatcher, panics when he has to keep a promise that he made to God during surgery to turn over a new leaf.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas’ youthful and attractive mother makes her first visit to America, and after she and Alex meet and have an evening love affair, Latka assumes that he will soon be getting a new daddy.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: When Alex’s ear is nearly shot off in a holdup attempt in his cab, he stuns his fellow cabbies by quitting and exchanging his driving clothes for a waiter’s tuxedo at a snobbish French restaurant.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies fall victim to a Hollywood-style roller coaster ride when a production company visits to do a film on taxi drivers. Life at the Sunshine Cab Company turns into a continual champagne and buffet festivity.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker has made a resolution to quit smoking and he announces it to everyone at the diner.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Margaret has an erotic dream about John and Linda tries to analyze it. Reggie, Jake and Bob get drunk off a keg of beer. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John has anxiety issues over dating a younger woman and Reggie is getting threats from an ex-convict. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Christmas turns Reggie into a competitive freak; Bob, a greedy super; Jake, a non-participant and John an Angry Head.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John inherits an urn with one of his old patients, Harry in it.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker has a run-in at the office with an elder hostile Jake's grandmother.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Reggie makes John a test subject in her psychology experiment and Jake gets his driver's license renewed. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John Becker goes on a cruise and Jake dates a supermodel. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John is asked to be the keynote speaker at an early graduation for Harding High schools class of 2001.
